translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Jima'i: Ba za'a iya bada ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ba, ko fahimtar sa ba tare da faɗaɗa duba ga jinsi ba, wanda ya ƙunshi muhimman ɗabi'u da kuma sakamakon da ya shafi lafiyan jima'i. Ma'anar jima'i a fagen masana shi ne" abu ne da ya keɓanci ɗan Adam tsawon rayuwar sa da ta ke kewaye da jima'i, fahimtar jinsi da kuma rawar da ya ke takawa, mu'amalartar jima'i, jin sha'awa , jin daɗi, kusanci da kuma hayayyafa. Ana samun kwarewa da kuma bayyana jima'i a cikin tunani, ƙawatawa, sha'awa , aminta, ɗabi'u, ƙimantawa, halayya, hidindimu, rawar gani da kuma mu'amala. a yayin da jima'i kan iya ɗauka duk waɗannan sigogin, na kowane daga ciki bane ake samun ƙwarewa ko kuma a bayyana shi ba. Jima'i na tasirantuwa ne da ta dalilin waɗannan abubuwa da su ka haɗa da cuɗanya ta halitta, ɗabi'u, mu'amala , tattali, siyasa, al'adun gargajiya, Shari'a, tarihi, addini da kuma ruhi" (WHO,2006)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.reference: Hakkokin Jima'i: Akwai yarjejeniyar da ke yaɗuwa na cewa ba za'a cimma matsaya a lafiyan jima'i ba ko killace shi ba ba tare da girmamawa, samun tsaro da kariya na wasu hakkokin ɗan Adam. Ma'anar hakkokin Jima'i a fagen masana da aka bayyana shi ƙasa gudunmuwa ne ga cigaba da tattaunawa game da Hakkokin ɗan Adam da ya danganci lafiyan jima'i. Sanya wanzajjen hakkokin ɗan adam ga jima'i da lafiyan jima'i shi ya bada hakkokin Jima'i. Hakkokin Jima'i na bada kariya ga hakkokin mutane don su bayyana kuma su cimma mu'amalarsu su kuma ji daɗin lafiyan jima'in su, tare da duba i zuwa hakkokin wasu da kuma cikin tsarin kariya game da ƙyamata." Ƙungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO, 2006, ta sabunta a 2010)" cewa cikar lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne ga yanda aka girmama hakkokin ɗan adam da bashi kariya da kuma yadda ake cika shi.

An gabatar da wannan aikin takamaimai na hakkin jima'i, wanda ke da alaka da ci gaba da tattaunawa kan hakkin dan-adam da ke danganta da lafiyarmu ta jima'i. Aikace-aikacen hakkin dan-adam na yanzu zuwa kan jima'i da lafiyarmu ta jima'i, na kunshe da hakkin jima'i. Hakkin jima'i yana kare hakkin mutane duka na cimma da kuma bayyana jima'insu, da kuma jin lafiyarmu ta jima'i, tare da yin biyayya ga hakkin sauran mutane, da kuma a cikin kewayon karewa daga duk wani nauye na wari. translations.source: Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination

translations.reference: Ƴancin kasancewa ba tare da muzgunawa ba ko wahala, rashin tausayi ko ƙin ƙarɓar magani ko hukunci Ƴancin sirri Ƴancin samun ƙololiwar kulawa a fannin lafiya( wanda ya haɗa da lafiyan jima'i) da kuma tsaro ta fannin mu'amala. translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.reference: A ƴan shekarun nan, ana cigaba da amfani da kayan aikin hakkokin ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa don bada gudunmuwa da kum cigaba da ɗaiɗaikun mutane ke riyawa da ma sauran gurare don gwamnatin ƙasa ta bada tabbacin na girmamawa, kariya da kuma cimma manufa ga hakkokin da su ka shafi lafiyar iyali da na haihuwa (Cook, et al, 2003). Ma'anoni da kuma tsarin aikace-aikacen da aka gabatar an ɗora su ne bisa tsarin hakkokin kare ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa wanda aka sanya shi cikin kundi, sannan kuma ya bada damar fuskantar hakkokin da su ka zama wajibi ga tsara lafiyan jima'i. An kawo muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i kamar haka:. muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i A yayin da aka mishi duba na tsanaki da kuma kyakkyawan fahimta:

translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.reference: Lafiyan jima'i ya kasance ne akan lafiyan jiki ba wai kawai rashin samuwar cuta ba. Lafiyan jima'i ya shafi girmamawa, tsaro, da kuma samun ƴanci daga tsangwama da cin zarafi. Lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne bisa cikar wasu daga cikin hakkokin ɗan adam. Lafiyan jima'i dace da dukkan rayuwar kowa, ba wai kawai ga waɗanda su ke cikin shekarun hayayyafa ba, ga masu ƙuruciya da ma manya gabaɗaya. Ana nuna lafiyan jima'i ta hanyoyi mabanbanta da ta shafi jima'i da kuma nau'ikan nuna jima'i.

Kāwar jiki ta dogara ne akan cimma wasu haƙƙoƙin ɗan-adam. Kāwar jiki ta shafi kowane mutum a rayuwarsa, ba kawai ga waɗanda suke shekarun haihuwa ba, har ma da matasa da bawan Allah. *   **tattalin arzaki:** tat-tah-leen ar-zah-kee

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Sexual health"**: I used "lafiyar jima'a" which is the standard Hausa term for sexual health.

    *   **al'adun jima'a** (social customs/traditions - covers norms)
    *   **ayyukan mutane** (people's activities/roles)

    *   **yadda ake amshi iko a jima'a** (how power is acquired/obtained in society - captures power dynamics).  This is a more descriptive phrasing to convey the meaning accurately.
*   **"Social, economic, and political contexts"**:  I used "yanayi na zamantoniya, tattalin arzaki, da siyasa" which translates directly to "social, economic, and political situations/contexts."
*   **"Critically influenced"**: I used "ta danganci sosai da" which means "is closely related to" or "is greatly influenced by."
*   **"Ya zama dole"**: This phrase means "it must be" or "it is necessary."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i suna ƙara yaɗuwa ta hanyar jin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba. Wasu cututtukan ma su kan samuwa ne a lokacin ɗaukan ciki, haihuwa, da kuma sayarwa kuma ta hanyar jinin da ke ɗauke da cutar ko kuma abinda jinin ya haifar. Cututtukan su ma da matuƙar tasiri ga lafiya. Idan ba'a magance ba, ya kan iya kaiwa ga matsaloli masu girma wanda ya yaɗa da cututtukan da su ka shafi ƙwaƙwalwa da na zuciya, rashin haihuwa, cikin da ke zama a bayan mahaifa, ɓari, da kuma ƙaruwar barazana ga kamuwa da ƙwayoyin da ke hadda cutar ƙanjamau (HIV).
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a general audience. I've included explanations of some choices after the translation to justify certain phrasing.

**Hausa Translation:**

Cutarda cutar da ke kasancewa ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) Bayan Fage: Cutar da ke kasancewa ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) suna yaduwa sosai ta hanyar hulɗa ta jima'i ba tare da kariya ba. Wasu cutar da ke kasancewa ta hanyar jima'i kuma za su iya yaduwa yayin juna biyu, haihuwa da shayar da yara, da kuma ta jinin da aka cutar da shi ko kayan aikin jini. Cutar da ke kasancewa ta hanyar jima'i suna da tasiri mai tsanani akan lafiya. Idan ba a yi magani ba, za su haifar da sakamako na alhama, gami da cutar halitta da cutar zuƙin, rashin yuwuwar haihuwa, ciki mai wahala, mutuwar yara a ciki, da ƙarin haɗarin kamuwa da Virus ɗin Ƙungiyar Mutane (HIV).

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

"Cutar da ke kasancewa ta hanyar jima'i" literally means "infections that are transmitted through sexual intercourse." Keeping the abbreviation "(STIs)" in parentheses is helpful for those familiar with the English term.

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Su na haɗe da ƙyama, cin zarafin cikin gida, kuma yana haifar da lalacewar ingantaccen lafiya. Mafi yawan waɗannan cututtuka ba su da alamun da za'a iya ganewa. Idan an kamu da su, gama-garin alamun STIs su ne zubar zuwa daga mafitsara ko mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura, da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Cututtukan da aka fi magancewa na STIs su ne trichomonas (zubar ruwa a mafitsaran mace), Chlamydia, gonoriya da sifilis. Samun ƙaruwar magungunan da ke tasiri akan ƙwayoyin cututtuka na yin barazana ga cututtukan da ba za'a gonoriya wanda ba za'a iya magance ta ba.
translations.hypothesis:

"An kuma haɗa su da alalace, cutar karuwar garkama (domestic violence), da kuma tasiri mara kyau akan ingancin rayuwa. Yawancin cututtukan da ke yaƙi da jima'i (STIs) ba sa nuna alamun cuta. Lokacin da alamun cuta ke nan, alamun cutar jima'i na yawan gaske su ne fitar da ruwan yini daga mahaifa ko urethra, ƙura a makogwaro, da ciwon ƙananan makogwaro. Cututtukan jima'i mafi yawan gaske da za'a yi magani da su su ne trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea, da syphilis.  Ƙaruwar sauri na jinin antimicrobial (antimicrobial resistance) babban barazona ne ga gonorrhoea da ba za'a yi magani da shi ba."

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Ƙwayoyin cutar virus da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i sun haɗa da ƙwayar cutar mai karya garkuwar jiki wato HIV, ƙwayar cutar da ke zama a matantaka mace wato HSV, Hepatitis B, HPV, da kuma Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1(HTLV-1). rashin ko samun ƙarancin magani. Ana samun riga-kafin Hepatitis B a ko ina don bada kariya ga cutar sankarar hanta, da kuma HPV don bada kariya ga sankarar mahaifa. HIV, HSV da HTLV-1 cututtuka ne da kan iya zama na tsawon rayuwa, HIV da HSV na da magungunan da za su iya disashe ƙarfin ƙwayoyin cutar, amma a yanzu haka dai babu maganin da zai iya kawar da waɗannan cututtuka. Amfani da kororon roba akan kari kuma bisa ƙa'ida kan iya bada cikekken kariya daga kamuwa da cututtukan jima'i. Yin gwaji da wuri da kuma binciken mutanen da su ke ɗauke da wannan cututtuka tare da abokan hulɗar su kan iya samar da kyakkyawan dama don samun ingantaccen magani da kuma kariya daga rikitarwa da kuma ci gaba da yaɗawa.

Cututtuka masu yaduwa na cututtukan jima'i (STIs), kamar HIV, cutar da ta shafi mahaifa (genital herpes simplex virus - HSV), cutar hepatitis B, cutar human papillomavirus (HPV), da kuma cutar human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) basu da ko kuma da iyawar magani mai iyawa. Akwai allurai don hepatitis B don hana kamuwa da cuta wanda hakan na iya haifar da cutar kansara a ciki (liver cancer), kuma don HPV don hana cutar kansar makoshini (cervical cancer). HIV, HSV, da HTLV-1 su ne cututtuka na rayuwar mutum: ga HIV da HSV akwai magani waɗanda zasu iya ƙara ƙarancin yaduwar cutar, amma a halin da ake ciki, babu magani don kowane ɗaya daga waɗannan cututtukan jima'i. Amasewa da amfani da kariya (condoms) ta hanyar amfani da su yadda ya kamata da kuma daidai, hakan na iya hana kamuwa da cututtukan jima'i da HIV. Bincika mutanen da suka kamu da cututtukan jima'i da abokan su na jima'i da sauran mutane, da kuma gano cutar da wuri, yana ba da damar mafi kyau don magani mai tasiri da hana ƙalubalane da yaduwar cutar.

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Alamomi: Mutum zai iya kamuwa da cututtukan ba tare da ƙwaƙƙwaran wasu alamun cutar ba. Idan ya kasance akwai, gama-garin alamu cutukan sun haɗa da: zubar ruwa na ba gaira ba dalili daga matantaka, zubar ruwa daga mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura da ƙuraje da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Alamun cututtukan na musamman su ne: Cutar Gonoriya da Chlamydia Waɗannan cututtuka su na kama mahaifa a mata, mafitsara ga maza da kuma wasu cututtukan da su ke kama al'aura, wanda ya haɗa da cutar da ke zazzago da dubura waje.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Alamar cuta: Mutum na iya samun cuta mai kai tsaye (STI) ba tare da nuna alamomin cuta a bayane ba. Lokacin da suke bayyane, alamomin da suka fi yawa na cututtukan kai tsaye sun haɗa da: fitar da ruwan yini mara daidaito daga mahaifa, fitar da ruwa daga butawar maza, ƙura da ƙwayoyin jini a waje, da ciwon ƙananan makogwaro. Alamomin cututtukan kai tsaye na musamman sun haɗa da: Gonorrhea da cutar Chlamydia. Waɗannan cututtukan suna haifar da cervicitis a mata, urethritis a maza, da kuma cutar da sauran jikin mutum, gami da cutar da ƙungiyar ƙwayoyin jima'i da ƙungiyar makogwaro a baki.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Alamar cuta:** Ah-lah-mar koo-tah
*   **Mutum:** Moo-toom
*   **na iya samun:** Nah ee-yah sah-moon

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Alamomin da aka saba gani sun haɗa da zubar ruwa daga al'auran mata da na maza, jin zafi yayin yin fitsari. Jariran iyayen da su ke ɗauke da cutar za su iya kamuwa da cutar ciwon ido dalilin gamuwa da cutar yayin haihuwan da ba na tiyata ba. cutar da ke zazzago da dubura kan iya rasa alamun kamuwa da cututtuka. Sifilis: Sifilis ma yawanci baya bayyana alamu , a lokacin da alamu ya bayyana a farkon matakin sifilis zai nuna wani gyanbo ne maras zafi da ciwo. sifilis a mataki na biyu na iya bayyana a matsayin ciwo kawai wanda ke samun fata, jiki da kuma ƙulkutu ko ƙari wanda ya yaɗa da ƙuraje a tafin hannu da kuma tafin ƙafa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a general audience. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Alalace manyan alamomin sun haɗa da zubar da ruwan jiki daga mahaifa ko naman mahaifa, da zafin jiki lokacin taɓa jiki. Jaruman mata da suka kamu da cuta na iya kamuwa da kumburin ido (idanu na yashi) saboda bayyanar cutar jima'i ta al'ada yayin haihuwa ta mahaifa. Cutar da ta shafi ƙwayar cuta da ƙanƙara na iya zama ba tare da alamun gani ba.

**Syphilis:** Cutar syphilis galibi ba ta da alamun gani, idan alamun gani suka bayyana, syphilis na farko yana nuni da ƙura ɗaya, mara maƙi. Cutar syphilis ta biyu na iya bayyana a matsayin launi mai yaduwa da ke shafar fata, kwalƙwal kuma ƙwayar cuta, gami da ciwon hawan a ƙirƙizai da ƙafafun.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Common symptoms"**: Translated as "Alalace manyan alamomin" (meaning "Common major symptoms").
*   **"Vaginal or penile discharge"**: Translated as "zubar da ruwan jiki daga mahaifa ko naman mahaifa" (meaning "discharge of fluid from the womb or penis").  I tried to be as direct as possible.
*   **"Burning with urination"**: Translated as "da zafin jiki lokacin taɓa jiki" (meaning "and heat in the body during urination").
*   **"Neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes)"**: Translated as "kumburin ido (idanu na yashi)" (meaning "inflammation of the eye (red eyes)").  I included "red eyes" in parentheses for clarity.

*   **"Rectal and pharyngeal infections"**: Translated as "Cutar da ta shafi ƙwayar cuta da ƙanƙara" (meaning "Infection that affects the rectum and throat").
*   **"Asymptomatic"**: Translated as "ba tare da alamun gani ba" (meaning "without visible symptoms").
*   **"Syphilis"**: Kept as "Syphilis" as it's a recognized medical term.
*   **"Solitary, painless ulcer"**: Translated as "ƙura ɗaya, mara maƙi" (meaning "one sore, without pain").

*   **"Mucous membranes"**: Translated as "kwalƙwal" (meaning "mucous membranes").
*   **"Lymph-node"**: Translated as "ƙwayar cuta" (meaning "lymph node").
*   **"Classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet"**: Translated as "ciwon hawan a ƙirƙizai da ƙafafun" (meaning "rash on the hands and feet").

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Medical translations *always* require careful consideration of the target audience and the context in which the translation will be used.
*   **Terminology:**  Medical terminology can be challenging. I've tried to use common and understandable terms in Hausa.  A medical professional familiar with Hausa would be best to review this for absolute accuracy.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:**  Be mindful of cultural sensitivities when discussing sexual health topics.



I hope this translation is helpful!  Please let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate or if you'd like me to refine this translation further.

translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: Sifilis a matakin ƙarshe kuma ba ya nuna ko bayyana wasu alamu amma ya na nuni da cewa sifilis ne ta hanyan gwajin jini. Cutar Trichomoniasis: babban alamomin wannan cuta sun haɗa da zuban ruwan da babu dalili tare da jan kan fatar al'aura, ƙaiƙayi da kuma jin zafi yayin saduwa. Ƙurajen cikin matantaka (Genital Herpes Simplex Virus, HSV) Mafi yawanci wannan cuta na bayyana ne a ƙuraje masu matuƙar zafi da ciwo, masu ruwa, ko kuma mai kamar gyanbo a kan fatar al'aura da kuma cikin baki. Alamomin wannan cuta na tsawon rayuwa ne, wanda ke faruwa akai akai(idan wasu sun mutu wasu su ƙara fitowa).
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I'll also include some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Cutarsa mai ɓawon ruwa (syphilis) ba ta da alama kuma ta bambanta da binciken jinin da ke nuna cutar syphilis.  Trichomoniasis: Alamomin gabaɗaya sun haɗa da fitar da ruwan yini mara daidaito tare da roƙon ƙyauwar jiki, zubar da ƙanshi, da ciwon jima'i.  Cutar da ta shafi mahaɗan jima'i ta herpes simplex virus (HSV) yawanci ta bayyana ta wajen raɗa-raɗa, ƙura-ƙura, ko ƙura-ƙura a waje ɗin mahaɗan jima'i da bakin mutum. Cutar HSV a mahaɗan jima'i da ke da alama tana zama cuta ta rayuwa kuma za ta bambanta da dawon alama da yawa.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be tricky without hearing it):**

*   **Cutarsa mai ɓawon ruwa:**  Chut-ar-sah mai *buh*-won *roo*-wah
*   **Syphilis:** See-fill-iss (pronounced closer to the English, but with a slightly softer "s")
*   **Trichomoniasis:** Tree-koh-moh-nye-ah-sis
*   **Alamomin:** Ah-lah-moh-min
*   **Gabaɗaya:** Gah-bah-dah-yah
*   **Ƙyauwar jiki:** Kyow-war jee-kee
*   **Zubar da ƙanshi:** Zoo-bar dah kun-shee
*   **Ciwon jima'i:** Chee-won jee-mah-ee
*   **Herpes simplex virus:** Her-pes sim-plex vie-rus
*   **HSV:**  H-Ess-Vee
*   **Raɗa-raɗa:** Rah-dah-rah-dah
*   **Ƙura-ƙura:** Kura-kura
*   **Waje ɗin:** Wah-jeh deen
*   **Mahaɗan jima'i:** Mah-hah-dan jee-mah-ee
*   **Dawon alama:** Dah-won ah-lah-mah

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Latent syphilis is asymptomatic"**:  I translated this as "Cutarsa mai ɓawon ruwa (syphilis) ba ta da alama."  "Ba ta da alama" directly means "it has no signs/symptoms."  Including "(syphilis)" after "Cutarsa mai ɓawon ruwa" helps clarify the term for those unfamiliar.
*   **"Positive syphilis serology"**:  Translated as "binciken jinin da ke nuna cutar syphilis." This means "blood test that shows syphilis."  A more literal translation might be possible, but this is more understandable in a medical context.
*   **"Trichomoniasis"**:  I used the transliteration "Trichomoniasis" as it's a technical term.  It's common to use loanwords in medical contexts.
*   **"Abnormal vaginal discharge"**: "fitar da ruwan yini mara daidaito" - "fitar da ruwan yini" means "discharge of vaginal fluid" and "mara daidaito" means "abnormal/not normal."
*   **"Redness of the vulva"**: "roƙon ƙyauwar jiki" - This translates to "inflammation of the vulva."
*   **"Itching"**: "zubar da ƙanshi" - This is the standard Hausa term for itching.
*   **"Painful intercourse"**: "ciwon jima'i" - This directly translates to "pain during intercourse."
*   **"Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV)"**:  I used the transliteration "Herpes simplex virus" and included "(HSV)" for clarity.
*   **"Painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations"**: "raɗa-raɗa, ƙura-ƙura, ko ƙura-ƙura" - These are the standard Hausa terms for sores, blisters/vesicles, and ulcers, respectively.
*   **"Lifelong condition"**: "cuta ta rayuwa" - "a disease of life"
*   **"Frequent symptomatic recurrences"**: "dawon alama da yawa" - "repeated appearance of symptoms."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Medical Terminology:** Hausa has a growing medical vocabulary, but some terms are borrowed from English or Arabic.  I've tried to use the most common and understandable terms.
*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the intended audience.  This translation is geared towards a general audience with some basic health literacy.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with medical knowledge to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: Cutar sankarar jini (HTLV-1) Gabaɗaya ba shi da wasu alamu, matsanancin matakin cutar kan iya jawo matsanancin ciwon wanda ya haɗa da sankarar jini ga manya (ATL) da cigaban matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa. Magani: yanzu haka akwai ingantattun magunguna da su ke nan don magance waɗannan cututtuka dayawa. Ƙwayoyin bacteria guda uku na STIs( Chlamydia, gonoriya da kuma sifilis) da kuma ƙwayar cutar Trichomoniasis, yawanci akan samu waraka ta hanyar amfani da ingantattun ƙwayoyin magunguna na antibiotics wanda ake bayarwa sau ɗaya ko fiye da ɗaya. Game da ƙwayoyin cutar Virus( HIV, HSV, da HTLV-1) maganungunan da su ka fi tasiri a wadace su ne antiviral ko kuma magungunan da su ke daƙusar da cutar daji wato anti-cancer ( idan aka duba abinda ya shafi HTLV-1) da zai iya canza tsarin cututtukan, duk da basa warkar da waɗannan cututtuka uku.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ana amfani da magungunan da su ke jure antibiotics wajen warkar da STIs, musamman gonoriya, da ya ƙaru a ƴan shekarun nan an samu nasarar raguwarsa sosai ta dalilin magance shi. A sakamakon wani bincike da aka yi na sa ido akan cutar gonoriya wato Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme a turance (GASP) ya nuna jerin gwanon juriya ga ƙwayar quinone, ƙarin juran azithromycin, da kuma bayyanar juran ƙarin rukunonin cephalosporins. Bayyanar raguwar sauƙin kamuwa gonoriya ga ƙarin rukunonin cephalosporins tare da gina tsantsan juriya ga penicillin, sulphonamides, ja da yalo, quinolones, da kuma macrolides ya sanya ƙwayoyin gonoriya jure magunguna dayawa. Juriyar magunguna ga sauran STIs, duk da bai cika yawa ba, amma kuma yana faruwa, wanda ya ke sanya kariya da waraka da ya kamata cikin halin ƙaƙanikayi. Don samun cikekken magance STIs, yana da matuƙar amfani a samu ƙwayoyin da su ka dace , tare da samun adadin da ya kamata a ɗauka da lokaci , musamman na STIs don tabbatar da samun cikekken magancewa da warkarwa da kuma bada kariya ga samuwar cigaba da jure ƙwayoyin magani.

Matsalar jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta (AMR) ga abubuwan hana cuta da ake amfani da su wajen magance cutan hawan jima'i, musamman gonorrhoea, ta karu sosai a cikin shekarun da suka gabata kuma ta rage yawanin samun sakamako mai kyau a magani. Sakamakon shirye-shiryen kula da jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta na Gonococcal (GASP) yanzu sun nuna alamu na kasancewar matsakaicin kashi na jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta na quinolone, ƙaruwar jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta na azithromycin, da bayan jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta na cephalosporin mai tsawaita spectra. Bayan bayyanar rauni a jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta na gonorrhoea ga cephalosporin mai tsawaita spectra, da kuma kwarewar babban matakin jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta ga penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones, da macrolides, ya sa gonorrhoea zama cuta mai jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta da yawa. AMR don sauran cutan hawan jima'i, duk da kasancewa mara yawa, har yanzu yana nan, yana sa daidaita hana cuta da magani da sauri ya zama babban abu. Domin magance cutan hawan jima'i yadda ya kamata, yana da mahimmanci a ɗauki abubuwan hana cuta da suka dace, da adadin da ya dace da lokacin da ya dace don cutar hawan jima'i ta musamman, don tabbatar da samun magani mai kyau ko farfasa, kuma don hana bayyanar jinin hana ƙwayoyin cuta.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Cutar Agana (Smallpox) Bayani: Agana cuta ce mai saurin yaɗuwa ta hanyar ƙwayar cuta ta variola, ɗaya daga cikin dangin cututtukan orthopoxvirus. Tana ɗaya daga cikin cututtuka mafi muni da dan'adam ya taɓa fama da su kuma ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar miliyoyin mutane kafin a samu nasarar kawar da ita. Ana ganin cutar ta ci zamani a duniyar nan na kusan shekara 3000. Allurar riga-kafin agana, wadda Edward Jenner ya ƙirƙira a shekara ta 1796, ita ce riga-kafin farko da aka samu nasara.

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated – the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Ya nuna cewa masu sana’ar tatsar nonon da a da suka kamu da cutar aganar shanu ba sa kamuwa da cutar agana (smallpox) kuma ya nuna cewa za a iya yin amfani da irin wannan rigakafin cutar a kan wasu mutane. Ƙungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta ƙaddamar da wani gagarumin shiri na kawar da cutar agana a shekara ta 1967. An gudanar riga-kafi sosai tare da sa ido a duk duniya tsawon shekaru da dama. Mutum na ƙarshe da aka sani ya kamu da cutar haka kawai a Somalia ne a 1977. A shekarar 1980, WHO ta ayyana ceyan kawar da ƙwayar cutar - watau ita ce kawai cuta mai yaɗuwa da aka samu wannan nasara a kanta.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Wannan ya kasance daga cikin fitattun nasarorin da aka samu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a a tarihi. Alamomi: Alamomin farko na cutar agana sun haɗa da zazzabi mai zafi, gajiya da ciwon baya mai tsanani, sai kuna akan samu ciwon ciki da amai. Bayan kwana biyu zuwa 3 ƙwayar cutar tana haifar da wani nau'i na kurji mai cike da ruwa, wanda daga baya yake cika da ɗiwa sannan a ƙarshe ya fitar da ɓawo mai bushewa, sannan sai ya faɗi. Ƙurajen suna farawa ne ta fuska da hannaye, sannan daga baya su bazu zuwa sauran sassan jiki. Za a fara samun raunuka a cikin baki da hanci da sauran wurare, sannan sai su fara raɗaɗi.

Daga bayan kwanaki biyu zuwa uku, kwayar cutar ta haifar da ciwon hawan musammam da ƙume-ƙume cike da ruwan daskararri, waɗanda daga bisar su ka cika da kwal, sannan su haɗu da ƙasa da ta busa da faduwa. Ciwon hawan ya fara ne a fuskoki da hannu, sannan ya yadu zuwa sauran jiki. Munanan abubuwan ciwo sun bayyana a cikin kwalalawar kunne da bakinmu, kuma sun zama ƙura gaba da karshen kwarewa.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7–17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ana kamuwa da cutar agana (Smallpox) daga mutum zuwa mutum ta hanyar ɗigo-ɗigon cutar a lokacin kusanci da masu ɗauke da alamomin cutar, ko kuma a wasu lokuta ta hanyar tufafi da wajen kwanciyar mai cutar. Bayan kamuwa da cutar, alamominta suna fara bayyana ne tsakanin kwanaki 7- zuwa 17. Bayan bayyanarsa kuma, da zarar zarar an ga zazzabi, shi ke nan abu ya tabbata. Cutar za ta zauna a jikin mutum har sai ɓawo na ƙarshe ya faɗi. Cutar agana ta kashe mutane kusan kaso 30 na masu ɗauke da ita. Katin gane cutar ta WHO Matakin WHO: Tun bayan kawar da cutar agana, an ta samun muhawarorin da suka mayar da hankali kan yadda za a kawar da ɓirɓishin ƙwayoyin cutar variola.

translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories – one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: A cikin 1996, a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta 49, ƙasashe mambobi sun yanke shawarar lalata wannan cuta a watan Yunin 1999, sai dai kawai za a ba da damar adana samfurinta don dalilai na bincike a ɗakunan gwaje-gwaje guda biyu da aka keɓe - ɗaya a ciki a Amurka da wani kuma a Rasha. Ana amfani da waɗannan samfuran ƙwayoyin cuta na variola da aka ajiye na ɗan lokaci ne don ƙarin bincike mai muhimmanci, wanda Kwamitin Ba da Shawarwari don Binciken Cutar Variola ke kulawa. Wannan rukunin kwamitin suna haɗuwa ne duk shekara. Sakatariyar cutar agana ta WHO da ke hedikwatar WHO tana tsara duk ayyukan da suka shafi kawar da cutar da kuma abubuwan da kan zo bayan kawar da cutar. Waɗannan sun haɗa da sa ido kan binciken da aka ba da izinin yi tare da ƙwayar cutar variola mai rai don haɓaka matakan riga-kafin kamar sinadaran hana yaɗuwar ƙwayoyin cuta.

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:
translations.reference: Tun lokacin da aka kawar da ita wannan cuta, an samar da rigakafi da takamaimun magunguna don cutar agana da cututtukan da ke da alaƙa, kamar cutar ƙyandar biri. Sakatariyar kuma ita ce ke da alhakin shirye-shiryen gaggawa da sarrafa lamurran gaggawa na riga-kafin cutar agana a lokacin da ta ɓulla, wanda ba a yi tsammanina cutar za ta sake ɓulla ba. Sakatariyar tana kula da binciken lafiyar halittu da nazarin halittu na ma'ajiyar ƙwayoyin cuta ta variola da aka ba da izinin yin hakan, kamar yadda Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta umarta; kuma tana tabbatar da an ba da rahoton shekara-shekara ga hukumomin gudanarwa na WHO. Sakatariyar Cutar Agana taimaka wa WHO wajen adana tarihin cutar a duniya da kuma rubuta darussan da aka koya daga nasarar kawar da cutar ta agana. Ayyukan Sakatariyar WHO a yanzu sun haɗa da:
translations.hypothesis:

Hukuncin (Secretariat) kuma ya yi da alhakin shirye-shiryen jin kai da kuma kula da adadi mai karanci na allunan Smallpox a halin da ba a tabbas ba, idan cutar ta sake bayyana. Hukuncin ya kula da binciken tsaro da kare kansa (biosafety and biosecurity) na wuraren adana virus ɗin Smallpox da aka ba da izinin, kamar yadda Majalisar Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya ta umarci, kuma yana tabbatar da rahoton shekara-shekara zuwa Jiga-Jigan Kungiyar WHO. translations.source: Variola virus research and development of countermeasures organizing annual meetings of the WHO Advisory Committee on Variola Virus Research (ACVVR) coordinating review of research proposals for work with variola virus through the ACVVR managing relationships with the two variola virus repositories (which are also WHO Collaborating Centres) recording, processing and monitoring requests from researchers for variola virus DNA from the 2 repositories under specific rules

translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

"Zai yi aiki da aiwatar da binciken tsabta kuma amincin halitta da keɓancewar halitta a kowace shekarar biyu a wuraren adana cutar Smallpox ta duniya biyu.  Ƙirƙirar jagorar dokokin kan bincike kan cutar Smallpox da DNA mai alaƙa da ita da sauran abubuwan da ke da alaka.  Adana matsalar gaggawa da amsa ga abubuwan da ke faruwa.  Tsadai da shirya jagorar dokokin kan ci gaba da amsar da za a yi amfani da su don hana cutar Orthopoxvirus.  Ƙirƙirar hanyoyin adana matsalar gaggawa da amsa da kayan aiki don aiwatar da matakan adana matsala."

**Transliteration (for pronunciation guidance):**

"Zai yi aiki da aiwatar da binciken tsabta kuma amincin halitta da keɓancewar halitta a kowace shekarar biyu a wuraren adana cutar Smallpox ta duniya biyu. Ƙirƙirar jagorar dokokin kan bincike kan cutar Smallpox da DNA mai alaƙa da ita da sauran abubuwan da ke da alaka. Adana matsalar gaggawa da amsa ga abubuwan da ke faruwa. Tsadai da shirya jagorar dokokin kan ci gaba da amsar da za a yi amfani da su don hana cutar Orthopoxvirus. Ƙirƙirar hanyoyin adana matsalar gaggawa da amsa da kayan aiki don aiwatar da matakan adana matsala."

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **"Biennial"**: Translated as "a kowace shekarar biyu" (every two years). This is a direct and common way to express the concept.
*   **"Biosafety and Biosecurity"**:  I've used "tsabta kuma amincin halitta da keɓancewar halitta."
    *   "Tsabta" means "cleanliness" or "safety" in a general sense, but in this context, it implies biosafety – preventing the release of harmful biological agents.
    *   "Amincin halitta" means "natural safety" or "security of nature."
    *   "Keɓancewar halitta" means "biological security" or "security of living things."  This covers the biosecurity aspect – protecting facilities and materials from unauthorized access or misuse.
*   **"Global Variola Virus Repositories"**: Translated as "wuraren adana cutar Smallpox ta duniya biyu" (two global Smallpox virus storage locations).  "Wurare adana" means "storage location" or "repository."  I used "Smallpox" instead of trying to directly translate "Variola Virus" as it's more commonly understood.
*   **"Normative Guidance"**: Translated as "jagorar dokokin." This means "guidance based on rules/laws/standards." It conveys the idea of official, established recommendations.
*   **"Research on Variola Virus DNA and Related Matters"**: Translated as "bincike kan cutar Smallpox da DNA mai alaƙa da ita da sauran abubuwan da ke da alaka."  This is a fairly literal translation.
*   **"Emergency Preparedness and Response"**: Translated as "Adana matsalar gaggawa da amsa ga abubuwan da ke faruwa."  "Adana matsala" means "preventing problems" or "preparedness." "Amsa" means "response."
*   **"Medical Countermeasures"**: Translated as "ci gaba da amsar da za a yi amfani da su." This means "development of responses that will be used."
*   **"Orthopoxviruses"**: Translated as "cutar Orthopoxvirus."  Similar to Variola Virus, I used the English term as it's likely more recognizable in this context.
*   **"Tools to Implement Preparedness Measures"**: Translated as "kayan aiki don aiwatar da matakan adana matsala." "Kayan aiki" means "tools" or "resources." "Aiwatar da" means "to implement." "Matakan adana matsala" means "preparedness measures."

translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.
translations.reference: Dafin cizon maciji Bayani: Dafin cizon maciji cuta ce mai yiwuwar cutar da rayuwa wadda ke haifar da guba idan mutum ya gamu da cikin cizon maciji. Haka kuma cutar dafin cizon tana iya samuwa ta hanyar fesa yawu da wani nau’in macizai ke yi a cikin idanuwa a matsayin matakin kare kansu. Rashin ƙoƙarin da aka yi a baya don shawo kan cutar dafin maciji ya haifar da rashin cikakku da ingantattun bayanan yaɗuwar cututtuka. Yawancin waɗanda suka taɓa samun cizon maciji ba sa zuwa cibiyoyin lafiya ko asibitoci; maimakon haka sukan dogara da magungunan gargajiya.

translations.source: However, available data show 4.5–5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8–2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: Duk da cewa bayanan da aka tattara sun nuna cewa maciji yana sarar mutane miliyan 4.5 zuwa 5.4 a duk shekara. Daga cikin waɗannan, miliyan 1.8 zuwa 2.7 suna samun rashin lafiya kuma 81 000 zuwa 138 000 suna mutuwa daga saboda wannan cizo. Mutanen da suka fi hatsarin fuskantar wannan sun haɗa da masu aikin gona na karkara, makiyaya, masunta, mafarauta, yara masu aiki, mutanen da ke zaune a gidajen da ba a gina su da kyau ba, da kuma waɗanda ke da ƙarancin damar samun ilimi da kiwon lafiya. Kamuwa da cutar da mace-mace na faruwa a-kai-a-kai tsakanin matasa sannan yara kanana sun fi fama da yawan mace-mace. Bugu da ƙari, mata ba sa samun kulawar asibiti a wasu al'adu kuma mata masu juna biyu sun fi zama masu rauni a wannan fannin.

Daga wannan adadi, mutane 1.8 zuwa 2.7 miliyan ke haɓaka cuta mai wahala, kuma mutane 81,000 zuwa 138,000 ke mutuwa sakamakon cuta.  Kungiyoyin da ke cikin hadari sun haɗa da ma'aikatan karkashin gona, manoma, mazauna tafki, masu neman zaune, yara masu aiki, mutanen da ke zaune a gidaje mara kyau, da kuma wadanda ke da iyawar iyakacin shiga cikin ilimi da kula da lafiya. Cutewa da mutuwar suna fitowa mafi yawan lokaci a tsakanin matasa, kuma yara suna fuskantar kashewar yawa.  Hakanan, mata suna fuskantar wani matsala a kan samun kula da lafiya a wasu al'adu, kuma mata da ke jima'i suna cikin hadari sosai.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.
translations.reference: Rikicin da ke ci gaba da hana samun kulawar lafiya, ingantaccen maganin riga-kafi a yankuna da yawa, musamman ma yankin kudu da hamadar Sahara, wani abu ne da ke ba da gudummawa wajen yiwuwar neman taimako ta hanyar maganin gargajiya. Alamominta: Cizo ko fesa dafin da macizai masu dafi ke yi na iya haifar da mummunan yanayin gaggawa na rashin lafiya. Saka dafin nau'ikan macizai daban-daban na iya haifar da alamomi daban-daban, sai dai wasu sun fi wasu tsanani. Wannan ya sa shirye-shiryen neman ainihin maganin riga-kafi ya zama cike da matsaloli a halin yanzu. Dafin cizon maciji na iya haifar da shanyewar jiki mai tsanani wanda zai iya hana numfashi, kuma yana haifar da matsananciyar kulawar likita cikin gaggawa.

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.
translations.reference: Sannan kuma mutane na iya fuskantar matsalar zubar jini mai kisa ko matsalar ƙoda da ba za a iya maganinta ba. Har ila yau, za a iya samun mummunar lalacewar tsoka, wanda zai haifar da nakasu na dindindin har ma da yanke gaɓoɓin jiki. Yara sum fi samun kansu cikin wannan yanayi mai tsanani saboda rashin nauyin jiki. Yawancin mace-mace da munanan lamurran saran maciji ana iya yin riga-kafinsu gaba ɗaya ta hanyar samar da amintattun magungunan kashe ƙwayoyin cuta da kuma samun dama, musamman a wuraren da ke da haɗarin macizai. Magani masu inganci na macizai su ne kawai ingantaccen magani don hanawa ko karkatar da mafi yawan illolin cizon maciji.

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: Yin magani: Magungunan dafin maciji sun kasance suna da inganci wajen hanawa ko sauƙaƙa mafi yawan illolin cutar saran maciji kuma suna cikin jerin mahimman magunguna na WHO. Samuwar waɗannan magungunan kashe dafin, tare da wayar da kan jama'a kan hanyoyin riga-kafin farko a tsakanin al'ummomi da ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, su ne mafi kyawun hanyoyin da za a iya maganin mace-mace saboda cizon maciji. Bayan saran maciji da ake zargin yana da dafi, to a bi waɗannan matakan: Nan da nan mutum ya tashi daga wajen da aka yi masa cizon. A cire duk wani abu da zai iya tamke kewayen sashen jikin da aka ciz don gujewa cutarwa idan aka samu kumburi.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).
translations.reference: Ka kwantar da hankalin wanda abin aka cizan, saboda yawancin saran maciji ba ya kashe mutum nan-take. A hana mutum motsi gaba ɗaya kuma a kai shi asibiti da wuri-wuri Wasu lokutan idan aka ɗan mammatsa wurin cizon, ana iya dacewa. A guji hanyoyin taimakon gaggawa na gargajiya ko magungunan itace. Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kashe zafin wajen (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani).

"Yi amantawa da mai ciwon, domin yawancin zazzafan kashe-kashen makarkashi ba sa haifar da mutuwar nan da nan.  Ka hana mutumin ya motsa kansa gaba daya, kuma ka kai shi zuwa asibiti da sauriya.  Zai yiwu a yi tsoron wurin da aka kashe da taushi a wasu lokuta.  Ka guje wa hanyoyin bada taimako na gargajiya ko maganin dabi'a.  Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kawar da ciwon a wurin da aka kashe (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani)."

**Transliteration (for easier reading/pronunciation):**

"Yi amantawa da mai ciwon, domin yawancin zazzafan kashe-kashen makarkashi ba sa haifar da mutuwar nan da nan. Ka hana mutumin ya motsa kansa gaba daya, kuma ka kai shi zuwa asibiti da sauriya. Zai yiwu a yi tsoron wurin da aka kashe da taushi a wasu lokuta. Ka guje wa hanyoyin bada taimako na gargajiya ko maganin dabi'a. Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kawar da ciwon a wurin da aka kashe (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani)."

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations for Hausa:**

*   **"Yi amantawa da mai ciwon"**:  This translates to "Reassure the victim."  "Yi amantawa" means "to reassure" or "to give confidence." "Mai ciwon" means "the one with the pain/illness" (the victim).
*   **"zazzafan kashe-kashen makarkashi"**: This translates to "venomous snake bites." "Zazzafan" means "venomous/poisonous." "Kashe-kashen" means "bites." "Makarkashi" means "snake."
*   **"ba sa haifar da mutuwar nan da nan"**: This translates to "do not cause immediate death."  Hausa sentence structure often places the verb at the beginning of the clause. "Ba sa haifar" means "they do not cause." "Mutuwar nan da nan" means "immediate death."
*   **"Ka hana mutumin ya motsa kansa gaba daya"**: This translates to "Immobilize the person completely." "Ka hana" means "prevent/stop." "Mutumin" means "the person." "Ya motsa kansa" means "to move oneself." "Gaba daya" means "completely."
*   **"ka kai shi zuwa asibiti da sauriya"**: This translates to "transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible." "Ka kai shi" means "take him/her." "Asibiti" means "hospital/health facility." "Da sauriya" means "quickly/as soon as possible."
*   **"Zai yiwu a yi tsoron wurin da aka kashe da taushi a wasu lokuta"**: This translates to "Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases." This is a more complex sentence, and I've tried to convey the meaning accurately. "Zai yiwu" means "it is possible/may be." "A yi tsoron" means "to apply pressure." "Wurin da aka kashe" means "the place where it was bitten." "Da taushi" means "with pressure/padding." "A wasu lokuta" means "in some cases."
*   **"Ka guje wa hanyoyin bada taimako na gargajiya ko maganin dabi'a"**: This translates to "Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines." "Ka guje wa" means "avoid." "Hanyoyin bada taimako na gargajiya" means "traditional first aid methods." "Ko" means "or." "Magin dabi'a" means "herbal medicines."
*   **"Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kawar da ciwon a wurin da aka kashe (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani)"**: This translates to "Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe)." "Ana iya ba da" means "can be given." "Don kawar da ciwon" means "to relieve the pain." "Wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani" means "which can be severe."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness.
translations.reference: Cutar tsutsotsi Bayani: Cututtukan tsutsotsi (wato STH a taƙaice) suna daga cikin cututtukan da aka fi sani a duk duniya kuma suna shafar al'ummomin da suka fi talauci da rashin ƙarfi. Suna samuwa ne ta hanyar ƙwai da ke cikin najasar ɗan'adam wanda hakan ke gurɓata ƙasa a wuraren da tsaftar muhalli ta ti ƙaranci. Manyan nau'ukan da ke cutar da mutane su ne roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) da hookworm (Necator Americanus da Ancylostoma duodenale). Tsutsotsi na hanji suna fitar da alamomi iri-iri da suka shafi hanji (zawo, ciwon ciki), rashin lafiya da mutuwar jiki.

Manyan nau'in cutan waɗanda ke yiwa mutane ciwo su ne: gwarzawar (Ascaris lumbricoides), ƙwayar ƙungiya (Trichuris trichiura), da ƙwayoyin alfar (Necator americanus da Ancylostoma duodenale). translations.source: Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled;
translations.reference: Hookworms suna haifar da asarar jini na hanji na yau da kullun wanda ke haifar da cutar da ake kira anemia a Turance. Ana samar da waɗannan tsutsotsi ne ta hanyar ƙwai waɗanda ke fitowa a cikin najasar mutanen da suka kamu da cutar. Tsutsotsi na manya suna rayuwa ne a cikin hanji inda suke samar da dubban ƙwai kowace rana. A wuraren da ba su da isasshen tsafta, waɗannan ƙwai suna gurɓata ƙasa. Wannan na iya faruwa ta hanyoyi da yawa: ana cin wannan ƙwan da ke maƙala da kayan lambu ne a lokacin da ba a dafa kayan lambun da kyau ba, ko ba a wanke ko an ɓare bawon da kyai ba;

translations.source: eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development.
translations.reference: ana cin ƙwan a gurɓataccen ruwa; yaran da ke wasa a gurɓataccen wuri suna cin ƙwan ne idan sun sanya hannayensu a cikin bakinsu ba tare da wankewa ba. Alamunta: kamuwa da cutar yana da alaƙa da adadin tsutsotsi da suka yi wa mutum katutu. Mutanen da ke ɗauke tsutsotsin ƙaɗan yawanci cutar ba ta kama su. Idan kuma suka yi yawa, suna iya haifar da alamomi iri-iri da suka danganci hanji (zawo da ciwon ciki), rashin nuna cewa mutum yana cin abinci mai gina jiki, raunin jiki da rashin girma da haɓakar jiki.

translations.source: Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas.
translations.reference: Lokacin da cutar ta yi tsanani sosai, tana iya haifar da toshewar hanji wanda ya kamata a ce an yi tiyata. S. stercoralis na iya haifar da cututtuka na fara da hanji kuma an san yana da alaƙa da rashin abinci mai gina jiki na yau da kullum a tsakanin yara. Idan ma mai ɗauke da cutar garkuwar jikinsa ta ragu, ƙwayar cuta na iya karaɗe masa jiki, wadda tana iya kisa a koyaushe idan ba a yi magani da sauri ba kuma sau da yawa mutum yana iya mutuwa duk da an masa jinya. A shekarar 2001, wakilai a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya sun amince da wani kuduri (WHA54.19) wanda yake kira ga ƙasashe masu fama da cutar da su fara yaƙar tsutsotsi, musamman schistosomiasis da helminths. Dabarar yaƙar cututtukan tsutsotsin ita ce sarrafa cututtuka ta hanyar jinya na lokaci-lokaci na mutanen da ke fama da abin waɗanda kuma ke zaune a yankunan da ke fama da cutar.

Matsalolin cuta mai karfi sosai na iya haifar da toshewar ƙwai wanda ya kamata a yi masa aikin tiyata. *S. stercoralis* na iya haifar da cutar kashewar jini da cutar hanji, kuma an san cewa yana da alaka da ciwon ƙwaƙwalwa na yawan gaske a yara. Idan ɗigorin jiki ya ragu, kwayar cuta na iya haifar da cutar wawan ce da yaduwa wanda ta kasance mai kashewa idan ba a yi magani da sauri da kuma daidai, kuma sau da yawa ta kasance mai kashewa duk da magani. A shekarar 2001, wakilan Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya sun amince da wararawa (WHA54.19) da ta bukaci kasashe masu yawan cuta da su fara aiwatar da matakan yaki da ƙwayoyin cuta, musamman schistosome da ƙwayoyin cuta da ke yaduwa ta ƙasa. Dabarar kawancewar cutar da ke yaduwa ta ƙasa ita ce kawancewar cuta ta hanyar yiwa mutanen da ke cikin kasashe masu yawan cuta magani a lokaci-lokaci.

translations.source: People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: Mutanen da za su iya daukar cutar: Yaran da ba su shiga makaranta ba tukunna Yara ƴan makaranta matan da suka kai shekarun haihuwa (ciki har da mata masu juna biyu da ke tsakanin wata 6 zuwa 9 da mata masu shayarwa) mutane a wasu sana'o'i masu haɗarin ɗaukar wannan cutar akwai masu noman ganyen shayi ko masu haƙar ma'adinai.

translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines –albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) – are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.
translations.reference: Magani: Magungunan da WHO ta ba da shawarar aiki da su -albendazole (400 MG) da mebendazole (500 MG) - suna da tasiri, ba su da tsada kuma ga sauƙin gane yadda za a yi amfani da shi ko ga ma'aikatan da ba likita ba (misali malamai). An duba magungunan sosai ta hanyar gwaji mai yawa kuma an yi amfani da su a kan miliyoyin mutane, kuma ba a ga wata illa tare da su ba. Duka albendazole da mebendazole ana ba da su gudummawa ga ma'aikatun lafiya na ƙasa ta ƙarƙashin WHO a duk ƙasashen da ke fama da cutar don kula da duk yaran da suka isa shiga makaranta. Ivermectin wanda ake sa ran zai rage yaɗuwar S. stercoralis zai kasance a farashi mai araha daga 2021.

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year – one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour – a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030.
translations.reference: Haihuwar jariri a mace Bayani: Jaririn da ya mutu bayan makonni 28 a ciki, kafin ko lokacin haihuwa, ana ƙirga shi a matsayin wanda aka haifa a mace. Ana haihuwar jarirai kusan miliyan 2 a mace a kowace shekara - jariri ɗaya ke nan a cikin duk daƙika 16. Fiye da kashi 40 cikin 100 na jariran da ake haifa a mace suna mutuwa ne a lokacin naƙuda – asarar da za a iya guje wa ta hanyar ingantaccen tsari da nuna kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da sa ido na yau da kullum da ba da kulawar haihuwa ta gaggawa lokacin da ya kamata. Mutuwar jarirai a lokacin juna biyu ko lokacin haihuwa wani bala'i ne wanda ba a magance shi ba a cikin ajandar duniya, manufofi da shirye-shiryen da aka ba wa kuɗi. Ana samun kaɗuwar zuciya, musamman ga mata da danginsu, kamar shiga damuwa lokacin jego, matsalolin kuɗi, da kuma nuna ƙyama da ƙiyayya. A shekarar 2014, Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da Tsarin Hidima ga Jarirai (ENAP), wanda ya haɗa da burin rage adadin mace-macen jarirai a cikin mahaifa da guda 12 ko ƙasa da haka a wata na huɗu zuwa shida lokacin rainon ciki a jimillar haihuwa 1,000 a kowace ƙasa nan da 2030.

Kusan miliyan 2 na mutum mai haɗuri ke faruwa kowace shekara – daya kowane dakika 16. Sama da kashi 40% na mutum mai haɗuri ya faru a lokacin haihuwa – wanda za'a iya hana shi da ingantaccen kula da kuma kulan da ke da mutunci a lokacin haihuwa, gami da binciken yawa da samun isassun kayan aikin kula da cutar haihuwa a lokaci idan ya zama a buɗe.  Mai haɗuri yana faruwa a lokacin juna biyu ko a lokacin haihuwa yana zama wani bala'i da ba a yi masa kulawa sosai a cikin ayyukan duniya, manufofin da kuma shirye-shiryen da aka kafa. translations.source: In 2021, 139 mainly high-income and upper middle-income countries had met this target, but 56 countries will not each the ENAP target by 2030 if further efforts are not made. If current trends continue, 15.9 million babies will be stillborn; nearly half of these (7.7 million, 48%) will occur in sub-Saharan Africa. Causes: With quality health care throughout pregnancy and childbirth, most stillbirths are preventable. The major causes of stillbirth include pregnancy and childbirth-related complications, prolonged pregnancy, maternal infections such as malaria, syphilis and HIV, maternal conditions especially hypertension, and diabetes, and fetal growth restriction (when an unborn baby is unable to achieve its growth potential and therefore smaller than it should be). Congenital abnormalities are responsible for less than 10% of stillbirths reported nationally in high-income countries and the exact proportion in low-income settings is unknown due to limitations in diagnostics.
translations.reference: A shekarar 2021, ƙasashe 139 galibi masu ƙarfin tattalin arziki da masu tattalin arziki dama-dama sun cimma wannan manufa, amma ƙasashe 56 ba za su cimma wannan manufa ta ENAP ba nan da shekarar 2030 idan ba a ƙara yin kokari ba. Idan aka ci gaba a haka, za a haifi jarirai miliyan 15.9 a mace; kuma kusan rabin waɗannan (watau miliyan 7.7, 48%) duk a yankin ƙasashen kudu da Sahara. Abubuwan da ke jawo shi: Idan akwai ingantacciyar kulawar lafiya tun daga lokacin rainon ciki da haihuwa, ana iya kauce wa mafi yawan haihuwar jarirai a mace. Manyan abubuwan da ke haifar da haihuwar jarirai a mace sun haɗa da matsalolin rainon ciki da haihuwa, doguwar naƙuda, cututtuka kamar zazzabin cizon sauro, cutar sifilis da cutar sida, hawan jini, da ciwon sukari, da hana girman jaririn da ke ciki. Matsalolin da ake haifar mutum da su suna haddasa ƙasa da kaso 10 na mutuwar jarirai kafin a haife su kamar yadda aka ruwaito a ƙasashe masu ƙarfin tattalin arziki kuma ba a san ainihin adadin ba a ƙasashe masu ƙarancin tattalin arziki saboda rashin iya binciko waɗannan lamurran.

**Hausa Translation:**

A shekarar 2021, kasashe 139, galibi kasashe masu kudin da ya kai sama da matsakaici da kuma kasashen matsakaici, sun cimma wannan burin. Amma, kasashe 56 ba za su isa burin ENAP ba bisa ga ƙoƙarin da za a yi idan ba a ƙara ƙoƙari ba. Idan yanayin yanzu na ci gaba, jarirai miliyan 15.9 za su mutu da haihuwa (stillbirth); kusan rabin wannan adadi (miliyan 7.7, 48%) za a samu a Afirka ta Kudu da Sahel.  Dalilai: Tare da kula da lafiya mai kyau a duk lokacin juna biyu da haihuwa, za'a iya hana yawancin mutuwar da haihuwa. Manyan dalilai na mutuwar da haihuwa sun haɗa da cutoɓi da ke faruwa ne a lokacin juna biyu da haihuwa, tsawaita lokacin juna biyu, cutar malaria, sifilis da HIV, cutar da ke shafar mahaifa irin su karancin jini (hypertension) da sukari, da kuma kawar da girma a cikin jaririn da ke cikin ƙirƙizari (fetal growth restriction) (inda jariri ba zai iya cimma girman da ya kamata ba, don haka ya zama ƙanƙara fiye da yadda ya kamata). Cututtukan haihuwa (congenital abnormalities) sun haɗa da ƙarƙashin kashi 10 na mutuwar da haihuwa da aka bayar a kasashe masu kudin da ya kai sama da matsakaici, kuma adadin da ya fi dacewa a cikin ƙasashe maras kudi bai sani ba saboda ƙuntatawar gwajin gani.

translations.source: Factors related to age of the mother and practicing smoking can also increase the risk of maternal disease and stillbirth. Stillbirths can be prevented through family planning to avoid unwanted pregnancies, good health and nutrition prior to and during pregnancy, quality and respectful antenatal and childbirth care including adequate skilled health personnel including midwives. Syphilis treatment in pregnancy could also prevent an estimated 200 000 stillbirths, while fetal heart rate monitoring and labour surveillance and prompt interventions when needed are crucial for preventing 832 000 intrapartum stillbirths and reducing neonatal deaths. Stillbirths are strongly linked to adverse social and economic determinants of health. Prevention and responsive care need to be integrated across the continuum of maternal health care, and beyond.
translations.reference: Abubuwan da suka danganci shekarun uwa da kuma shan taba suna iya ƙara yiwuwar kamuwa da cututtukan da ke da alaƙa da jego da kuma haihuwar jarirai a mace. Ana iya kauce wa haihuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar tsarin iyali don hana samin haihuwar da ba a buƙata, samun cikakken kiwon lafiya da abinci mai gina jiki kafin da lokacin rainon ciki, samun ingantacciyar kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da samar da ƙwararrun ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, kamar da ungozoma. Maganin cutar sifilis a lokacin rainon ciki shi ma zai iya hana haihuwar kimanin jarirai 200 000 a mace, yayin da saka idanu kan bugun zuciya da sa ido a kan aiki da kuma kawo ɗauki lokacin da ake buƙata suna da mahimmanci don kauce wa mutuwar jarirai da ke cikin mahaifansu guda 832,000 tare da rage mutuwar jarirai. Haihuwar jariri a mace har yanzu tana da alaƙa mai ƙarfi da munanan al'amurran lafiya na zamantakewa da tattalin arziki. Riga-kafi da nuna kulawa ta hanyar kai agaji suna buƙatar a haɗa su a yi amfani da su a fannin kula da lafiyar mata da sauran fannoni.
translations.hypothesis:

translations.source: This includes respectful and supportive care in the event of a death. Listening to the experiences and voices of women and their communities is essential to help address issues of stigma associated with stillbirth. WHO response: More needs to be done to integrate stillbirth prevention within global and national agendas for high quality health care for women, adolescents, and babies. Through the Global Strategy for Women's, Children's and Adolescents Health 2016–2030 and implementing the recommendations of the Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), WHO is working to end preventable stillbirths, as part of efforts to improve maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health. Most stillbirths do not receive a birth certificate and are not registered.
translations.reference: Wannan ya haɗa da kulawa da tallafi a yayin mutuwa. Sauraron abubuwan da suka faru mata da al'ummominsu da suka fito yana da mahimmanci don taimakawa wajen magance matsalolin ƙyama da ke da alaƙa da haihuwar jarirai a mace. Amsar WHO: Ana buƙatar ƙara zage damtse don ganin an sanya yaƙi da haihuwar jarirai a mace cikin ajandoji na duniya da na ƙasa don ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga mata, matasa, da jarirai. Ta ƙarƙashin shirin Dabarun Lafiyar Mata, Yara da Matasa a Faɗin Diniya 2016-2030 da amfani da shawarwarin kowane Tsarin Hidima wa Jarirai a (2014), WHO na aiki don kawo ƙarshen haifuwar jarirai mace, a matsayin wani ɓangare na ƙoƙarin inganta lafiyar mata masu juna biyu, Jariri, yaro da lafiyar matasa. Yawancin jariran da ake haihuwa a mace ba sa samun takardar shaidar haihuwa kuma ba su da rajista.

translations.source: Improving systems for reporting births and neonatal deaths is a matter of human rights and a prerequisite for reducing stillbirths. In addition, there is a need to strengthen routine health information systems to accurately capture and report stillbirths for monitoring and improving the quality of care. WHO provides tools to help countries improve their data on both stillbirths and neonatal deaths. WHO also has guidance to help countries review and investigate individual deaths so they can recommend and implement solutions to prevent similar ones in the future and a standard classification system for perinatal deaths (ICD-PM). WHO and UNICEF are supporting a call for collective action to end preventable stillbirths by:
translations.reference: Inganta tsarin bayar da rahoton haihuwa da mutuwar jarirai al'amari ne na 'yancin ɗan'adam kuma abu ne da ake buƙata don rage haifar jarirai a mace. Bugu da ƙari, akwai buƙatar ƙarfafa tsarin bayanan kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum don samar da sahihin rahoton haihuwa don sa ido da haɓaka ingancin ba da kulawar lafiya. WHO ta ba da kayan aiki don taimaka wa ƙasashe su inganta ɗaukar ƙididdigarsu game da haihuwa da kuma mutuwar jarirai. WHO ta kuma ba da hanyoyi don taimaka wa ƙasashe yin nazari da bincika mutuwar mutane don su iya ba da shawararda aiwatar da mafita don hana irin waɗannan a nan gaba da kuma samar da tsarin tantance mutuwa kafin haihuwa (ICD-PM). WHO da UNICEF suna goyan bayan kira ga matakin gama kai don kawo ƙarshen haifuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar:

translations.source: Substandard and falsified medical products Overview: Up to two billion people around the world lack access to necessary medicines, vaccines, medical devices including in vitro diagnostics, and other health products, which creates a vacuum that is too often filled by substandard and falsified products. This problem is growing as global supply chains become more complex, meaning products manufactured in one country may be packaged in a second country and distributed across borders to be marketed or sold to consumers in a third. The growth of e-commerce also contributes to this trend by making it easier to purchase medicines online, often from unauthorized sources. WHO has identified this issue one of the urgent health challenges for the next decade given that more than one in ten medicines in low- and middle-income countries are estimated to be substandard or falsified.
translations.reference: Kayan aikin jinya da magunguna marasa inganci da na bogi Bayyani: Kimanin mutane biliyan biyu a duniya ba su da damar samun ainihin magunguna, alluran riga-kafi, na'urorin likitanci da suka hada da na bincika rashin lafiya, da sauran kayayyakin kiwon lafiya, waɗanda saboda rashinsu sai dai kawai a yi amfani da marasa inganci kuma na bogi. Wannan matsala tana ta ƙaruwa ne yayin da salsalar samar da kayayyaki na duniya ke ƙara cika da sarƙaƙƙiya, ma'ana kayayyakin da aka ƙera a wata ƙasa ana iya tattara ninke su cikin fakiti a wata ƙasa kuma a tura su don a tallata ko a sayar da su ga masu siye a wata ƙasa daban. Bunƙasar kasuwancin zamani ya taimaka wajen wannan al'amari ta hanyar sauƙaƙawa wajen siyan magungunan ta intanet, yawanci ta hannun waɗanda ba su cancanta ba. . Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayyana wannan matsalar da ɗaya daga cikin matsalolin lafiya da za a fuskanta nan da shekara goma, inda aka yi hasashen samun ɗaya daga cikin magunguna goma yakasance ba shi da inganci ko na jabu a ƙasashen da ke da ƙaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga.

translations.source: No country remains untouched from this issue, and WHO has received reports of substandard or falsified medical medicines, vaccines and in vitro diagnostics from all regions of the world. Both generic and innovator medicines can be falsified, ranging from very expensive products for cancer to very inexpensive products for treatment of pain. WHO Member States have agreed on a comprehensive global strategy focused on prevention, detection and response to move towards achieving increased access to quality, safe, effective and quality medical products. Impact: Substandard and falsified medical products create many problems for both the individual taking the medicine and for families, the larger society, health care system and supply chain. When medicines do not work the way they should, they can fail to treat or prevent disease, contribute to antimicrobial resistance, waste precious resources and lead to a loss of confidence in medicines and distrust of healthcare providers.
translations.reference: Babu wata ƙasa da wannan al'amari bai shafa ba, in Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta samu rahotanni game da magunguna da allurori marasa inganci ko na jabu da kuma gwaje-gwajen cututtuka daga kome lungu da saƙo na duniya. Wannan lamari na yin jabu ka iya shafar kowane nau'i na magani, kama daga magungunan kansa masu tsada zuwa magungunan kashe zafi masu sauƙi. ƙasashen da cikin Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya sun amince da a ɗauki babban mataki da zai mayar da hankali wajen kawarwa da ganowa da kuma ɗaukar mataki wajen samun ƙaruwar kaiwa ga ingantacce, amintacce kuma gangariyar magani. Tasiri: Magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu na haifar da matsaloli da dama ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da iyalai da suke amfani da su da ma al'umma da tsarin kula da lafiya da kuma hanyoyin rarraba su. Yayin da maganunguna ba su yi aiki ba, za su gaza ne wajen yin maganin cuta, lamarin da ka iya haifar da tirjiyar ƙwayoyin cuta da ɓarnar dukiya da kuma daina amincewa da da magunguna da kuma masu samar da kulawa ta lafiya.
