**Hausa Translation:**

Matsalar nan ta shafar kowace kasa, kuma WHO ta samu rahotai kan abubuwan zubar da ido ko ƙarya da aka yi wa magunguna, allurai, da kayan gwaje-gwaje na jima'i daga dukkan bangar duniya. Magungunan janare da na asali (innovator) dukansu na iya zubar da ido, daga abubuwan da suka fi tsada wajen maganin kansar hadi da abubuwan da ke da ɗaɗi wajen maganin ciwon rai. Kasashen mambobin WHO sun amince da wata dangi ta duniya mai cikakken tsari mai mai da hankali kan hana, gano, da amsa don kaiwa ga cimma samun isasshen shiga da inganci, amincin, da aikin magunguna. Tasiri: Abubuwan zubar da ido da ƙarya a magunguna suna haifar da matsaloli da yawa ga mai shan magunguna da iyalansa, al'umma baki daya, tsarin kula da lafiya, da isar da kayan aiki. Lokacin da magunguna ba sa aikin da ya kamata, suna iya gazawar janyewa ko hana cuta, haɓaka jinin anti-microbial, zubar da ƙima da ƙarfi, da haifar da rasa amsa da rashin amana ga masu aikin kula da lafiya.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations for Hausa:**

*   **"No country remains untouched" - "Matsalar nan ta shafar kowace kasa"**:  A direct translation of "untouched" can be awkward in Hausa.  "Shafar" (to affect) is a more natural way to convey the idea that the problem has reached every country.
*   **"Substandard or falsified" - "Abubuwan zubar da ido ko ƙarya"**:  "Zubar da ido" means "substandard" or "of poor quality." "Ƙarya" means "false" or "fake." Using both covers the full meaning.
*   **"In vitro diagnostics" - "Kayan gwaje-gwaje na jima'i"**: This is a direct translation.  It's a technical term, and a more colloquial explanation would be too long for this context.
*   **"Generic and innovator medicines" - "Magungunan janare da na asali (innovator)"**:  "Janare" is the standard Hausa term for "generic."  I've added "(innovator)" in parentheses to clarify "asali" for those who might not be familiar with the term in this context.
*   **"Comprehensive global strategy" - "Dangi ta duniya mai cikakken tsari"**: "Dangi" means "strategy" or "plan." "Mai cikakken tsari" means "comprehensive" or "well-structured."
*   **"Increased access" - "Samun isasshen shiga"**: "Isasshen shiga" means "sufficient access."
*   **"Quality, safe, effective" - "Inganci, amincin, da aikin"**: These are direct translations of the adjectives.
*   **"Antimicrobial resistance" - "Haɓaka jinin anti-microbial"**: This is a direct translation, as the English term is often used directly in Hausa in medical contexts.
*   **"Loss of confidence" - "Rasa amsa"**: "Amsa" means "response" or "trust."  "Rasa amsa" conveys the loss of trust.
*   **"Distrust of healthcare providers" - "Rashin amana ga masu aikin kula da lafiya"**:  "Rashin amana" means "distrust."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  The best translation always depends on the specific audience and purpose.
*   **Terminology:**  Medical terminology can be challenging.  I've tried to use standard Hausa terms where possible, but some direct borrowing from English might be necessary.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  It is *essential* to have this translation reviewed by a native Hausa speaker, preferably someone with medical or technical expertise, to ensure accuracy and naturalness.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:** Consider cultural nuances when translating sensitive topics like health and medicine.

translations.source: This can have a negative socioeconomic impact, contributing to related loss in productivity and adding expenses to the individual and national health system. They are most likely to reach patients in situations where there is constrained access to quality and safe medical products, poor governance and weak technical capacity. Although this issue impacts all countries, countries where there are weak or non-existent regulatory systems bear the greatest burden of substandard and falsified medical products. In an increasingly globalized world, no one country has sufficient resources and capacity to deal with this issue in isolation. Through global systems and processes such as the WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System and WHO Member State Mechanism,
translations.reference: Wannan ka iya haifar da mummunan tasiri a kan tsarin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa, wanda shi kuma zai taimaka wajen daina samar da magungunan da ƙarin kashe kuɗin ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da kuma tsarin lafiya na ƙasa. Wannan tasiri ka iya kaiwa ga marasa lafiya, a yayin da aka samu tarnaƙi wajen kaiwa wa ga ingantacce kuma amintaccen magani da rashin shugabanci mai nagarta da kuma rauni wajen amfani da fasaha. Kodayake wannan matsala ta shafi kafatanin ƙasashen duniya, to amma a ƙasashen da da suke da rauni ko rashin tsarin sa-ido, sun fi samun magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu. Sakamakon yadda duniya ke ci gaba da kasancewa tamkar ɗaya, babu wata ƙasa da ke da ƙarfin tattalin arzikin da za ta tunkari wannan matsalar ita kaɗai. Ta hanyar tsare-tsare na duniya da kuma hukumomi irin su Hukumar Sa-ido ta Hukumar Llafiya ta Duniya da kuma Kwamitin Mambobin ƙasashe na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya,

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Magance ƙunar-baƙin-wake/ksan-kai Sharhi: Fiye da mutane 700 000 ne suke rasa rayukansu a kowace shekara a sanadiyyar ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai. Bisa faruwar kowane ƙunar-baƙin-wake, akwai hasashen yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake fiye da 20. ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai kan iya aukuwa a kowane mataki na rayuwa, sannan kuma a kowane ɓangare na duniya. A 2019, ƙunar-baƙin-wake shi ne na huɗu a cikin abubuwan da suke haifar da mutuwa a tsakanin 'yan shekara 15-29 a duniya da kuma kaso 77% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai na faruwa ne a tsakanin ƙasashe masu mafi qaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga.

translations.source: Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies.
translations.reference: Kimanin kaso 20% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a duniya, na faruwa ne sakamakon shan guba bisa ra'in ƙashi-kai. A yayin da aka tabbatar da danganata ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai da yanayin matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa (Musamman damuwa da shan barasa ba tare da ƙaƙƙautawa ba) da kuma yunƙurin yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai a baya a ƙasashen da yawan kuɗin shiga, inda yawan yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ke faruwa a lokacin rigingimu. Abubuwan da ke haifar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai sun haɗa da karaya da damuwa da nuna bambanci da rabuwar wata alaƙa da matsalar kuɗi da matsanancin ciwo da cuta da keta haddi da rigingimu da sauran abubuwa da suka shafi keta haddin ɗan'adam. Matsalar yanayin hauka da na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai shi ne mutane suna yin tunanin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ba neman taimako ba. ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ko ƙoƙarin yin hakan yana da mummunan tasiri a kan iyalai da abokai da abokan aiki da al'umma gaba ɗaya.

Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Kusan kashi 20% na mutuwar kai-ma-kai a duniya ta faru ne sakamakon amfani da insecticides don kashe kansa.  Yayinda alaka tsakanin mutuwar kai-ma-kai da matsalar lafiya ta tunani (musamman cutar ta tashin hankali da kuma cutar da ta shaidar da jima'i) da kuma kokawar da aka yi ta kashe kansa ta kasance mai tabbaci a kasashe masu karin kudi, mutuwar kai-ma-kai da yawa na faruwa ne bisa son zuciya a lokacin rikici.  Wasu abubuwan da ke haifar da haɗin kai na mutuwar kai-ma-kai sun haɗa da faduwar wani abu, ɗauke da bakin ciki, ƙiyayya, rabuwar gida, matsalolin kudi, ciwon jiki mai tsanani da cuta, karfi, zalunci, da kuma rikici ko sauran harkokin jin kai.  Tabbas game da matsalar lafiya ta tunani da mutuwar kai-ma-kai na nuna cewa mutane da yawa da ke tunanin kashe kansu ba su nemi taimako ba. Mutuwar kai-ma-kai da kokawar kashe kansa suna da tasiri mai zurfi ga dangi, abokai, abokan aiki, al'umma da kuma jami'ai.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Suicide"**: I used "mutuwar kai-ma-kai" which literally means "death self-to-self." This is a common and accepted term in Hausa.
*   **"Pesticide self-poisoning"**:  Translated as "amfani da insecticides don kashe kansa" (use of insecticides to kill oneself).

*   **Borrowing:** I've used the English word "insecticides" as it's commonly understood, especially in discussions of this topic.  Creating a completely new Hausa word would be cumbersome.
*   **Clarity and Flow:** I've prioritized clarity and natural-sounding Hausa over a strictly literal translation.  Some phrases have been reordered slightly to improve readability.

translations.source: Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: Yunƙurin kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai na buƙatar haɗin-kai da haɗin gwiwa a tsakanin ɓangarori, waɗanda suka haɗa da ɓangaren lafiya da ilimi da ƙwadago da noma da kasuwanci da shari'a da doka da tsaro da siyasa da kuma kafafen watsa labarai. Ba kasafai ake kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai yadda ya kamata ba saboda damuwa da rashin wayar da kai, wanda shi ne babban ƙalubalen ɓangaren lafiya. Su ma al'ummomi suna da rawar da za su taka wajen kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai. Bayanan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yi wa al'ummomi jagoranci sun bayyana yadda al'ummomi za su gano abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci wajen aiwatar da aiwatar da su bisa ga kowace al'umma. Bayanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: An ba wa ƙoƙarin gaggauta kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai matuƙar fifiko.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Stigma"**:  The phrase "ƙarya da rashin sanin" (lying and lack of knowledge) is used to convey the meaning of stigma, as directly translating "stigma" can be difficult and less impactful in Hausa. It emphasizes the societal misunderstanding and negative perception surrounding suicide.
*   **"Community engagement toolkit"**: Translated as "Dokokin amace-amace da WHO ke yi da al'ummomi" (WHO's guidelines for engaging with communities).

translations.source: The reduction of suicide rates in countries is an indicator in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (the only indicator for mental health), WHO’s General Programme of Work and WHO’s Comprehensive Mental Health Action Plan 2013–2030. The first WHO world suicide report, Preventing suicide: a global imperative, published in 2014, aimed to increase awareness of the public health significance of suicide and suicide attempts and make suicide prevention a public health priority. Governments are encouraged to implement WHO’s LIVE LIFE package of effective and evidence-based key interventions for suicide prevention, and to develop or strengthen comprehensive national suicide prevention strategies in a multisectoral public health approach. National leadership and coordination on suicide prevention are further supported by the publication of National suicide prevention strategies: progress, examples and indicators. Recognizing that data and statistics are necessary for advocacy and decision-making, WHO published Suicide worldwide in 2019: Global Health Estimates.
translations.reference: Raguwar yawan aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a ƙasashe alama ce ta ayyukan Hukumar Ci-gaba ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya (alama ce kawai a ɓabgaren lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa) da Shirye-shiryen Ayyuka na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da kuma Shirin Samar da Wadatacciyar Lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa na 2013-2030. Rahoton Hukmar Lafiya ta Duniya a kan ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na farko ya nuna cewa, kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai: rahoton da aka buga a 2014 da manufar ƙara wayar da kai a kan muhimmancin inganta lafiyar al'umma wajen daƙile aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ko kuma yunƙurin yin hakan da kuma da ba wa kawar da aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai fifiko tamkar na kula da lafiyar al'umma. An ƙarfafar gwiyoyin gwamnatoci da su aiwatar da shirin Hukumar Lafiya na Rayuwa yadda ya kamata ta hanyar ɗaukar matakan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai da kuma samar da dabarun kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na ƙasa, ta hanyar dabarun kula da lafiya daban-daban. Ana ƙarfafar shugabannni da masu sa-ido a kan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ta hanyar buga rahotanni game da dabarun daƙile ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai, ta hanyar bayyana ci-gaban da aka samu da misalai da kuma alamomi. Sakamakon gamsuwa da muhimmancin da ke tattare da da bayanai da ƙididdiga wajen yanke shawara,Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta buga rahoto aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai a duniya a 2019: Hashen Lafiya na Duniya.

translations.source: WHO’s vision is a world where death by suicide is no longer a leading cause of death and where people who are attempting or thinking about suicide feel comfortable seeking help which is provided capably and respectfully to all.
translations.reference: Manufar Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ita ce, ya kasance ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ba ya cikin abubuwan da suke sabbaba mutuwa a duniya, sannan kuma da tallafa wa waɗanda suka yi yunƙurin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai.
translations.hypothesis:

**Explanation of Choices & Nuances:**

*   **Matsalcin WHO:** "WHO's vision" -  "Matsalci" translates to "vision" or "goal" in this context.
*   **mutuwar kanana:** "death by suicide" -  "Mutuwar kanana" is the standard Hausa term for suicide.

translations.source: Sustainable development Overview: Sustainable development is a broad term to describe policies, projects and investments that provide benefits today without sacrificing environmental, social and personal health in the future. These policies are often described as green because they focus on limiting the impact of development on the environment. However, the benefits of sustainable development are also felt across a wide cross section of human health and well-being, including reductions in pollution- and environment-related disease, improved health outcomes and decreased stress. As the threats of climate change become increasingly important, win-win strategies for mitigation, health improvement and cost savings offer a range of advantages for various stakeholders.
translations.reference: Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa ƙarin bayani: Ci-gaba mai ɗorewa kalmomin fannu ne da ke bayyana dokoki da shirue-shirye da saka hannun jari da zai kai ga samun riba a yanzu ba tare da baddala muhalli ko tsarin zamantakewa ko lafiya a nan gaba ba. Ana bayyana waɗannan dokoki da koraye, saboda suna mayar da hankali ne wajen taƙaita tasirin ci-gaba a kan muhalli. Sai dai an amfana da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa a ko'ina a duniya, wanda ya haɗa da kowane ɓangare na lafiya da jin daɗin ɗan'adam, kama daga raguwar yawan gurɓatar yanayi da cututtuka masu nasaba da muhalli da ingantuwar lafiyar da raguwar wahalhalu. A yayin da barazanar sauyawar yanayi ke da muhimmanci, dabarun samun nasara ta kowane ɓangare wajen magancewa da inganta lafiya da rage kashe kuɗi na da matuƙar muhimmanci ga masu ruwa da tsaki.

Kusan akwai irin wannan manufofin da ake kiranta da "mai duwa" saboda tana mai da hankali kan kawar da tasirin ci gaba kan muhalli. Duk da haka, amfanin ci gaba mai dace yana hasashen mutane da dama, gami da raguwar cutar da ke tasowa sakamakon zama a cikin muhalli, inganta kwarewar lafiya da raguwar damuwa. Yayin da barazanun canjin yanayi ke karɓuwa, hanyoyin da ke haɗa fa'ida, inganta lafiya da adana kudi suna ba da dama ga bambance-bambancen abokan tarayya.

translations.source: For example, greener health care operations can generate patient and worker health benefits while also saving energy, mitigating climate risks and creating long-term cost savings. The World Health Organization is committed to pursuing sustainable development in all its work to help protect the people of tomorrow from the health growing health risks of today. Impact: Many sustainable development strategies can offer significant wins for health, climate and the environment, and the benefits can be seen almost immediately. For example, many health and development goals can be achieved simultaneously by tackling air pollution, which is responsible for an estimated 7 million premature deaths annually. Polluting emissions include powerful short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—particularly black carbon, ozone and methane—which are very harmful to health but have only brief atmospheric lifetimes.
translations.reference: Alal misali, Shirin Lafiya na 'greener health care operations' zai samar da alfanu ga mara lafiya da ma'aikatan lafiya, da kuma rage amfani da makamashi, wanda shi kuma sauƙaƙa barazanar sauyin yanayi da kuma da kuma rage kashe kuɗi na tsawon lokaci. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta ƙudiri aniyar tabbatar da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa a duk wasu ayyuka da take aiwatarwa, domin taimakawa wajen kare mutane masu zuwa nan gaba daga barazanar lafiya da ake fuskanta a yanzu. Tasiri: Da dama daga cikin dabarun shirin ci-gaba mai ɗorewa za su matuƙar taimakawa wajen samuwar lafiya da sauyin yanayi da muhalli, sannan kuma za a ga kusan alfaninsu nan take. Alal misali, za a iya cim ma nasarar da dama daga cikin manufofin lafiya da na ci-gaba a lokaci guda, ta hanyar shawo kan matsalar gurɓatar iska, wadda ita ta yi silar kimanin mace-mace milyan 7 duk shekara. Abubuwan da suke cikin gurɓatacciyar iska sun haɗa da abubuwa masu ƙarfi da ka iya ɗumama yanayi, musamman ma kabon da ozon da kuma mesan, waɗanda suke cutar da lafiya, amma kuma ba su fiye daɗewa ba.

Kungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (World Health Organization) na yiwa kaƙan yawa don ci gaba da aikin ci gaba mai dacewa da muhittacin kasa a dukkan aikinta don taimaka wa kare mutanen gobe daga haɓaka barazban lafiya da ke faruwa yau. translations.source: Transport policies and investments that favour clean public transport, along with walking and cycling, can have a dramatic impact on air quality. This can reduce multiple health risks at the same time, including stroke, heart attack, lung disease and some cancers. They can also reduce the estimated 1.25 million deaths annually from traffic injury, while also improving access to health services, particularly in densely populated areas. Sustainable development housing policies can further reduce emissions through considerations such as building siting and land use, choices of construction materials, design features and ventilation and energy. WHO response: WHO’s work is guided by the Sustainable Development Goals, particularly Goal 3: “Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.”
translations.reference: Dokokin sufuri da zuba hannun jarin da ka iya tsaftace hanyoyin sufurin jama'a da kuma tafiyar ƙasa da tuƙa keke na da matuƙar tasiri a kan ingancin iska. Wannan zai taƙaita barazana iri-iri ga lafiya, wanda ya haɗa da shayenwar ɓarin jiki da ciwon zuciya da cututtukan hunhu da kuma kansa. Haka kuma za su iya rage kimanin mace-mace miliyan 1.25 sanadiyyar samun rauni a duk shekara, yayin da kuma za su inganta kaiwa ga kula da lafiya, musamman a wuraren da suke da yawan jama'a. Dokokin Shirin Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa na samar da gidaje zai ƙara rage ƙura ta hanyar gine-gine da amfani da filaye da zaɓar kayan gini da tsari da kuma samar da gine-gine na yalwar iska da kuma makamashi. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Aikace-aikacen Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na tafiya ne bisa manufar Shirin Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa, musamman ma manufar ta 3: '' Tabbatar da lafiyar mutane da ƙaruwar walwalar kowa da kowa''.

translations.source: The Goals inform projects and policies across the Organization, including guidelines on housing, urban development, transportation systems and health care delivery. For example, the WHO Housing and health guidelines, first published in 2018, highlight the increasing impact of housing conditions on human health in light of urban growth, climate and demographic changes. The guidelines provide Member States, partners and the public with evidence-based recommendations relevant to inadequate living space (crowding), low and high indoor temperatures, injury hazards in the home, and accessibility of housing for people with functional impairments. The Urban Health Initiative (UHI) also focuses on ways for cities to enable good health by catalysing effective action on urban air pollution and short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—saving lives by linking health, environment and sustainable development. WHO also collaborates with the Climate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) on the Breathe Life campaign, which aims to cut air pollution and reduce the 7 million premature deaths annually that it causes.
translations.reference: Manufofin na shelanta shiye-shirye da dokoki a hukumar, waɗanda suka haɗa da dokokin gina gidaje da gina birane da tsarin sufuri da samar da kulawa da lafiya. Alal misali, dokokin gina gidaje da kula lafiya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da aka fara bugawa a 2018, sun yi ƙarin haske a kan ƙaruwar tasirin yanayin gidaje a kan lafiyar mutum a yayin da birane suka bunƙasa, inda sauyin yanayi da yawan jama'a ke sauyawa. Dokokin sun ba wa mambobin ƙasashe da abokan hulɗa da sauran jama'a shawarwari da ke da nasaba da cunkoso da haɗarin cikin gida da kuma samar da gidaje ga mutanen da ke da tawaya. Shi ma Shirin Lafiya a Birane ya mayar da hanakali ne wajen samar da cikakkiyar lafiya a birane, ta hanyar gaggauta ɗaukar matakai a kan guɓacewar iska a birane da kuma abubuwan da ke haifar da ɗumamar yanayi, domin ceto rayuka masu matsalar lafiya da muhalli da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa. Haka kuma Hukumar Lafiya ta yi haɗin gwiwa da Gamayyar ƙungiyar Kula da Sauyin Yanayi da Iska Mai kyau wajen wayar da kai a kan sheƙar numfashi domin rayuwa, wanda manufarsa ita ce kawo ƙarshen gurɓacewar iska da rage mace-macen mutane miliyan 7 da ke haifarwa a duk shekara.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English document. I've aimed for clarity and accuracy, keeping in mind the context of health and development.  I've also included some notes after the translation explaining some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Muna da burin da ke ba da umurnin ayyukan da kuma manufofin a duk fannin Kungiyar, gami da umarnin gida, ci gaban birane, tsarin jigilar abokai, da kuma yadda ake bayar da hidimomin lafiya. Alalokacin da, Dokokin WHO kan gida da lafiya, da aka buga na farko a shekarar 2018, sun nuna yawan tasirin yanayin gidaje akan lafiyar mutane dangana da karuwar birane, canjin yanayi, da canjin yawan jama'a. Dokokin sun ba da shawara bisa ga shaidu ga kasashe mambobi, abokan tarayya, da kuma jama'a, dangane da matsalar wurin zama mara isa (cunkuluwa), tsabar zafin jiki da sanyi, haɗin gaske a gida, da kuma samun isassun hanyoyin shiga gida ga mutanen da ke da ƙuntawar aikin jiki.  Ƙungiyar Kula da Lafiyar Birane (UHI) kuma tana mai da hankali kan hanyoyin da biranen keɓaɓɓuƙa don ƙara lafiya ta hanyar haɓaka ayyukan da suka dace akan cutar da iskar ruwa a birane da kuma iskar ruwan kasa mai saurin canji (SLCPs) – wacce ke ceton rayuka ta hanyar haɗin lafiya, muhittaci, da kuma ci gaban dace. WHO kuma tana hada kai da Kungiyar Isarar Iskar Ruwa da Tsafta (CCAC) akan yakin neman 'Breathe Life', wanda ke da niyyar kawar da cutar da iskar ruwa da kuma rage mutuwar da ke faruwa a gaba a kowace shekara, mutane miliyan 7 da cutar ke yiwa.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Goals"**: Translated as "Muna da burin" (We have goals/objectives). This is a common and natural way to express this concept in Hausa.
*   **"Organization"**: Translated as "Kungiyar" (The Organization).
*   **"Guidelines"**: Translated as "Umarnin/Dokokin" (Instructions/Guidelines). I used both depending on the context to ensure clarity.
*   **"Member States"**: Translated as "Kasashe mambobi" (Member countries).
*   **"Partners"**: Translated as "Abokan tarayya" (Partner countries/entities).
*   **"Evidence-based recommendations"**: Translated as "Shawara bisa ga shaidu" (Recommendations based on evidence).
*   **"Inadequate living space (crowding)"**: Translated as "Matsalar wurin zama mara isa (cunkuluwa)" (Problem of insufficient living space (crowding)). I included "cunkuluwa" in parentheses to provide a more specific term for crowding.
*   **"Functional impairments"**: Translated as "Ƙuntawar aikin jiki" (Restriction of bodily function).
*   **"Urban Health Initiative (UHI)"**: I kept the abbreviation (UHI) as it is common practice to retain acronyms, especially in technical contexts.  I also provided the full translation: "Ƙungiyar Kula da Lafiyar Birane".
*   **"Short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)"**: Similar to UHI, I kept the abbreviation (SLCPs) and provided the full translation: "Iskar ruwan kasa mai saurin canji".
*   **"Breathe Life campaign"**: I kept the name "Breathe Life" as it is a specific campaign name.
*   **"Premature deaths"**: Translated as "Mutuwar da ke faruwa a gaba" (Deaths that occur prematurely).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Hausa has a rich vocabulary, but sometimes direct translations don't capture the intended meaning. I've tried to prioritize conveying the *meaning* over a literal word-for-word translation.
*   **Terminology:**  Technical terms can be challenging. I've used established Hausa terms where possible, but in some cases, I've provided explanations or used a combination of Hausa and English to ensure understanding.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with expertise in health and development to ensure accuracy and naturalness.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: Syphilis Overview: Syphilis is a bacterial sexually transmitted infection (STI) caused by Treponema pallidum which results in substantial morbidity and mortality, and it is curable. Syphilis is transmitted through sexual contact with the infectious lesions, via blood transfusion or from a pregnant woman to her fetus. Mother-to-child transmission of syphilis is usually devastating to the fetus in cases that were not detected or treated sufficiently early in pregnancy. Maternal syphilis, when untreated, treated late or not treated with penicillin, results in adverse birth outcomes (ABOs) estimated in 50−80% of cases, depending on the stage of syphilis.
translations.reference: Tinjere ƙarin bayani: Tinjere cuta ce da ake ɗauka yayin saduwar namiji da mace sakamakon ƙwayar cuta, wadda ke haifar da rashin lafiya da kuma mutuwa, amma ana iya warkewa. Tinjere cuta ce da ke yaxuwa a yayin jima'i, inda ake ɗaukar cuta kuma take yaɗuwa ko dai ta hanyar jin ko kuma daga uwa mai ciki zuwa jaririn da ke cikinta. Yaɗuwar cutar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri yawanci yana kassara jaririn, musamman idan ba a gano ba ko kuma an ɗauki mataki a farkon juna-biyun. Idan ba a yi maganin yaɗuwar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri ko ba a yi magani da wuri ba ko ma ba a yi maganinta da fenisilin, tana haifar da matsala yayin haihuwa da kimanin kaso 50-80, ya danganta da matakin cutar ta tinjere.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Bincike game da Cutar Syphilis:** Cutar Syphilis wata cuta ce ta kwayoyin halitta da ke kasawa ta hanyar jima'i (STI) wanda ta haifar da cutewa da mutuwar yawa, kuma tana da magani. Cutar Syphilis ta yadu ta hanyar samun tuntuwa jima'i da ƙwayoyin cuta, ta hanyar jinsan jini ko kuma daga mace mai juna biyu zuwa ga jarinta. Yaduwar cutar Syphilis daga mahaifa zuwa ga yaro yawanci na cutar da jariri idan ba a gano cutar ba ko ba a yi magani da sauri sosai a lokacin tsohon juna biyu. Cutar Syphilis a mata, idan ba a yi magani ba, an yi magani ne a karshe ko kuma ba a yi magani da penicillin, na haifar da sakamakon haihuwa mara kyau (ABO) a kusan kashi 50-80 na al'amura, dangana da matakin cutar Syphilis.

**Explanation of Choices & Key Terms:**

*   **Bincike game da...:** "Overview" is translated as "Bincike game da..." which means "Investigation about..." or "Information about..." It's a common way to introduce a topic.
*   **Cutar Syphilis:**  We keep "Syphilis" as "Syphilis" as it's a recognized medical term.  Adding "Cutar" means "The disease of..."
*   **Wata cuta ce ta kwayoyin halitta:** "Is a bacterial infection" is translated as "Wata cuta ce ta kwayoyin halitta" which means "It is a disease of microorganisms."
*   **Jima'i (STI):** "Sexually transmitted infection" is translated as "Jima'i (STI)."  Using the abbreviation "STI" in parentheses is helpful as it's becoming increasingly recognized.
*   **Ƙwayoyin cuta:** "Infectious lesions" is translated as "Ƙwayoyin cuta" which means "Disease particles/agents."
*   **Jinsan jini:** "Blood transfusion" is translated as "Jinsan jini" which means "Transferring of blood."
*   **Mace mai juna biyu:** "Pregnant woman" is translated as "Mace mai juna biyu" which means "Woman with a fetus."
*   **Jarinta:** "Her fetus" is translated as "Jarinta" which means "Her child/baby."
*   **Yaduwar cutar Syphilis daga mahaifa zuwa ga yaro:** "Mother-to-child transmission of syphilis" is translated as "Yaduwar cutar Syphilis daga mahaifa zuwa ga yaro" which means "The spread of Syphilis disease from mother to child."
*   **Sakamakon haihuwa mara kyau (ABO):** "Adverse birth outcomes (ABOs)" is translated as "Sakamakon haihuwa mara kyau (ABO)."  Keeping the abbreviation "ABO" in parentheses is helpful.
*   **Dangana da matakin cutar Syphilis:** "Depending on the stage of syphilis" is translated as "Dangana da matakin cutar Syphilis" which means "Depending on the level/stage of Syphilis disease."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Medical Terminology:**  Hausa medical terminology can be limited.  Sometimes, it's necessary to use a combination of Hausa and English terms (as I've done with "STI" and "ABO") to ensure clarity.
*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific audience.  If this is for healthcare professionals, more technical terms might be appropriate. If it's for the general public, simpler language is better.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with medical knowledge to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: These ABOs are often severe and include stillbirth (most commonly), neonatal death, prematurity, low birth weight, and congenitally infected infants. Syphilis can be prevented through safer sex practices including the correct and consistent use of condoms. Many people with syphilis do not have any symptoms or have only minor symptoms that go unnoticed. Identifying infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes including congenital syphilis. Screening can be done using rapid tests that can provide results in less than 20 minutes, allowing for immediate treatment.
translations.reference: Wannan sakamako yawanci yakan tsananta, sannan kuma ya haɗa da jariran da ke mutuwa yayin haihuwa (wanda ya fi yawa) da mutuwa bayan haihuwa da kafin balaga da rashin nauyin jariri da kuma jariran da suka ɗauki cuta daga uwa. Za a iya maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin taka-tsantsan wajen yin jima'i, wanda ya haɗa da yawan yin amfani da kwaroron roba. Mutane da dama da suka kamu da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamu. Tabbatar da cuta ta hanyar yin gwaji da kuma yin magana zai hana yaɗuwarta da kuma haifar da matsala a yayin haihuwa, wanda ya haɗa da nau'in tinjere da jariri ke ɗauka daga uwa. Za a iya tabbatarwa ta hanyar yawaita yin gwaje-gwaje da za su bayar da sakamako a ƙasa da minti 20, domin yin magani nan take.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a public health context:

**Hausa Translation:**

Waɗannan ABŌs suna da sauki sosai kuma har da mutuwar ciki (mafi yawan lokaci), mutuwar jarirai sabobin haihuwa, haihuwa da kyar, ƙarancin nauyin juna biyu, da jarirai da suka kamu da cuta tun a ciki. Cutar syphilis na iya hana ta ta hanyar amsar jima'i mai aminći, gami da amsar daidai da kuma amsar daƙi-daƙi na kondom. Mutanen da dama da ke da cutar syphilis ba sa da alama ko kuma suna da alama kadan da ba a lura da su. Tabbacin cutar ta hanyar gwajin dangi da kuma maganin mutanen da suka fiye da cuta zai hana yaduwar cutar da kuma sakamakon cutar da ke faruwa a lokacin juna biyu, gami da cutar syphilis da ta haihu. Za'a iya bincika ta ta amfani da gwaje-gwaje masu sauri waɗanda za su ba da sakamakon a ƙarƙashin minti 20, waɗanda ke ba da izinin magani nan da nan.

translations.source: When untreated, syphilis lasts many years and goes through different stages. Treatment for syphilis is done with injectable penicillin benzathine, with 1 to 3 doses depending on the stage of the disease. Only penicillin can prevent congenital syphilis. Treatment with penicillin has been hampered by periodic and prolonged shortages of benzathine penicillin in numerous countries, including high-, low- and middle-income countries. Symptoms: Many people with syphilis do not present symptoms or do not perceive them.
translations.reference: Ida ba a ɗauKi mataki, tinjere kan ɗauki shekaru a jikin mutum, ta hanyar kaiwa matakai daban-daban. Ana maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin allurar fenicilin sau 1 zuwa 3, ya danganta da matakin cutar. Fenicilin ne kawai yake maganin tinjeren da ake ɗauka daga uwa zuwa yaro. Yin magani da fenicilin ya samu tsaiko sakamakon rashin fenicilin benzatayin na tsawon lokaci a ƙasashe da dama, waɗanda suka haɗa da ƙasashe masu yawa da ƙaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga. Alamomi: Mutane da dama da ke fama da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamomi.

translations.source: Untreated, syphilis lasts many years and is characterized into different stages. Sexual transmission typically occurs during early stages, i.e., up to 2 years after infection. During the initial phase (primary syphilis), which lasts on average 21 days, a solitary, painless, usually hard and round sore (chancre) appears at the site of inoculation (contact), often in the vagina, penis or anus (but it may also be extra-genital) and may go unnoticed. The chancre heals with or without treatment within 3 to 10 weeks. If untreated, the disease progresses to the secondary stage.
translations.reference: Cutar tinjeren da ba yi mata magani ba takan ɗauki shekaru a jikin mutum, inda take xaukar matakai daban-daban. Cutar tana yaxuwa ta hanyar jima'i a mataki farko, wato kusan shekar 2 bayan kawuwa da cutar. A matakin farko, wanda yake ɗaukar kwana 21, inda ita kaɗai kuma mara zafi, wurin kan kawashe yawanci a farji ko zakari ko kuma takashi (ko kuma gaba ɗaya), sannan kuma za a iya kasa gane ta. Ciwon ka iya warkewa ba tare da magani ba a cikin mako 2 zuwa 10. Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar kan ƙara gaba zuwa wani mataki.

translations.source: Secondary syphilis is characterized by a rash that can vary widely and mimic other infectious or non-infectious conditions, but characteristically affects the palms and soles. The rash is non-itchy and can be minimal enough to be overlooked. In warm and moist areas of the body, such as the anus and labia, large white or grey raised lesions may develop at the location of the primary chancre (condyloma lata). The symptoms and signs of secondary syphilis spontaneously resolve, even without treatment. Without treatment, the latent stage starts.
translations.reference: Cutar tinjere nau'i na biyu na siffantauwa ne da fitowar ƙuraje, waɗanda suka bambanta, sannan su haifar da cututtuka masu yaɗuwa ko marasa yaɗuwa, amma yawanci suna shafar tafin hannu da na ƙafa. ƙurajen ba masu ƙaƙayi ba ne, inda za a iya watsi da su. A sassan jikin da suke da lema ko danshi kamar takashi da leɓe, wani farin abu ko ruwan ƙasa kan fito a wurin da ciwon asali yake. Alamomin nau'in tinjere na biyu kan iya ɓacewa, ba tare da magani ba. Idan ba a ɗauki mataki ba, yanayin iya ci gaba.

**Hausa Translation:**

Cutarsa ta kwayar cutar sukiri mai tsanani (secondary syphilis) ta hasa da zazzafar jini (rash) wanda na iya bambanta sosai kuma ya kama irin cuta ko rashin lafiya da sauran su, amma ta bambanta ta tasowa a ƙarƙuzu da ƙafa. Zazzafar jini na ba da ƙarfi (non-itchy) kuma na iya zama ƙanƙanta sosai har an rasa. A sassan jiki da suke zafi da danshi, kamar anus da labia, ƙamusassun launin ɓoye ko abu mai launin kasa mai haɓaka na iya bayyana a wurin zazzafar farko (condyloma lata). Alamomin da kuma abubuwan da ke nuna cutar sukiri mai tsanani suna kawarmawa ne ba tare da magani ba, ko ma da kansu. Idan ba a yi magani ba, matakin ɓoye (latent stage) ya fara.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Secondary syphilis"**: Translated as "Cutarsa ta kwayar cutar sukiri mai tsanani".  "Cutarsa" means "its infection," "kwayar cutar sukiri" means "syphilis bacteria/germ," and "mai tsanani" means "secondary/severe." This is a common and understandable way to refer to it in Hausa medical contexts.
*   **"Rash"**: Translated as "zazzafar jini." This is the standard Hausa term for a skin rash.
*   **"Mimic other infectious or non-infectious conditions"**: Translated as "ya kama irin cuta ko rashin lafiya da sauran su." This conveys the idea of resembling or imitating other conditions.
*   **"Palms and soles"**: Translated as "ƙarƙuzu da ƙafa."  Direct translations of these body parts.

*   **"Anus and labia"**: Translated as "anus da labia."  These terms are often borrowed directly into Hausa medical language.

*   **"Primary chancre (condyloma lata)"**: Translated as "zazzafar farko (condyloma lata)." "Zazzafar farko" means "first rash/sore."  "Condyloma lata" is often kept in English/Latin as it's a specific medical term.
*   **"Spontaneously resolve"**: Translated as "suna kawarmawa ne ba tare da magani ba, ko ma da kansu." This means "they disappear without treatment, even on their own."

translations.source: Latent syphilis presents no clinical symptoms or signs and the treatment is different from the early phase. After years or decades without treatment, neurological and cardiovascular diseases among others may occur. Treatment: Syphilis diagnosis is based on the person’s history, physical examination, laboratory testing and sometimes radiology, as symptoms are not common or noticeable. Identifying asymptomatic infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes, including congenital syphilis. Laboratory tests for syphilis include direct detection of T. pallidum or indirect methods such as serology.
translations.reference: Irin wannan yanayi na cutar tinjere ba shi da wasu alamomi, sannan maganinsa ya bambanta da na lokacin da ya fara. Idan aka ɗauki shekaru ba tare da yin magani ba, yakan haifar da matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa da shanyewar ɓarin jiki da sauransu. Magani: Maganin cutar tinjere ya danganta ne da tarihin mutum da kallon sa a zahiri da gwaji da kuma ɗaukar hoto a wasu lokutan, domin kuwa alamomin ba ɗaya ba ne ko muma ba a gane su. Gano cuta ta hanyar gwaji da kuma yin magani zai hana yaɗuwar cutar da kuma haifar da mutuwar jariri a yayin haihuwa, wanda ya haɗa da nau'in tinjeren da ake ɗauka a yayin haihuwa. Gwajin cutar tinjere ya qunshi gano wurin kai-tsaye ko kuma ta hanyar kaikaice, wadda ta haɗa da ɗaukar jini.

translations.source: Rapid screening and diagnostic tests are also available and can provide results in less than 20 minutes, facilitating immediate treatment initiation. WHO recommends syphilis to be treated with injectable penicillin (benzathine penicillin G) with 1 or 3 doses, depending on the stage of the disease. WHO has detailed treatment guidelines for syphilis, and one specifically for the screening and treatment of syphilis in pregnancy. Congenital syphilis There are currently no diagnostic tests for congenital syphilis.
translations.reference: Yawan dubawa da kuma gwaji shi ma ka iya ba da sakamako a ƙasa da minti 20, wanda hakan kan taimaka wajen yin magani nan take a farkon cutar. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da yin maganin tinjere ta amfani da allurar fenicilin, ta hanyar yin allura biyu zuwa 3, ya danganta da matakin cutar. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta ƙarin bayani game da matakan magance cutar tinjere, inda ta fayyace wanda za a duba da kuma maganin tinjere a yayin da ake da juna biyu. Cutar tinjeren da ake ɗauka yayin haihuwa A yanzu babu wani gwaji na cutar tinjere da ake ɗauka a yayin haihuwa.

WHO ta bayyana cewa cutar syphilis ya kamata a yi mata jiyya da penicillin mai shafin allura (benzathine penicillin G) da daya ko uku, ya danganta da matakin cutar. WHO ta shirya takardun jagorancin jiyya game da syphilis, kuma daya musamman don binciken da kuma jiyyar syphilis a lokacin juna biyu. translations.source: All live or stillborn infants of women with syphilis should be examined for evidence of congenital syphilis. Live-born infants should be examined and tested at birth to define treatment requirement. When indicated, also at monthly intervals for 3 months until the infant’s serology are, and remain, negative, as maternal antibodies can be passively transmitted to the baby during pregnancy.
translations.reference: Duk rayayyun jarirai da waɗanda suka mutu yayin haihuwa sakamakon cutar tinjere ya kamata duba su ko suna da cutar da ake ɗauka yayin haihuwa. Ya kamata a duba tare da gwajin jariran da suke raye a yayin da aka haife su domin fayyace irin maganin da suke buƙata. A yayin da aka tabbatar da cutar, ya kamata duk bayan wata 3 a riƙa ɗaukar jini , sannan a uwar za ta ci gaba da shan magunguna a lokacin da take da juna har sai cutar ta tafi.

translations.source: Taeniasis and cysticercosis Overview: Infection with the tapeworm Taenia solium can result in two distinct conditions: taeniasis and cysticercosis. Taeniasis is the intestinal infection with the tapeworm and it occurs when a person eats raw or undercooked, infected pork. Taeniasis has no major impact on human health. However, tapeworm eggs pass in the faeces of the tapeworm carrier and in the absence of a proper sanitation may contaminate the environment.
translations.reference: Cutar dauɗar ciki da ta cushewar ciki ƙarin bayani: cutar dauɗar ciki na samuwa ne sakamakon abubuwa guda biyu mabambanta: cushewar ciki da cushewar hanji. Cushewar hanji cuta ce ta dauɗar ciki, wadda take samuwa a laokacin da mutum ya ci zallar naman alade ko wanda ba a dafa ko kuma naman aladen da ke da cuta. Cutar cushewar ciki ba ta da wani tasiri a kan lafiya. Sai dai kashin mai dauɗar ciki wanda ba a tsafatace ba ka iya gurɓata muhalli.

Taeniasis ba ya yi tasiri mai yawa akan lafiyar mutane. Duk da haka, junaɓuwar naman baka na fitowa a cikin danyen mutum, kuma a cikin rashin tsaftar muhalli mai kyau, na iya cutar da yanayin.

translations.source: While tapeworm eggs are infective for pigs, T. solium eggs may also infect humans if they are ingested by a person (via the fecal-oral route, or by ingesting contaminated food or water). Ingestion of tapeworm eggs causes infection with the larval parasite in the tissues such as muscles, skin, eyes and the central nervous system (human cysticercosis), with possible devastating effects on health. When cysts develop in the brain, the condition is referred to as neurocysticercosis. Symptoms: Taeniasis is usually characterized by mild and non-specific symptoms associated to an intestinal infection (abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhoea, etc.). These symptoms may continue until the tapeworm dies following treatment, otherwise it may live for years.
translations.reference: A yayin da ƙwayaƙwan mcijin ciki ba sa yi wa alade komai, T. solium eggs ka iya illata ɗan'adam, idan mutum bai haɗiyu ba ( ta hanyar baki ko gurɓataccen abinci ko ruwan sha). Rashin narkewar tsutsar jiki na haifar da cuta, inda za samu a cuta a sassan jiki kamar tsokar jiki da fata da idanu da kuma ƙwaƙwalwa, wanda hakan ka iya cutar da lafiya. A yayin da aka samu kumburi a ƙwaƙwalwa, ana kiran wannan yanayi da kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa,. Alamomi: Dauɗar ciki yawanci tana siffantuwa ne da rashin wasu tsayayyun alamomi waɗanda za a iya dangantawa da cutar hanji (ciwon ciki da jin amai da gudawa da sauransu). Waɗannan alamomi za su iya ci gaba har sai tsutsar ta mutu sakamakon shan magani, ko kuma ta ci gaba da rayuwa tsawon shekaru.

translations.source: For cysticercosis, the incubation period is variable, and infected people may remain asymptomatic for years. In some endemic regions, infected people may develop visible or palpable nodules (a small solid bump or node which is solid that can be detected by touch) beneath the skin. Neurocysticercosis is associated with a variety of signs and symptoms depending on the number, size, stage and location of the pathological changes as well as the host’s immune response and the parasite’s genotype, but it can also be clinically asymptomatic. Symptoms may include chronic headaches, blindness, seizures (epilepsy if they are recurrent), hydrocephalus, meningitis, dementia and symptoms caused by lesions occupying spaces of the central nervous system. Treatment: The treatment of taeniasis by Taenia solium is important to prevent neurocysticercosis and as a tool to assist in controlling or stopping the parasite transmission cycle.
translations.reference: Game da cutar cushewar ciki, lokacin yin ƙyanƙyansa kan bambanta, sannan kuma masu fama da matsalar za su ci gaba da kasancewa ba tare da wata alama ba tsawon shekaru. A wasu wuraren da suka fama da annoba, waɗanda suka kamu ka iya siffantuwa da wasu abubuwa da za a iya gani (abun da za iya taɓawa) a ƙasan fata. Kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na bayyan ne da alamomi iri-iri, ya danganta ga da adadi da girma da mataki da kuma wurin da cutar ta fito da kuma yadda garkuwar jiki ta bayar da kariya da ƙwayar halittar mai cutar, sai dai za ta iya kasancewa ba ta nuna wata alama ba. Alamomin wannan cuta za su iya kasncewa matsanancin ciwo kai da makanta da farfaɗiya da taruwar ruwa a ƙwaƙwalwa da zazzaɓi da cutar mantuwa da kum sauran alamomin da raunin ya fito a ƙwaƙwalwa ya haifar. Magani: Maganin dauɗar ciki na da muhimmanci wajen hana aukuwar cutar kumburi da jan ruwan ƙwaƙwalwa a matasayin wata hanya ta hana ko tsakayar da hana yaɗuwar ƙwayoyin cuta.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices.

**Hausa Translation:**

Game da cutar cysticercosis, tsawon lokacin da cutar ke haɓaka na iya bambanta, kuma mutanen da suka kamu da cutar na iya kasancewa ba su da alamun cuta (asymptomatic) shekaru da dama. A wasu yankuna inda cutar ta yi yawa, mutanen da suka kamu da cutar na iya haɓaka ƙwayoyin gani ko na iya ji (ƙananan haɓɓakawa mai ɗaɗi ko ƙwaya mai ɗaɗi da za'a iya gano ta taɓawa) ƙarƙashin fata. Neurocysticercosis yana da alaka da hanyoyin alamun jiki da cuta iri-iri, dangana da adadi, girma, mataki da wurin canje-canjen cuta, da kuma amsar jikin mai cuta da nau'in parasite, amma kuma yana iya zama ba da alama a gani (clinically asymptomatic). Alamun cuta na iya haɗawa da ciwon kai na dogon lokaci, lalɓaɓɓen idanu, haɓakar fitsari (ƙwayoyin fitsari idan sun sake faruwa), hydrocephalus, meningitis, dementia, da alamaun cuta da ke fitowa sakamakon haɓɓakawa a cikin tsarin haɓakar jiki. Magani: Magance cutar taeniasis ta Taenia solium yana da mahimmanci don hana neurocysticercosis kuma a matsayin kayan aiki don taimaka wajan sarrafa ko dakatar da tsarin yaduwar cutar.

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Cysticercosis" and "Neurocysticercosis":** I've kept these terms as they are, as they are medical terms and often adopted directly into Hausa.  Using a Hausa equivalent might be confusing.
*   **"Incubation Period":** Translated as "tsawon lokacin da cutar ke haɓaka" (the length of time the disease develops). This is a common way to express this concept in Hausa.
*   **"Asymptomatic":** Translated as "ba su da alamun cuta." This is a direct and understandable translation.
*   **"Endemic Regions":** Translated as "yankuna inda cutar ta yi yawa" (regions where the disease is prevalent).
*   **"Visible or Palpable Nodules":** Translated as "ƙwayoyin gani ko na iya ji."  "Ƙwayoyin gani" means visible and "na iya ji" means palpable.  The description of the nodules is included in parentheses for clarity.
*   **"Signs and Symptoms":** Translated as "hanyoyin alamun jiki da cuta iri-iri" (various bodily signs and disease types).
*   **"Recurrent":** Translated as "sake faruwa" (happening again).

translations.source: The treatment can be done on an individual bases, or as Mass Drug Administration depending on the local circumstances and the control approaches being implemented. Taeniasis can be treated using anthelmintics (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). In neurocysticercosis, since the destruction of cysts may lead to an inflammatory response, specialised treatment of active disease is required and may include long courses with high doses of anthelmintic, as well as supporting therapy with corticosteroids and/or anti-epileptic drugs, and possibly surgery. The dosage and the duration of treatment can vary greatly and depend mainly on the number, size, location and developmental stage of the cysts, their surrounding inflammatory edema, acuteness and severity of clinical symptoms or signs.
translations.reference: Za a iya yin magani dangane da yanayin mutane daban-daban ko ta yawan shan magani bisa ga yanayi wuri da kuma hanyar dakatar da yaɗuwar cutar da ka yi amfani da ita. za a iya maganin cutar dauɗar ciki ta hanyar amfani da maganin macijin ciki. Game da matsalar kumburi da jan ruwan ƙwaƙwalwa, fashewar ruwan kan iya yi zafi, ana buƙatar magani cuta na musamman, wanda ka iya ɗaukar matakai masu tsayi da kuma shan maganin macijin ciki ko allura mai yawa da kuma sauran magungunan farfaɗiya da kuma yuwuwar yin aiki. Yawan magani da tsawon lokacin da za a ɗauka ana sha ya danganta da adadi da girma da wuri da kuma matakin kumburin da zafin kumburin da tsininsa da tsananinsa da kuma alamominsa.

translations.source: Tetanus Overview: Tetanus is a serious illness contracted through exposure to the spores of the bacterium, Clostridium tetani, which live in soil, saliva, dust and manure. The bacteria can enter the body through a deep cuts, wounds or burns affecting the nervous system. The infection leads to painful muscle contractions, particularly of the jaw and neck muscle, and is commonly known as “lockjaw”. People of all ages can get tetanus but the disease is particularly common and serious in newborn babies and their mothers when the mother is unprotected from tetanus by the vaccine, tetanus toxoid.
translations.reference: Cutar tetanos ƙarin bayan: Ttetanos babbar cuta ce da ake ɗauka daga wasu ƙwayoyin halitta da ke rayuwa a cikin ƙasa da yawu da kuma taki. ƙwayar halittar na shiga jikin mutum ne ta hanyar wani yanka mai zurfi ko ciwo ko ƙonuwa da yake shafar ƙwaƙwalwa. Cutar kan haifar da ciwo a jiki, musamman muƙamuƙi da wuya, wanda aka fi sani da lockjaw. Kowane rukuni na mutane ka iya kamuwa da cutar tetanos, to amma cutar ta fi yawa da tsanani ga jariari da iyayensu, a yayin da uwar ba ta samu kari daga cutar ba ta hanyar allura,.

Kwayar cuta na iya shiga jiki ta hanyar raunuka mai zurfi, ƙuraɓe ko ƙonƙwarawa waɗanda ke shafar tsarin haɓakar jiki. Cutar ta haifar da tsananin zubar da ƙungiya a jiki, musamman a rafin baki da ƙungiyar wuya, kuma ana kiran ta da “ƙulla rafi” (lockjaw). Mutane na duk shekaru za su iya kamuwa da tetanus, amma cutar ta fi kasawa da tsanowar a jarana mazaɓen kasa da mahaifansu lokacin da mahaifin bai yi kariya daga cutar ta alloli (tetanus vaccine) ko tetanus toxoid ba.

translations.source: Tetanus occurring during pregnancy or within 6 weeks of the end of pregnancy is called maternal tetanus, while tetanus occurring within the first 28 days of life is called neonatal tetanus. The disease remains an important public health problem in many parts of the world, but especially in low-income countries or districts, where immunization coverage is low and unclean birth practices are common. WHO estimates that in 2018 (the latest year for which estimates are available), 25 000 newborns died from neonatal tetanus, 88% reduction from the situation in 2000. Symptoms: Nearly all cases of tetanus occur in people who have never been vaccinated or in adults who have not kept up to date on their booster shots. Signs and symptoms of tetanus appear anytime from 3 to 21 days after tetanus bacteria enter the body through a wound.
translations.reference: Cutar tetanos da ta kama mai juna biya ko kuma mako 6 kafin haihuwa ana kiran ta da cutar tetano ta uwa, yayin da wadda yaro ya kamu da ita a lokacin da yake da kawana 28 ana kiran ta da tetanos ta lokacin haihuwa. Cutar tetanos na ɗaya daga cikin manyan cututtuka da ke addabar sassa daban-daban na duniya, musamman ƙasashe mara arziki, inda ba a samun wadatar kulawa da garkuwr jiki da yawan al'adun rashin zabta a yayin haihuwa. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta yi sashe a 2018 cewa (wadda ita ce shekara mafi ƙaranci da aka yi hasashen), kimanin jarirai 25,000 ne ke mutuwa bayan haihuwarsu sakamakon cutar tetanos, inda aka samu raguwar kaso 88% a 2000. Alamomi: Kusan dukkan matsalar cutar tetabos na furuwa ne ga mutanen da ba taɓa yi musu allura ko manyan da ba su sake yin allura bayan wadda suka yi a baya. Alamomin cutar tetanos kan iya bayyana kowane lokaci daga kwana 3 zuwa 21 da shigar ƙwayar cutar jikin mutum ta hanyar rauni da ya ji .

translations.source: In neonatal tetanus, symptoms include muscle spasms, which are often preceded by the newborn’s inability to suck or breastfeed, and excessive crying. Tetanus is diagnosed on the basis of clinical features and does not require laboratory confirmation. Tetanus requires treatment in a medical facility, often in a referral hospital. People who recover from tetanus do not have natural immunity and can be infected again and therefore need to be immunized. Prevention: Tetanus can be prevented through immunization with tetanus-toxoid-containing vaccines (TTCV), which are included in routine immunization programmes globally and administered during antenatal care contacts.
translations.reference: A tetanos ɗin lokacin haihuwa, alamomin kan haɗa da ƙagewar jiki, wanda yawanci ke gabatar kasa tsotsar nonon jariri da kuma yawan kuka. Ana tabbatar da cutar tetanos dangane da alamu ba tare da buƙatar yin gwaji ba. Cutar tetanos na buƙatar kulawar asibiti, musamman tura zuwa wani asibitin. Mutanen da suka samu sauƙi daga cutar tetanos ba su da garkuwar jiki ta halicci, sannan kuma za su iya sake kamuwa, don haka suna buƙatar riga-kafi. Kariya: Za a iya samun kariya daga cutar tetanos ta hanyar yin riga-kafi da alluaran da ke kashe ta, waɗanda ake amfani da su a lokacin shirin zagayen riga-kafi na duniya da yin ta a yayin da ake zuwa duba lafiyar juna-biyu.
translations.hypothesis:

Cutar tetanus ana gano ta ne bisa ga alamun da ke jiki, kuma ba ta buɗe buɗe buƙatar tabbatar da ta a asibiti. Tetanus yana buƙatar jiyya a asibiti, galibi a asibitin da ke karɓar marasa lafiya. Mutanen da suka warke daga cutar tetanus ba sa da kariya ta halitta kuma za su iya jarrabawa sake, don haka suna buƙatar a yi musu alluran rigakafi.  Ƙoƙarin hana cuta: Za'a iya hana cutar tetanus ta hanyar alluran rigakafi da ke ɗauke da tetanus-toxoid (TTCV), waɗanda ke cikin shirye-shiryen alluran rigakafi a duniya kuma ana ba da su lokacin kula da mazauna antenatal.

*   **"ba ta buɗe buɗe buƙatar tabbatar da ta a asibiti"**: This translates "does not require laboratory confirmation."  The repetition of "buɗe buɗe" emphasizes "does not need."
*   **"asibitin da ke karɓar marasa lafiya"**: This translates "referral hospital."  It literally means "hospital that receives the sick."
*   **"kariya ta halitta"**: This translates "natural immunity."
*   **"alluran rigakafi da ke ɗauke da tetanus-toxoid (TTCV)"**: This translates "immunization with tetanus-toxoid-containing vaccines (TTCV)." I kept the abbreviation TTCV in parentheses as it's becoming more common.
*   **"kula da mazauna antenatal"**: This translates "antenatal care contacts." "Mazauna antenatal" refers to those receiving antenatal care.

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Translation:**

translations.source: To be protected throughout life, WHO recommends that an individual receives 6 doses (3 primary plus 3 booster doses) of TTCV. The 3-dose primary series should begin as early as 6 weeks of age, with subsequent doses given with a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses. The 3 booster doses should preferably be given during the second year of life (12–23 months), at 4–7 years of age, and at 9–15 years of age. Ideally, there should be at least 4 years between booster doses. There are many kinds of vaccines used to protect against tetanus: diphtheria and tetanus (DT) vaccinesdiphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis (whooping cough) (DTaP) vaccinestetanus and diphtheria (Td) vaccinestetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis (Tdap) vaccines.
translations.reference: Idan mutum ba ya so ya kamu da cutar har abada, hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayar da shawarar cewa, mutum ya riƙa yin allura da ke kashe tetanos sau 6 (na fari 3 da kuma riga-kafi) na alluran da kashe tetanos,. Alluran farko 3 a jere ya kamata a yi su, mako 6 da haihuwa, inda daga bisani bayan yin allurar da mako 4. An fi son yin riga-kafin ta 3 a shekara ta biyu bayan haihuwa (wata 12 zuwa 23) a shekara 4 zuwa 7 da kuma shekara 9 zuwa 15. An fi son a yi aƙalla shekara 4 a tsakanin alluran riga-kafin. Akwai allurai iri daban-daban da za a iya amfani da su wajen samun kariya daga cutar tetanos: allurar kashe tetatnos a lokacin yarinta da ta hana kawuwa da cutar tetanos da alluran hana tari.

translations.source: Neonatal tetanus can be prevented by immunizing women of reproductive age with TTCV, either during pregnancy or outside of pregnancy. Additionally, robust medical practices can also prevent tetanus disease including clean delivery and cord care during childbirth, and proper wound care for surgical and dental procedures.
translations.reference: Za a iya kauce wa kamuwa da cutar tetanos ta lokacin haihuwa, ta hanyar yi wa mata da suka kai shekarun haihuwa riga-kafi da alluran kashe cutar tetanos kodai a lokacin da suke da juna biyu ko bayan haihuwa. Haka kuma, yawan kula da lafiya a-kai-a-kai ka iya hana kamuwa da cutar tetanos, wanda ya haɗa tsafta lokacin haihuwa da kula da lafiyar jariri yayin haihuwa da kula da rauni wajen yin tiyata da kuma aikin haƙori.

translations.source: Tick-borne encephalitis Overview: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) is an important cause of viral infections of the central nervous system in eastern, central, northern and increasingly western European countries, and in northern China, Mongolia, and the Russian Federation. Tick-borne encephalitis virus is a member of the family Flaviviridae. Approximately 10 000–12 000 clinical cases of tick-borne encephalitis are reported each year, but this figure is believed to be significantly lower than the actual total number of clinical cases. The vast majority of infections with the virus result from infected ticks, which often remain firmly attached to the skin for days.
translations.reference: Cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa ƙarin bayani: Cutar ƙwaƙwalwa na ɗaya daga cikin muhimman abubuwan da suke haifar da cuta a ƙwaƙwalwa a gabashi da tsakiya da arewaci kuma yake ci gaba ƙaruwa yammacin ƙasashen Turai, sannan kuma a arwacin China da Mongolia da Ttarayyar Rasha. Nau'in ƙwayar wannan cuta na cikin dangin ƙwayoyin cuta na Filabibiraidi. Kimanin mutane 10,000 zuwa 12,000 ke kamuwa da cutar ƙwaƙwalwa a duk shekara, amma an yi imanin wannan adadi bai kai ainihin adadin da ake samu ba. Mafi yawan wannan cuta da ƙwayar cutar na samuwa ne sakamakon ticks da ya kamu da cuta, wanda yawanci yake kasancewa a jikin fata tsawon kwanaki.

translations.source: On rare occasions, infection can result from consumption of unpasteurized milk from infect goats, sheep or cows. People come in contact with the ticks during outdoor activities in forested areas up to an altitude of about 2000 meters. There is no direct person-to-person transmission. Symptoms: Most infections remain asymptomatic. In case of clinical illness, the incubation period for tick-borne encephalitis lasts 2–28 days (most commonly 7–14 days) and is followed by 1–8 days of general cold symptoms, such as fatigue, headache and general malaise, usually combined with fever of ≥38 °C.
translations.reference: A wasu lokutan, ana kamuwa da cutar ta hanyar shan nonon akuya ko tunkiya ko saniya mai cuta da aka sha ba tare da an dafa ba. Mutane kan kamu da cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa a yayin mu'amala a wuraren da suke da daji da nisansa ya kai kimanin mita 2000. Mutane ba su yaɗa cutar a junansu. Alamomi: Yawanci kamuwa da cutar ba ya nuna alama. cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na ɗaukar kwana 2 zuwa 28 kafin ta fara (Yawanci kwana 7 zuwa 14) sannan kuma da kwana 1 zuwa 8 wanda shi ne alama ta bai-ɗaya, inda alamomi irin su yawan gajiya da ciwon kai da rashin jin daɗin jiki, wanda ya wanci ya haɗa da zazzaɓi wanda zafinsa ya kai 38C.

translations.source: After an asymptomatic interval of 1–20 days up to 15% of patients experience a second phase of the disease characterized by fever frequently exceeding 40 °C and signs of central nervous system involvement, such as meningitis (e.g. fever, headache, and a stiff neck), encephalitis (e.g., drowsiness, confusion, and sensory disturbances), myelitis or radiculitis. Encephalitis developing during this second phase may result in paralysis, permanent sequelae or death. About 1% of cases with neurological pathologies may die; higher fatality rates have been reported from the Russian federation, which may be related to a different virus subtype. Severity of illness increases with age of the patient, but fatalities have been reported from all age groups. There is no specific treatment for tick-borne encephalitis.
translations.reference: Bayan rashin nuna alama na kwana 1 zuwa 20, kusan kaso 15% na marasa lafiyar sukan fuskanci mataki na biyu na cutar, wanda ake yawan yin zazzaɓi da zafinsa ya wuce 40C da kuma nuna alamun cutar, kamar rashin jin ɗin jiki (da ya haɗa da zazzaɓi da ciwon kai ƙagewar wuya) da sakwarkwacewar ƙwaƙwalwa (kamar yawan bacci da rikicewa da rikicewar hanyoyin hankali) da zafin laka. Zafin ƙwaƙwalwa ka iya haifar da shanyewar ɓarin jiki da wata cutar ko ma mutuwa. Kimanin kaso 1% na matsalar da shafi ƙwaƙwalwa na iya gushewa, inda aka samu rahoton yawan mutuwa a Tarayyar Rasha, wanda za a iya dangantawa da ƙwayoyin cuta iri-iri. Ttsananin cutar na ƙaruwa, amma an samu rahoton samun mace-mace a kowane rukunin shekara. Babu wani takamaiman maganin kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa.

**Hausa Translation:**

Bayan tsawon lokaci na rashin alamura na tsakanin kwanaki 1 zuwa 20, kusan 15% na marasa lafiya suna fuskantar fagen biyu na cutar, wanda ya hasa zubar da jujuwa wanda sauki ya wuce digiri 40 °C, da alamar cutar da ta shafi tsarin jinin gaba (wani bangare na jiki wanda ke sarrafa tunani da motsa jiki), irin su meningitis (misali, zubar da jujuwa, ciwon kai, da tsananin rauni a wuyayin wuya), encephalitis (misali, tsoro, rikici, da canje-canje a ji), myelitis ko radiculitis. Encephalitis da ta bayyana a wannan fagen na biyu na iya haifar da lalaci, sakamakon cuta na dindindin, ko mutuwar. Kusan 1% na al'amuran da ke da matsalar jinin gaba na iya mutuwa; an yi bayanin kasashe mafi yawa a Rasha, wanda kuma hakan na iya zama dangantaka da bambancin nau'in kwayar cuta. translations.source: Prevention: People can protect themselves from ticks by wearing appropriate clothing, including long trousers and closed footwear, when hiking or camping in countries or areas at risk. The whole body should be inspected daily and attached ticks removed as soon as possible. The consumption of unpasteurized dairy products should also be avoided in those areas. Immunization offers the most effective protection. Currently, there are 4 widely used vaccines of assured quality:
translations.reference: Kariya: Mutane za iya samun kariya daga cutar tufafin ƙwaƙwalwa ta hanyar saka tufafin da ya dace, wanda ya haɗa da wando da safa, a yayin zuwa ko zama a ƙasashe ko wuraren da ke fuskantar barazana. Ya kamata a riƙa duba jiki kullum sannan a cire kumburin nan da nan. Ya kamata a guji shan madarar dabbar da ta kamu ba tare da an dafa a waɗannan wwuraren. Riga-kafi ya fi komai saurin yin maganin cutar. A yanzu akwai allurai 4 da suke da inganci yin maganin cutar:

A dukkan yawan jiki ya zama a duba yau da kullum, kuma ticks da suka haɗaka a cire su da sauri yadda ya kamata. translations.source: FSME-Immun and Encepur, manufactured in Austria and Germany respectively, and based on European strains of the virus; and TBE-Moscow and EnceVir, manufactured in the Russian Federation and based on Far-Eastern strains. The 4 vaccines are considered to be safe and effective. In areas where the disease is highly endemic, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children. Ticks also transmit Borreliosis (Lyme disease), which is a bacterial infection.
translations.reference: Sun haɗa da allurar FSME-Immun da Encepu, waɗanda ake yi a Austria da Germany, sannan kuma dangane da ƙarfin ƙwayar cutar a Turai da TBE-Moscow da kuma EnceVir, waɗanda da ake yin su a Tarayyar Rasha, sannan dangane da ƙarfinta a can gabashi. Ana ganin allurai 4 sun fi inganci da aminci. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayar da shawarar yin alluran ga kowane rukuni na shekara, da ya haɗa da yara a wuraren da cutar ta zama annoba. Cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na haifar da cutar Borreliosis, wadda ƙwayar cuta ke haifarwa.

translations.source: Tobacco Overview: Nicotine contained in tobacco is highly addictive and tobacco use is a major risk factor for cardiovascular and respiratory diseases, over 20 different types or subtypes of cancer, and many other debilitating health conditions. Every year, more than 8 million people die from tobacco use. Most tobacco-related deaths occur in low- and middle-income countries, which are often targets of intensive tobacco industry interference and marketing. Tobacco can also be deadly for non-smokers.
translations.reference: Taba sigari Ƙarin bayani: Sinadarin nikotin da ke cikin taba sigari na kama mutane, sannan shan sigari na ɗaya daga cikin manyan matsalolin da ke haifar da shanyewar ɓarin jiki da matsalolin numfashi, inda take haifar fiye da kaso 20% na ire-iren cutar kansa da sauran manyan cututtuka. A kowace shekara, mutane miliyan 8 ne suke mutuwa sakamakon shan taba sigari. Yawan mace-macen da ke da nasaba da taba sigari na faruwa ne a ƙaranci da matsakaicin tattalin arziki, waɗanda su kamfanonin taba sigari suka fin yin tallace-tallace. Haka kuma taba sigari na kashe waɗanda ba sa sha.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Kowane shekara, sama da mutane miliyan 8 suna mutuwa sakamakon amfani da tabawa. Yawancin mutuwar da ta taso bisa ga amfani da tabawa ta faru a kasashe maras karanci da kuma kasashen da ke da matsakaicin kudin shiga, waɗanda sau da yawa su ke zama gabaɗaya maƙasoshi ga hanyoyin kasuwancin tabawa da tallace-tallace. Tabawa kuma na iya zama mai kashe mutane ba wanda ya sha kowane abu.

translations.source: Second-hand smoke exposure has also been implicated in adverse health outcomes, causing 1.2 million deaths annually. Nearly half of all children breathe air polluted by tobacco smoke and 65 000 children die each year due to illnesses related to second-hand smoke. Smoking while pregnant can lead to several life-long health conditions for babies. Heated tobacco products (HTPs) contain tobacco and expose users to toxic emissions, many of which cause cancer and are harmful to health. Electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) and electronic non-nicotine delivery systems (ENNDS), commonly known as e-cigarettes, do not contain tobacco and may or may not contain nicotine, but are harmful to health and undoubtedly unsafe.
translations.reference: Masu shaƙar hayaƙin taba sigari na fuskantar barazanar lafiya, inda kimanin mutane miliyan 1,2 ke mutuwa duk shekara. Kusan rabin yara ƙanana na sheƙar iskar da taba sigari ta gurɓata, sannan kuma kimanin yara dubu 65,000 ke mutuwa duk shekara sakamakon cututtuka masu nasaba da shaƙar taba sigari. Shan taba yayin da ake ɗauke da ciki na iya haifar da matsalolin lafiya na har abada ga jarirai. Kayayyakin taba da aka gasa (HTPs) sun ƙunshi taba, kuma suna jefa masu shau haɗuwa da hayaƙi mai guba, waɗanda da yawa daga cikin su ke haifar da cutar kansa kuma suna da illa ga lafiya. Tsarin isar da nicotine na lantarki (ENDS) da tsarin ba da abubuwan da ba na nicotine ba na lantarki (ENNDS), wanda akafi sani da e-cigarettes, basa ƙunshe da taba kuma ƙila su ƙunshi nicotine ko ba su ƙunshi nicotine ba, amma suna da illa ga lafiya kuma babu shakka amfani da su yana da haɗari.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Matsalolin da ke fitowa sakamakon shaidan taba (second-hand smoke) sun haɗa da cututtuka da dama, kuma hakan ya haɗa da mutuwar mutane 1.2 miliyan a kowace shekara. Kusan rabin yara suna numfashi da iskar taba, kuma akwai yaran 65,000 da ke mutuwa a kowace shekara sakamakon cututtuka da suka shafi shaidan taba.  Kulle taba lokacin juna biyu na iya haifar da matsala da dama ga lafiyar jarirai, waɗanda za su iya zama na rayuwar gaba ɗaya.  Kayayyakin taba mai zafi (HTPs) sun ƙunshi taba kuma suna haɗa mai amfani da fitar da cutar da ke cutarwa, kuma yawanci daga cikinsu na iya haifar da cutar kansa kuma suna cutar da lafiya. Tsarin samar da nicotine ta lantarki (ENDS) da tsarin samar da non-nicotine ta lantarki (ENNDS), waɗanda aka fi sani da sigarinta, ba sa kunshi taba kuma zasu iya kunshi nicotine ko kuma ba za su kunshi ba, amma suna cutar da lafiya kuma babu shakka ba su da amanci.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Toxic emissions"**: Translated as "fitar da cutar da ke cutarwa" (harmful emissions).

translations.source: However, it is too early to provide a clear answer on the long-term impact of HTPs and/or e-cigarette use. Impact: An estimated 1.3 billion people worldwide use tobacco products, 80% of whom are in low- and middle-income countries. Tobacco use contributes to poverty by diverting household spending from basic needs, such as food and shelter, to tobacco. This spending behaviour is difficult to curb because tobacco is so addictive. It also causes premature death and disability of productive age adults in households thus leading to reduced household income and increased healthcare costs.
translations.reference: Sai dai, ya yi wuri a ba da cikakkiyar amsa kan tasirin HTPs da/ko amfani da sigari na dogon lokaci. Tasiri: Kimanin mutane biliyan 1.3 a faɗin duniya suna amfani da kayan sigari, kashi 80% daga cikinsu suna cikin ƙasashe masu ƙarami ko matsakaicin karfi. Yin amfani da taba yana taimakawa wajen ƙaruwar talauci ta hanyar karkatar da kuɗaɗen amfanin gida daga buƙatun dole, kamar abinci da matsuguni, zuwa taba. Wannan halin kashe kuɗi yana da wahala a hana shi saboda taba tana da shiga rai sosai. Haka nan yana haifar da mutuwa da wuri da naƙasa ga manya masu tasowa a gidaje, wanda hakan ke haifar da raguwar kuɗin shiga na gida da ƙarin kashe kuɗi kan kiwon lafiya.

translations.source: In addition to the detrimental impact of tobacco on health, the total economic cost of smoking (from health expenditures and productivity losses together) are estimated to be around US$ 1.4 trillion per year, equivalent in magnitude to 1.8% of the world's annual gross domestic product (GDP). Almost 40% of this cost occurred in developing countries, highlighting the substantial burden these countries suffer. Tobacco taxes are applied in part to combat this effect and are seen as the most cost-effective way of curbing tobacco use, particularly among youth and low-income populations. A tax increase that increases tobacco prices by 10% decreases tobacco consumption by about 4% in high-income countries and about 5% in low- and middle-income countries. WHO response: The scale of this human and economic tragedy is shocking, but it’s also preventable.
translations.reference: Baya ga illar da taba ke yi kan lafiya, an ƙiyasta cewa jimillar kudin da ake kashewa kan shan sigari (daga kuɗaɗen da ake kashewa kan kiwon lafiya da asarar yawan aiki) ya kai dalar Amurka tiriliyan 1.4 a kowace shekara, kwatankwacin kashi 1.8% na ma’aunin GDP na shekara-shekara na duniya. Kusan kashi 40% na wannan kuɗi ya faru ne a ƙasashe masu tasowa, wanda ke nuna babban nauyin da waɗannan ƙasashe ke fama da shi. Ana amfani da wani ɓangare na harajin taba don yaƙar wannan tasirin, kuma ana kallon hakan a matsayin hanya mafi inganci wajen hana shan taba, musamman tsakanin matasa da masu ƙaramin ƙarfi. Ƙarin harajin da ya ƙara farashin taba da kashi 10 cikin 100 yana rage yawan shan taba da kusan kashi 4 cikin 100 a ƙasashe masu ƙarfin tattalin arziƙi da kuma kusan kashi 5 cikin 100 a ƙasashe masu ƙaramin ƙarfi da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga. Martanin ƙuniyar WHO: Girman wannan bala'i ga ɗan adam da na tattalin arziƙi yana da ban tsoro, amma kuma ana iya hana shi.

translations.source: Big Tobacco — along with all manufacturers of tobacco products — is fighting to ensure the dangers of their products are concealed, but we are fighting back: In 2003, WHO Member States unanimously adopted the WHO Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (WHO FCTC), the only public health treaty under the auspices of WHO. In force since 2005, it has currently 181 Parties. To help countries implement the WHO FCTC, WHO introduced MPOWER, a package of technical measures and resources, each of which corresponds to at least one provision of the WHO FCTC. MPOWER builds the capacity of countries to implement 6 measures to reduce the demand for tobacco products: monitor tobacco use and prevention policies, protect people from tobacco use, offer help to quit tobacco use, warn about the dangers of tobacco, enforce bans on tobacco advertising, promotion and sponsorship and raise taxes on tobacco.
translations.reference: Big Tobacco - tare da duk masu haɗa kayan sigari - suna yaƙi don tabbatar da cewa sun ɓoye haɗarin hajarsu, amma muma muna yaƙarsu: A shekarar 2003, Ƙasashe Mambobin WHO a jimlace sun amince da Yarjejeniyar Tsarin Taimako ta WHO kan Kula da Taba (WHO FCTC), yarjejeniya kan lafiyar jama'a ɗaya tilo a ƙarƙashin ƙungiyar WHO. Yarjejeniyar da ke aiki tun 2005, a halin yanzu tana da mambobi 181. Don taimaka wa ƙasashe wajen aiwatar da WHO FCTC, WHO ta gabatar da MPOWER, wani ƙunshin matakan da kayayyaki na ƙwarewa, wanda kowanne ya dace da a ƙalla tanadin WHO FCTC guda ɗaya. MPOWER yana haɓaka ƙarfin ƙasashe na aiwatar da matakai 6 don rage amfani da kayan sigari: sa ido kan tsare-tsaren amfani da taba da daƙile wa, kare mutane daga shan taba, ba da taimako kan daina shan taba, gargaɗi game da haɗarin taba, tilasta hana tallan taba, tallatawa da ɗaukar nauyi, da ƙara haraji akan taba.

translations.source: Trachoma Overview: Trachoma is a disease of the eye and the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. It is caused by an obligate intracellular bacterium called Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person by direct or indirect transfer of ocular and nasal discharges of infected people; indirect transfer includes carriage on the body of species of flies. Preschool-age children harbour the principal reservoir of infection.
translations.reference: Trachoma Bayani: Trachoma cuta ce ta ido kuma cutar da ke kan gaba wajen jawo makanta a duniya. Ɗaurarrun ƙananan ƙwayoyin cuta da ake kira Chlamydia trachomatis ne ke haifar da ita. Cutar na yaɗuwa ne daga mutum zuwa mutum ta hanyar haɗuwa da ruwan da ke fita daga ido ko hancin mai ɗauke da cutar kai-tsaye ko ba kai-tsaye ba; yaɗuwar da ba ta kai-tsaye ba ta haɗa da ɗaukar cutar a jikin wasu nau’ika na ƙuda. Yaran da ba su kai matakin shiga makaranta ba suna kamuwa da cutar sosaa.

translations.source: Models suggest that an individual requires more than 150 lifetime infections to develop the blinding complications of trachoma. Trachoma is endemic in some of the world’s poorest populations, who live in rural and remote areas and have highly inadequate access to water, sanitation and healthcare. Africa is the most affected continent, but it also has the most widespread control efforts. The disease is also found in Central and South America, Asia, Australia, and the Middle East. As of 2 January 2020, 13 countries had reported achieving elimination goals.
translations.reference: Samfuran tsare-tsare sun nuna cewa mutum na buƙatar cututtuka sama da 150 masu haɗari kafin ya haɗu da rikice-rikicen makanta na trachoma. Cutar ta Trachoma na yaɗuwa sosai a wasu daga cikin matalautan duniya, waɗanda ke zaune a yankunan karkara da lunguna, kuma ba su da isasshen ruwa da tsaftar muhalli da tsarin kiwon lafiya. Afirka ce nahiyar da cutar ta fi shafa, amma kuma tafi ko ina ƙoƙarin shawo kan matsalar. Haka nan ana samun cutar a Amurka ta Tsakiya da Amurka ta Kudu da Asiya da Ostiraliya da Gabas ta Tsakiya. Ya zuwa2 ga Janairun 2020, ƙasashe 13 sun ba da rahoton daƙile cutar.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**
