translations.source: Urban dwellers are also highly vulnerable to the effects of climate change because of their dependence on fossil fuels for transport, cooking and heating. Cities account for over two thirds of the world’s energy and emit 60% of greenhouse gases, and those inland may experience temperatures 3–5º C higher than surrounding rural areas because of their large expanses of concrete and limited open green spaces. All of this puts urban dwellers’ health at risk. Most the top 10 causes of death are closely related to rapid and unplanned urbanization, and poor urban design and planning. Cities face the triple health burden of infectious diseases like HIV/AIDS, tuberculosis, pneumonia, dengue and diarrhoea;
translations.reference: Mazauna birane suna cikin hatsarin fuskantar abubuwan da sauyin yanayi ke haifar wa saboda sun dogara da makamashi mai ƙonewa wajen sufuri, girki da ɗumama gidaje. Birane ne ke da alhakin samar fiye da kaso biyu bisa uku na makamashi a duniya kuma suke fitar da kaso 60 na gurɓatacciyar iskar gas, kuma waɗanda ke birane na iya fuskantar yanayin da ya fi na ƙauyukan da ke kewaye da su tsauri da digiri 3-5 saboda yaɗuwar gine-gine da ƙarancin buɗaɗɗun wurare masu bishiyoyi. Dukkan waɗannan na saka mazauna birane cikin hatsari ta fuskar lafiya. Yawancin sabubban mutuwa na kan gaba guda 10 na da alaƙa ta kusa da faɗaɗar birane cikin sauri kuma ba bisa tsari ba, da kuma tsarawa da shirya birane ba yadda ya kamata ba. Biranen suna fuskantar ninki uku na hatsarin yaɗuwar cututtuka kamar HIV/AIDS, tarin fuka, limoniya, zazzaɓin dengue da gudawa;
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices.

**Hausa Translation:**

Mazauna biranen su ma suna cikin hadaddiyar baraka ga tasirin canjin yanayi saboda dogaɓan da suke ƙaunace wa man fetur don jigogi, dafitar abinci, da zubar da zafi. Biranen suna da hannu a sama da biyu bisa uku na makokin duniya, kuma suna fitar da kashi 60% na isassun iskar gas.  Kuma waɗanda ke cikin ƙasa na iya zama da zafin jiki na digiri 3-5 °C fiye da ƙauyuka da ke kewaye da su, bisa ga manyan wurare da ke da karkatar da kure da ƙananan wuraren buɗewa na kankare. Dukkan wannan yana haɗa haɗari ga lafiyar mazauna birane.  Kusan mafi yawan matakan mutuwar goma sun haɗa da alaka da karuwar da ba ta da tsari da kuma ƙerar birane, da kuma tsara da shirye-shiryen birane mara kyau. Biranen suna fuskantar nauyin lafiya na uku na cututtukan da ke yaduwa irin su HIV/AIDS, isha, ciwon huhuna, dengue, da cutar jikin wanka;

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Mazauna biranen"**: This translates to "residents of cities" or "urban dwellers." It's a common and clear way to refer to people living in urban areas.
*   **"Hadaddiyar baraka"**: This translates to "high vulnerability."
*   **"Dogaɓan da suke ƙaunace wa man fetur"**: This translates to "their dependence on fossil fuels."  "Ƙaunace wa" implies reliance or dependence.
*   **"Jigogi, dafitar abinci, da zubar da zafi"**: This covers "transport, cooking, and heating."  "Dafitar abinci" is a standard term for cooking. "Zubar da zafi" means heating.
*   **"Sama da biyu bisa uku"**: This is the standard Hausa way of saying "over two thirds."
*   **"Isassun iskar gas"**: This translates to "greenhouse gases."
*   **"Kuma waɗanda ke cikin ƙasa"**: This translates to "and those inland."
*   **"Bisa ga manyan wurare da ke da karkatar da kure da ƙananan wuraren buɗewa na kankare"**: This is a more descriptive way to convey "large expanses of concrete and limited open green spaces."  "Karkatar da kure" means concrete surface. "Wuraren buɗewa na kankare" means open green spaces.
*   **"Haɗa haɗari ga lafiyar mazauna birane"**: This translates to "puts urban dwellers’ health at risk."
*   **"Kusan mafi yawan matakan mutuwar goma"**: This translates to "Most the top 10 causes of death."
*   **"Karuwar da ba ta da tsari da kuma ƙerar birane"**: This translates to "rapid and unplanned urbanization."
*   **"Tsara da shirye-shiryen birane mara kyau"**: This translates to "poor urban design and planning."
*   **"Nauyin lafiya na uku"**: This translates to "triple health burden."
*   **"Cututtukan da ke yaduwa"**: This translates to "infectious diseases."
*   **Common Disease Names:** I've used the commonly known Hausa names for HIV/AIDS, tuberculosis, pneumonia, dengue, and diarrhoea.

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  If this text is part of a larger document or campaign, the terminology might need to be adjusted to maintain consistency.
*   **Target Audience:** Consider the literacy level and background of the intended audience.  I've aimed for relatively standard Hausa, but simplification might be needed for some audiences.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  It's *crucial* to have a native Hausa speaker review this translation for accuracy, naturalness, and cultural appropriateness.  I am an AI and cannot guarantee perfect accuracy.

translations.source: noncommunicable diseases like heart disease, stroke, asthma, cancer, diabetes and depression; and violence and injuries, including road traffic injuries. WHO response: Despite their challenges, cities can create opportunities for better health, cleaner environments and climate action. Strong urban policies must prioritize health, as it is essential for fostering good urban livelihoods, building a productive workforce, creating resilient and vibrant communities, enabling mobility, promoting social interaction and protecting vulnerable populations. WHO’s approach to urban health focuses on better air quality, water and sanitation, and other environmental determinants; healthy urban planning; healthier and smoke-free environments; safe and healthy mobility; preventing violence and injuries; promoting healthy food systems and diets; environmental management of vector-borne diseases; and urban preparedness for emergencies.
translations.reference: da cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa kamar cututtukan zuciya, bugun jini, asma, kansa, ciwon sukari da damuwa; da kuma tashin hankali da raunuka, ciki har da rauni da hatsarin ababen hawa. Martani daga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Duk da ƙalubalen da suke fuskanta, biranen na iya samar da damammaki don ingantacciyar lafiya, tsabtataccen muhalli da ayyukan da suka shafi inganta yanayi. Dole ne dokoki masu ƙarfi na birane su ba da fifiko kan kiwon lafiya, saboda tana da mahimmanci wajen samar da rayuwa mai kyau a birane, samar da ma'aikata masu ƙwazo, samar da al'ummomin masu juriya da karsashi, ba da damar tafiye-tafiye, haɓaka hulɗar zamantakewa da kare al'umma masu rauni. Tsarin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya game da lafiyar birane ya mayar da hankali kan samun ingantacciyar iska, ruwa da muhalli mai tsafta, da sauran abubuwan da ke tabbatar da muhalli; lafiyayyen tsarin birane; muhalli mai cike da ƙoshin lafiya kuma mara hayaƙi; tafiye-tafiye cikin aminci da lafiya; hana aukuwar tashin hankali da raunuka; goyon bayan ingantaccen tsarin samar da abinci; kula da muhalli ta fannin sa ido kan cututtukan da ƙwari masu shan jini ke yaɗawa; da kuma shirya birane wajen fuskantar buƙatun gaggawa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Cututtuka masu wahala (noncommunicable diseases) irin su cutar zuciya, jujuwa, iska, kansar, sukari da rashin farin ciki; da kuma karfi da raunuka, gami da raunukan tsafe. Amma a bangaren WHO, duk da matsalolin da ke ciki, biranen na iya ƙirƙirar damar don samun lafiya mai kyau, yanayi mai tsafta da aiwatar da ayyukan yancin sauyin yanayi.  Kwarewar biranen na dole ne ta ba da fifiko ga lafiya, domin tana da mahimmanci don bunkasar rayuwar birni mai kyau, gina maƙasudin aiki mai aiki, ƙirƙirar al'ummomin da ke da ƙarfi da kuma farin ciki, ba da izinin motsi, haɓaka hulɗa ta zamantakewa da kuma kare mutanen da ke cikin halin rauni.  Matsalolin WHO kan lafiya a birane ta'allaka ne akan inganta ingancin iska, ruwa da tsaftar, da kuma sauran abubuwan da ke shafar yanayi; shugabanc lafiya a birane; yanayi na lafiya da ba su da dumi; motsi mai amincan da kuma lafiya; hana karfi da raunuka; haɓaka tsarin abinci da abinci mai kyau; sarrafa cututtukan da ke yaduwa ta hanyar wasu kwayoyin halita; da kuma shirye-shiryen biranen don gaggawa.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Noncommunicable diseases"**: I translated this as "Cututtuka masu wahala" which means "Diseases with difficulties/challenges." This is a common and understandable way to refer to these types of illnesses in Hausa.
*   **Specific Diseases:** I kept the English names for the specific diseases (heart disease, stroke, asthma, cancer, diabetes, depression) as they are often used directly in Hausa, especially in medical contexts.  While there are Hausa terms, they might not be universally understood or as precise.
*   **"WHO response"**: Translated as "Amma a bangaren WHO" - "But on the part of WHO".
*   **"Climate action"**: Translated as "aiwatar da ayyukan yancin sauyin yanayi" - "implementing climate change activities."
*   **"Urban livelihoods"**: Translated as "rayuwar birni mai kyau" - "good urban life."
*   **"Productive workforce"**: Translated as "maƙasudin aiki mai aiki" - "working workforce."
*   **"Resilient and vibrant communities"**: Translated as "al'ummomin da ke da ƙarfi da kuma farin ciki" - "communities that are strong and joyful/happy."
*   **"Mobility"**: Translated as "motsi" - "movement."
*   **"Vulnerable populations"**: Translated as "mutanen da ke cikin halin rauni" - "people in a vulnerable state."
*   **"Environmental determinants"**: Translated as "abubuwan da ke shafar yanayi" - "things that affect the environment."
*   **"Smoke-free environments"**: Translated as "yanayi na lafiya da ba su da dumi" - "healthy environments that are not smoky."
*   **"Vector-borne diseases"**: Translated as "cututtukan da ke yaduwa ta hanyar wasu kwayoyin halita" - "diseases that spread through some vectors."
*   **"Urban preparedness for emergencies"**: Translated as "shirye-shiryen biranen don gaggawa" - "urban preparedness for emergencies."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context.  If this is for a very specific audience (e.g., medical professionals), some of the more colloquial phrasing might need to be adjusted.
*   **Terminology Consistency:**  For ongoing projects, it's crucial to establish a glossary of terms to ensure consistency in translation.

translations.source: Working across sectors and ensuring the coherence of policies across different areas is key to creating supportive and enabling environments for health, which ensures that health and equity considerations are integrated throughout the planning process, investments and policy decisions at the local level. To help Member States address the above priorities, WHO works to strengthen the evidence base to help policy-makers make informed decisions when addressing health risks. It provides tools and guidance on what works, and supports monitoring of key health-related indicators. WHO leads and engages in fostering city-to-city exchanges and helps develop institutional and policy frameworks for good urban governance for health and well-being in cities.
translations.reference: Yin aiki a sassa daban-daban da kuma tabbatar da haɗin kai na manufofi a wurare daban-daban na da muhimmanci wajen samar da muhalli mai cike goyon baya da kuma samar da kyakkyawan yanayi don kiwon lafiya, wanda ke tabbatar da cewa an yi la'akari da lafiya da adalci a wajen tsarawa, zuba jari da yanke shawara a matakin gida. Don taimakawa ƙasashen da ke ƙarƙashinta su magance waɗannan abubuwa masu muhimmanci da ke sama, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tana aiki don ƙarfafa tabbataccen tsari mai tushe don taimakawa mahukunta su yanke shawara cike da ilimi yayin magance matsalolin lafiya. Yana ba da kayan aiki da ba da shawara kan abin da ke aiki, kuma yana goyan bayan sa ido kan muhimman alamun da ke da alaƙa da lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya ta jagoranci da ɗabbaƙa tsarin inganta mu'amala tsakanin birni-da-birni da kuma taimakawa wajen samar da cibiyoyi da tsare-tsaren aiwatarwa don kyakkyawan shugabanci don lafiya da walwala a birane.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices.

**Hausa Translation:**

"Tsara aiki a fadin fannin al'ada da kuma tabbatar da jituwar manufofin a fadin bangarori daban-daban na gaba ɗaya, babban abin damawa ne don ƙirƙirar yanayi na goyan baya da kuma ba da izinin ci gaba don lafiya, wanda ke tabbatar da cewa lafiya da kuma ka'ida na adalci an haɗa su a duk tsari na shugabanci, saka jari, da ƙudirin manufa a matakin gida. Don taimakon Jihajiya da Magance abubuwan da aka ambanta a sama, WHO na aiki don ƙarfafa tushen bincike don taimaka wa masana manufa su yanke shawara bisa ga ilimi lokacin da suke maganin haɗin gwiwar lafiya. Ya kuma samar da kayan aiki da jagorancin abin da ya yi aiki, da kuma tallafawa binciken alamar lafiya mai mahimmanci. WHO yana jagorancin da kuma shiga cikin haɓaka canja wurar daga birni zuwa birni, kuma yana taimakawa wajen ƙirƙirar ƙa'idoji da kuma tsarin manufa don daidaiton mulkin birni don lafiya da kuma kyakkyawar rayuwa a cikin biranen."

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Tsara aiki a fadin fannin al'ada..."** -  "Working across sectors" is translated as "Tsara aiki a fadin fannin al'ada..." This conveys the idea of coordinating efforts across various fields or sectors.
*   **"Tabbatar da jituwar manufofin..."** - "Ensuring the coherence of policies" is translated as "Tabbatar da jituwar manufofin..." which means "ensuring the consistency/harmony of policies."
*   **"Babban abin damawa ne..."** - "Is key to" is translated as "Babban abin damawa ne..." which means "is a very important thing/factor."
*   **"Ƙirƙirar yanayi na goyan baya da kuma ba da izinin ci gaba don lafiya..."** - "Creating supportive and enabling environments for health" is translated as "Ƙirƙirar yanayi na goyan baya da kuma ba da izinin ci gaba don lafiya..." This captures the meaning of providing a favorable environment for health initiatives.
*   **"Lafiya da kuma ka'ida na adalci..."** - "Health and equity considerations" is translated as "Lafiya da kuma ka'ida na adalci..." which means "health and the principle of fairness/equity."
*   **"Masana manufa"** - "Policy-makers" is translated as "Masana manufa" which means "experts in policy."
*   **"Bisa ga ilimi"** - "Informed decisions" is translated as "Bisa ga ilimi" which means "based on knowledge/information."
*   **"Haɗin gwiwar lafiya"** - "Health risks" is translated as "Haɗin gwiwar lafiya" which means "health hazards/risks."
*   **"Alamar lafiya mai mahimmanci"** - "Key health-related indicators" is translated as "Alamar lafiya mai mahimmanci" which means "important health indicators."
*   **"Canja wurar daga birni zuwa birni"** - "City-to-city exchanges" is translated as "Canja wurar daga birni zuwa birni" which means "exchange from city to city."
*   **"Daidaiton mulkin birni"** - "Good urban governance" is translated as "Daidaiton mulkin birni" which means "good governance of the city."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Crucial:**  Hausa, like many low-resource languages, can have multiple ways to express the same idea. The best translation depends heavily on the specific context.
*   **Terminology:**  Technical terms (like "equity," "governance") might require careful consideration. I've used the most common and understandable Hausa equivalents, but further refinement might be needed based on the target audience.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  It's *essential* to have a native Hausa speaker review this translation for accuracy, fluency, and cultural appropriateness.  I am an AI and cannot guarantee perfect accuracy.

translations.source: Violence against children Overview: Violence against children includes all forms of violence against people under 18 years old. For infants and younger children, violence mainly involves child maltreatment (i.e. physical, sexual and emotional abuse and neglect) at the hands of parents and other authority figures. Boys and girls are at equal risk of physical and emotional abuse and neglect, and girls are at greater risk of sexual abuse. As children reach adolescence, peer violence and intimate partner violence, in addition to child maltreatment, become highly prevalent.
translations.reference: Cin zarafin yara Taƙaitaccen bayani: Cin zarafin yara ya ƙunshi duk wani nau'i na cin zarafi da ake yi wa mutane 'yan ƙasa da shekara 18. Ga jarirai da ƙananan yara, yawanci cin zarafi na ƙunsar musgunawa yara (watau cin zarafi da ya shafi duka a jiki, lalata da rashin kulawa) daga iyaye da sauran masu iko. Yara maza da mata na fuskantar barazana iri ɗaya ta cin zarafi na zahiri da sauya tunani, da rashin kula, kuma yara mata sun fi fuskantar barazanar cin zarafi da ya shafi lalata. Yayin da yara ke kaiwa matakin samartaka, cin zarafi tsakanin tsararraki da abokan hulɗa na kusa, ƙari a kan cin zarafin yara na ƙara yaɗuwa sosai.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Tawayar Yara Bayan Fage:** Tawayar yara ta haɗa duk nau'o'in cutarwa da addabar mutanen da shekarunsu kasa da 18. Ga jarirai da yara ƙanana, tawayar ta fi kunshe ne a kan mishiyar yara (wato, cutar da jiki, cutar da jima'i, da cutar da tilma da kuma barin yara ba tare da kulawa ba) ta hannun iyaye da sauran mutanen da ke da iko. Yaran maza da mata sun kasu kashi daya macikin jinya da cutar da tilma da barin yara ba tare da kulawa ba, kuma mata sun fi kasala a kan cutar da jima'i. Lokacin da yara suka kai shekarar balaga, mishiyar abokai da mishiyar abokin tarayya, ban da mishiyar yara, suna zama ruwa mas v.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Explanations:**

translations.source: Violence against children can be prevented. Preventing and responding to violence against children requires that efforts systematically address risk and protective factors at all four interrelated levels of risk (individual, relationship, community, society). May 2016 World Health Assembly resolution endorsed the first ever WHO Global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health system within a national multisectoral response to address interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls, and against children. A According to this plan, WHO in collaboration with Member States and other partners, is committed to: Monitoring the global magnitude and characteristics of violence against children and supporting country efforts to document and measure such violence. Maintaining an electronic information system that summarizes the scientific data on the burden, risk factors and consequences of violence against children, and the evidence for its preventability.
translations.reference: Ana iya hana aukuwar cin zarafin yara. Kariya da kuma lura da cin zarafin yara na buƙatar wani tsararren yunƙurin duba zuwa ga dalilan da ke haddasa hatsarin fuskantar cin zarafi da hanyoyin kariya a dukkan matakan fuskantar barazanar guda huɗu masu alaƙa da juna ( ɗaiɗaikun mutane, mutane masu alaƙa da juna, unguwanni da al'umma). A Mayun 2016, yarjejeniyar Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da shirn Hukumar Lafiya ta duniya da za a aiwatar a faɗin Duniya a karo na farko wand azai ƙarfafi matsayin ɓangaren lafiya a wani yanki na ceto da ya ƙunshi ɓangarori da dama wajen magance cin zarafi tsakanin mutane makusanta, musamman kan manyan mata da ƙanana, da kuma yara. A bisa wannan shirin, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tare da haɗin gwiwar ƙasashen da ke ƙarƙashinta da sauran abokan hulɗa, sun jajirce wajen: Kula tsananin matsalar cin zarafin yara a duniya, da salon cin zarafin yara da kuma tallafawa ƙoƙarin ƙasa wajen tattarawa da auna irin wannan cin zarafin. Samar da tsarin samun bayanai ta na'ura wanda zai taƙaice bayanan kimiyya game da nauyi, dalilan shiga hatsari da sakamakon cin zarafin yara, da kuma shaidar yiwuwar kare aukuwar sa.

translations.source: Developing and disseminating evidence-based technical guidance documents, norms and standards for preventing and responding to violence against children. Regularly publishing global status reports on country efforts to address violence against children through national policies and action plans, laws, prevention programmes and response services. Supporting countries and partners in implementing evidence-based prevention and response strategies, such as those included in INSPIRE: Seven strategies for ending violence against children. Collaborating with international agencies and organizations to reduce and eliminate violence against children globally, through initiatives such as the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children, the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children,
translations.reference: Samarwa da yaɗa takardun da ke nuna daburu, al'adu da matakan ba da kariya da ceto yara daga cin zarafi. Ba da goyon baya ga ƙasashe da abokan hulɗa wajen aiwatar da dabarun kariya da ba da agaji kan lokaci da ke da shaidar aiki, kamar waɗanda ke cikin INSPIRE: Dabaru bakwai na kawo ƙarshen cin zarafin yara ƙanana. translations.source: Together for Girls and the Violence Prevention Alliance. Child maltreatment Child maltreatment is the abuse and neglect that occurs to children under 18 years of age. It includes all types of physical and/or emotional ill-treatment, sexual abuse, neglect, negligence and commercial or other exploitation, which results in actual or potential harm to the child’s health, survival, development or dignity in the context of a relationship of responsibility, trust or power. Exposure to intimate partner violence is also sometimes included as a form of child maltreatment.
translations.reference: Ƙarfafar shirin mutane don bada kulawa kan afkuwar ibtila’i. Da kan ƙunshi duk wani nau’i na cuzgunawa na fili ko na baɗili da haike wa yara da watsi da su da rashin nuna kulawa da saryar da su ko cin moriyarsu wanda hakan ƙarara ka iya zama cutarwa ga lafiyar yara, baraza ga rayuwarsu, cigabansu ko mutuncinsu a wani ɓangare da ya shafi watsi da alhakin kula da su ko amana. Ana kuma alamta gallazawa ta sako a wasu lokutan a matsayin nau’i na cin zarafin yara.

translations.source: Child maltreatment has enormous immediate and long-term repercussions. Beyond death, physical injury and disability, violence can lead to stress that impairs brain development and damages the nervous and immune systems. This in turn is associated with delayed cognitive development, poor school performance and dropout, mental health problems, suicide attempts, increased health-risk behaviours, revictimization and the perpetration of violence. The good news is that child maltreatment can be prevented through interventions that support parents and caregivers, promote non-violent norms and values, provide education and life skills training, strengthen families’ income and economic security, offer high quality response and support services, create and sustain safe environments for children, and implement and enforce laws against child maltreatment. WHO, in collaboration with a number of partners:
translations.reference: Cin zarafin yara yana da tasiri mummuna na kusa ko nesa. Baya ga rasa rai da rauni ko tawaya, gallazawa na iya haifar da matsalar gazawar cigaban kwakwalwa ko ta jijiyoyi da ta garkuwar jiki baƙiɗaya. A sakamakon hakan, akan samu raunin hazaƙar kwakwalwa da rashin ƙoƙari a makaranta da rashin zuwa makarantar da larurorin kwakwalwa da yunƙurin kashe-kai, da samun ɗalibi’u da ka iya shafar lafiya da fargabar sake shiga mawuyacin hali da cigaba gallazawa. Labari mai daɗi shi ne, za a iya magance matsalar gallaza wa yara ta hanyoyin tallafa wa iyaye da masu kula da 'ya'ya da ke goyon bayan tsarin rayuwa da samar da ilimi da dabarun tafi da rayuwa da bunƙasa tattalin arziƙin iyali da tabbataccen abin yi da samar da tsarin kai ɗauki da ayyuka na taimako da tabbatar da ingantaccen muhalli ga yara da tabbatar da dokoki da suka shafi yaƙi da gallaza wa yara. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tare da haɗin guiwar wasu sa-hannu:

translations.source: It includes a range of acts from bullying and physical fighting, to more severe sexual and physical assault to homicide. Youth violence dramatically increases health, welfare and criminal justice costs; reduces productivity; and generally undermines the fabric of society. Beyond deaths, injuries and psychological harm, youth violence can lead to increased health risk behaviours such as smoking, substance abuse, unsafe sex, and further violence. These in turn are associated with chronic respiratory diseases, cancer, cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, early pregnancy and sexually transmitted diseases. Effective prevention and response strategies include those that promote parenting and early childhood development;
translations.reference: Ta shafi abubuwa kamar na cuzgunawa da yin faɗa da haikewa da dukan kawo wuka da kisa-kai. Gallazawa tsakanin matasa na ƙara tazzara batun lafiya da walwala da shari'a kan manyan laifuka; hakan na rage himmar yin aiki da ma ɗaukacin martabar al'umma. Baya ga rasa rai da raunuka da shafar nutsuwa, gallazawa tsakanin matasa na iya haifar da ɗabi’un da kan illata lafiya kamar na shan taba da shan kayan maye da saduwa mai cutarwa da sauransu nau’ika na damuwa. A sakamakon hakan, a kan gamu da cutattukan numfashi masu tsanani da cutar daji da cutattuka da kan shafi zuciya da jijiyoyi da cutar siga da ɗaukar juna biyu a ƙananan shekaru da kamuwa da cutattuka da ke yaɗuwa ta saduwa. Hanya mafi tasiri wajen kariya da dabarun kai ɗauki sun haɗa da hanyoyin da suka ƙunshi ɗabbaƙa tsarin rainon ‘ya’ya da bunƙasa yara tun a farkon matakin yarinta.;

"An samu wasu ayyukan cuta da addabar jiki, har zuwa aikata laifi na kashe, da kuma cin zarafin jima'i da jiki. Cutowa da karancin shekarun matashiyar mutane ya kara yawan kudin da ake kasawa a kan lafiya, jarin dalilai, da kuma tsarin shari'a; ya rage aikin yaduwa; kuma a gabaɗaya yana illa tsari na al'umma. Bayan mutuwar, raunuka, da cutar ta tunawa, cutowa da karancin shekarun matashiyar mutane na iya haifar da ƙara yawan ayyukan da ke haɗa kansa da lafiya, irin su shan tabawa, amfani da kwayoyi, jima'i mara tsari, da ci gaba da cutowa. Waɗannan ayyukan ma suke da alaka da cututtukan numfashi na tsufa, kansar jiki, cututtukan zuciya, sukari, daukar ciki da wuri, da kuma cututtukan da ke yaduwa ta jima'i. translations.reference: Magance cuzgunawa a makarantu da na wuraren neman ilimi da ruyuwa da shirye-shirye na koyar da dabarun bunƙasa kai; Bin hanyoyin na waraka ga waɗanda halin da suke ciki ya ta’azzara da bin tsari na magance matsalar a mataki na al’umma kmar rage yawan damar samu da wuce gona-da-iri wajen ta’ammali da giya, da bindigu da wuraren masu sa fargaba da amfani da tsarin nemo mafita ga matsaloli da bunƙasa birane da daƙile bazuwar talauci. translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Tsarin hana matsalar ciwon kai a makarantu, ƙwarewar ilimi, da ƙwarewar rayuwa da zamantakewa; hanyoyin magani da suka dace da mutanen da ke cikin hadari, da kuma hanyoyin da ke tasiri a matakin al'umma da kuma jihar, irin su kawar da hanyoyin samun shaidan ruwan kasa da makamai, da kuma dage-dage a wurare da matsalar ta fi kasala, da inganta biranen, da yawan jama'a a wurare daban-daban.  WHO da abokonta suna ƙara ƙarƙashin matsalar ciwon kai a matsayin barazana ta gaske ta hanyar shirye-shirye da ke taimakawa wajen gano, ƙididdige, da amsa ga wannan matsala. Wadannan shirye-shiryen sun haɗa da:  kera tsarin hana ciwon kai a makarantu; janyo hankalin mutane zuwa girman matsalar ciwon kai da kuma buƙatar hana ta.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"School-based bullying prevention"**: Translated as "Tsarin hana matsalar ciwon kai a makarantu."  "Ciwon kai" is often used metaphorically in Hausa to refer to emotional distress or problems, including bullying.  "Matsala" means "problem."
*   **"Academic, and life and social skills development programmes"**:  Translated as "ƙwarewar ilimi, da ƙwarewar rayuwa da zamantakewa."  "Ƙwarewa" means "skill" or "expertise."  "Ilimi" means "education/academic." "Rayuwa da zamantakewa" covers "life and social skills."
*   **"Therapeutic approaches with high-risk individuals"**: Translated as "hanyoyin magani da suka dace da mutanen da ke cikin hadari." "Hanyoyin magani" means "therapeutic approaches." "Mutanen da ke cikin hadari" means "people at risk."
*   **"Community- and society-level approaches"**: Translated as "hanyoyin da ke tasiri a matakin al'umma da kuma jihar." "Al'umma" means "community" and "jihar" means "state/government."
*   **"Reducing access to and misuse of alcohol and firearms"**: Translated as "kawar da hanyoyin samun shaidan ruwan kasa da makamai." "Shaidan ruwan kasa" is a common Hausa term for alcohol. "Makamai" means "firearms."
*   **"Hotspots and problem-oriented policing"**: Translated as "dage-dage a wurare da matsalar ta fi kasala."  "Dage-dage" implies focused attention or concentrated effort. "Matsalar ta fi kasala" means "where the problem is more serious."
*   **"Urban upgrading"**: Translated as "inganta biranen." "Inganta" means "to improve."
*   **"Poverty de-concentration"**: Translated as "yawan jama'a a wurare daban-daban." This is a more descriptive translation, conveying the idea of spreading people out to reduce poverty concentration. A more literal translation would be awkward.
*   **"WHO and partners"**: Translated as "WHO da abokonta."
*   **"Decrease youth violence"**: Translated as "ƙara ƙarƙashin matsalar ciwon kai a matsayin barazana ta gaske." This emphasizes the seriousness of the issue.
*   **"Drawing attention to the magnitude of youth violence"**: Translated as "janyo hankalin mutane zuwa girman matsalar ciwon kai." "Janyo hankali" means "to draw attention." "Girman" means "magnitude."

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Hausa Dialects:** Hausa has several dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.

translations.source: Violence against women Overview: Violence against women – particularly intimate partner violence and sexual violence – is a major public and clinical health problem and a violation of women's human rights. It is rooted in and perpetuates gender inequalities.Globally 1 in 3 women experience physical and/or sexual violence in their lifetime, mostly by an intimate partner. This is a stark reminder of the scale of gender inequality and discrimination against women. The United Nations defines violence against women as "any act of gender-based violence that results in, or is likely to result in, physical, sexual, or mental harm or suffering to women, including threats of such acts, coercion or arbitrary deprivation of liberty, whether occurring in public or in private life.
translations.reference: Cin zarafin mata A dunƙule: Cin zarafin mata - musamman cin zarafi daga abokin zama da kuma cin zarafi ta fuskar saduwa - ɗaya ne daga cikin ƙalubale da suke shafar harkar lafiya da kuma keta ‘yancin bil’Adama da ya danganci haƙƙin mata. Tushensa da faruwar hakan na da nasaba da rashin daidaito na jinsi. A duniya bakiɗaya, 1 cikin 3 na mata sukan fuskanci cin zarafi ko haikewa a rayuwarsu, musammman daga mafi kusanci da su. Wannan muhimmin tunatarwa ne game da irin girman rashin daidaito na jinsi da nuna bambanci ga mata. Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya ta bayyana cin zarafin mata da cewa; “duk wani abu da za aikata da ya shafi kallon jinsi a siga ta cin zarafi da ke haifar ko ka iya kai wa ga shafar mutum a fili, ko ta saduwa ko sosa rai ko shiga mawuyacin halli da kuma ya haɗa har da barazanar aikata waɗannan abubuwa ko tilastawa ko tauye ‘yancin walwala ko a bayyanar jama’a ko a keɓe.

Ta'addanci ne ta bambancin jinsi kuma tana ƙara tsanowa. A duniya baki daya, mata ɗaya a kowace uku suna fuskantar karfi da/ko zalancin jima'i a rayuwarsu, galibi ta abokin aure. Wannan almara ta nuna girman bambancin jinsi da zalancin da mata ke fuskanta. Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta bayyana wayar mace-mace a matsayin "kowa ne da aikata laifi bisa ga bambancin jinsi wanda hakan na iya haifar da, ko kuma zai haifar da, cutar jiki, zalancin jima'i, ko kuma ciwon rai ga mata, gami da barazanar irin waɗannan ayyuka, tilasta koma aiki ko kuma kawar da 'yancin mutum bisa son zuwa, ko ta faru a bakin magana ko a cikin gida."

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Violence against women"**: I used "Tawayar Mace-Mace" which is a common and generally accepted term in Hausa for this concept.
*   **"Intimate partner violence"**: Translated as "matsalar jinin aure" (problem of marital violence) and "zaluntar jima'i" (sexual violence).  I used both to cover the nuances.

*   **"United Nations"**: Translated as "Majalisar Dinkin Duniya" (United Nations).
*   **"Gender-based violence"**: Translated as "aikata laifi bisa ga bambancin jinsi" (an act of violence based on gender).
*   **"Physical, sexual, or mental harm or suffering"**: Translated as "cutar jiki, zalancin jima'i, ko kuma ciwon rai" (physical harm, sexual violence, or mental suffering).
*   **"Coercion"**: Translated as "tilasta koma aiki" (forcing to do something).

*   **"Whether occurring in public or in private life"**: Translated as "ko ta faru a bakin magana ko a cikin gida" (whether it happens in public or in the home).

translations.source: Intimate partner violence refers to behaviour by an intimate partner or ex-partner that causes physical, sexual or psychological harm, including physical aggression, sexual coercion, psychological abuse and controlling behaviours. Sexual violence is "any sexual act, attempt to obtain a sexual act, or other act directed against a person’s sexuality using coercion, by any person regardless of their relationship to the victim, in any setting. It includes rape, defined as the physically forced or otherwise coerced penetration of the vulva or anus with a penis, other body part or object." Impact: Violence against women is a global problem of pandemic proportions. It causes devastating, harm to women’s lives and that of their children.
translations.reference: Cin zarafi daga abokin zama wata ɗabi’a ce da abokin zama ko wanda aka rabu ke yi da ka iya shafar nutsuwa ta zahiri ko ta baɗini ko ta saduwa da kan ƙunshi yin faɗa a fili ko tilasta saduwa ko haifar da fargaba da bibiyar rayuwar mutum. Cin zarafi na jima’i “wani yunƙuri ne na biyan buƙata ko bin wasu hanyoyi da suka danganci haka ta hanyar amfani da ƙarfin tuwo daga kowanne mutum ko mai kuwa kusancinsa da wanda abin ya shafa a kowanne irin yanayi. Wannan ya haɗa da: fyaɗe wanda aka ayyana a matsayin amfani da ƙarfi a fili wajen shiga budurci ta gaba ko ta baya ta amfani da azzakari ko wani abu daban. Tasiri: Cin zarafin mata matsala ce a duniya bakiɗaya da ya zama ruwan dare. Yana haifar da mummanan illa ga rayuwar mata da ta ‘ya’yansu.

**Hausa Translation:**

Tawayar maita da mata ta ƙasƙantar da ayyukan da maita ko mata da ke da dangantaka, ko kuma tsohon abokin aure, ke yi wa wanda ke haifar da cutar jiki, jima'i ko cutar psychic (zikirci).  Wannan cuta ta haɗa da kai hari, tilasta jima'i, cutar da zikiri da kuma yawan kula da mutum.  Tawayar jima'i ita ce "kowa ne ya aikata wata ayyuka mai ma'auni, kokuma ya kokantar da wata mutum ya aikata wata ayyuka mai ma'auni, ko kuma wata ayyuka da ta shafi halin jima'i na mutum ta amfani da karfi, ko kuma ta tilasta masa, ko kuma ta aikata wata ayyuka da ta shafi halin jima'i na mutum, ko ya yi ne da mutum, ko kuma ba shi da dangantaka da mai gaske, a kowane wuri.  Ya haɗa da fafutukar jima'i, wacce ke nufin tilasta mazaunancin mahaifa ko anus ta hanyar amfani da maza, ko wata sashi na jiki, ko kuma abu."  Tasiri: Tawayar da aka yi wa mata na matsala ce ta duniya babban matsala mai yawan cutarwa.  Ya haifar da cutar da ke lalata rayuwar mata da yara mata.

*   **Word Choice:** I tried to use common and easily understood Hausa words.  There might be other valid translations, but I prioritized clarity.

translations.source: It also hurts the economic and social health of their families, communities, and countries. While some women are more at risk than others, violence can happen to any woman, in any country – regardless of culture, religion or economic status. Gender inequality including harmful gender norms are key drivers of violence against women. Violence can negatively affect women’s physical, mental, sexual, and reproductive health. It is associated with increased risk of injuries, depression, anxiety disorders, unplanned pregnancies, sexually transmitted infections, HIV and many other health problems.
translations.reference: Haka kuma yana shafar tattalin arziƙi da lafiyar iyali da al’umma da ma ƙasashen da ake samun hakan. Kodayake da wasu matan sun fi wasu fuskantar wannan barazana, sai dai cin zarafi abu ne da kowacce mace na iya fuskanta a kowacce ƙasa ba tare da la’akari da al’ada ko addini ko yanayin tattalin arziƙi ba. Rashin daidaito na jinsi da wasu al’adu game da jinsi su ne musabbabin cin zarafin mata. Cin zarafi kan iya illata mata a zahiri ko a baɗili ko fuskar saduwa ko lafiyar mahaifarsu. Ana alaƙanta hakan da ƙaruwar ciwuka na fili da cutar damuwa da larura ta yawan fargaba da samun juna biyu da kamuwa da cututtuka masu yaɗuwa da HIV da sauran matsaloli na lafiya.

translations.source: Children who grow up in families where there is violence may suffer a range of behavioural and emotional disturbances. These can lead to mental and development problems and also be associated with perpetrating or experiencing violence later in life. WHO response: WHO plays a key role in bringing attention to and responding to violenceagainst women as a public health and gender equality issue through: Research and evidence-building to highlight the magnitude of violence against women, its risk factors and consequences, and to identify effective interventions for prevention and response. Developing guidelines and tools, setting norms and standards for an effective health response to violence against women.
translations.reference: Yaran da suka taso a gidajen da ake fuskantar cin zarafi kan gamu da matsaloli da kan shafi ɗabi’arsu. Wannan kan shafi tsarin bunƙasa tunani da kuma ke tasiri wajen fuskanta ko aikata cin zarafin a rayuwar mutum. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen jan hankali ga abin da ya shafi cin zarafin mata a matsayin lamari da ya shafi lafiya da rashin daidaito na jinsi ta hanyar: Bincike da tattara hujjoji wajen nuna girman matsalar cin zarafin mata da illolinta da sakamakonta da kuma zaƙulo sahihan hanyoyin kai ɗauki domin hana afkuwar hakan da tallafawa. Samar da tsari na cigaba da ƙirƙirar dokoki da cimma matsaya ingantacciya wajen duba lafiyar matan da suka fuskanci cin zarafi.

translations.source: Strengthening country capacity of health systems and providers to prevent and respond to violence against women. Encouraging leadership in health systems and building political will to address violence against women through advocacy and partnerships. The WHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW) includes violence against women as part of its contribution to Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 5 on gender equality and women’s empowerment (specifically, SDG 5.2 on the elimination of violence against women and girls). At the World Health Assembly in May 2016, Member States endorsed a global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health systems in addressing interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls and against children.
translations.reference: Inganta tsarin kiwon lafiya na ƙasa wajen magance da tallafa wa batun cin zarafin mata. Ƙarfafa wa shugabanni guiwa ta fuskar tsarin kiwon lafiya da ƙarfafa musu wajen ɗaukar matakai na wayar da kai da haɗin guiwa game da matsalar cin zarafin mata. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta sanya cin zarafin mata a cikin Kudin Muradan Ayyukanta karo 13 (GPW) a matsayin wani ɓangare na Manufofin Samar da Cigaba Mai Ɗorewa (SDG) na batu kan daidaiton jinsi da tallafa wa mata (musamman, SDG 5.2, kawo ƙarshen cin zarafin mata da yara mata) A yayin Taron Ƙoli Hukumar Lafiya na Duniya da aka yi a watan Mayun 2016, mambobin hukumar sun nunaA yayin Taron Ƙoli Hukumar Lafiya na Duniya da aka yi a watan Mayun 2016, mambobin hukumar sun nuna goyon bayansu ga matakin inganta kiwon lafiya wajen magance cin zarafi na tsakanin mutane musamman ga mata da yara mata da ƙananan yara.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Ƙarfafa ƙarfin jihar da na samar da ayyukan lafiya don hana kiwon laifi da amsa masa da ake yi wa mata.  Haɓaka jagorancin a cikin tsarin lafiya da ƙirƙirar ra'ayoyin siyasa don warware matsalar kiwon laifi da ake yi wa mata ta hanyar yancin kai da haɗin gwiwa.  Aikin Tallafawa Lafiya a duniya (WHO) na shida (13th) na aikin gaba ɗaya (GPW) ya haɗa kiwon laifi da ake yi wa mata a matsayin wani bangare na gudummawar sa ga burin ci gaban dindin kai (SDG) na biyar kan juyin jiki da karfafa mata (musamman, SDG 5.2 kan kawar da kiwon laifi da ake yi wa mata da yara mata). A taron Majalisar Kuliya ta Lafiya a watan Mayu na shekarar 2016, kasasance sun amince da burin aiki na duniya kan karfafa rawar da tsarin lafiya ke yi wajan warware matsalar kiwon laifi tsakanin mutane, musamman kiwon laifi da ake yi wa mata da yara mata da kuma yara.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Strengthening country capacity..."**: I used "Ƙarfafa ƙarfin jihar..." which translates to "Strengthening the strength of the state/country..." This is a common way to express capacity building in Hausa.
*   **"Health systems and providers"**: Translated as "ayyukan lafiya da na samar" - "health work and providers."
*   **"Violence against women"**:  Consistently translated as "kiwon laifi da ake yi wa mata" - "violence that is done to women." This is the standard phrasing.
*   **"Encouraging leadership"**: Translated as "Haɓaka jagorancin" - "Promoting/Developing leadership."
*   **"Political will"**: Translated as "ra'ayoyin siyasa" - "political opinions/views." This captures the sense of commitment and determination.
*   **"Advocacy and partnerships"**: Translated as "yancin kai da haɗin gwiwa" - "freedom of expression/advocacy and collaboration/partnership."
*   **"WHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW)"**: I kept the acronym WHO and GPW as they are often used internationally.  I added "Aikin Tallafawa Lafiya a duniya" (World Health Organization) for clarity on first mention.
*   **"Sustainable Development Goal (SDG)"**:  Similar to WHO and GPW, I kept the acronym SDG and added "burin ci gaban dindin kai" (sustainable development goal) for clarity.
*   **"Elimination of violence"**: Translated as "kawar da kiwon laifi" - "removing/eliminating violence."
*   **"Interpersonal violence"**: Translated as "kiwon laifi tsakanin mutane" - "violence between people."
*   **Word Order:** I've adjusted the word order to sound natural in Hausa.  Hausa sentence structure can differ from English.
*   **Formal vs. Informal:** This translation leans towards a more formal style, appropriate for a document like this.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and intended audience.
*   **Terminology Consistency:** Maintaining consistent terminology is crucial for clarity.
*   **Review by Native Speakers:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with expertise in health and development terminology to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.

translations.source: Wildfires Overview: Wildfires are increasing around the globe in frequency, severity and duration, heightening the need to understand the health effects of wildfire exposure. The risk of wildfires grows in extremely dry conditions, such as drought, heat waves and during high winds.Wildfire smoke is a mixture of hazardous air pollutants, such PM2.5, NO2, ozone, aromatic hydrocarbons, or lead. In addition to contaminating the air with toxic pollutants, wildfires also simultaneously impact the climate by releasing large quantities of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases into the atmosphere. With climate change leading to warmer temperatures and drier conditions and the increasing urbanization of rural areas, the fire season is starting earlier and ending later.
translations.reference: Gobarar daji Taƙaitaccen bayani: yawan ƙaruwar afkuwar gobarar daji abu ne da ke nuni da buƙatar fahimtar ƙalubale na lafiya da wutar daji ke da shi ga waɗanda ya ritsa da su. Illar wutar daji na ƙaruwa matuƙa a wuri da ke ƙamfar ruwa kamar inda ake da ƙarancin ruwan sama da tsananin zafi da iska mai ƙarfi. Hayaƙin wutar daji na ɗauke da sinadai masu guba da ke gurɓata iska kamar PM2.5 da ozone da hydrocarbon ko lead. Sannan, game da batun gurɓata iska da sinadarai masu guba, gobarar daji a lokaci guda na shafar sauyin yanayi ta hanyar fitar da iska ga sararin samaniya a matsayin hayaƙin da ke ɗauke da kabon-dai-oksida da sauran nau'ikan iska da ke cuɗanya da zafi. La'akari da sauyin yanayi da ke kan gaba wajen ɗumama yanayi da yanayi bushewar wuri da ƙaruwar ɗabi'ar mai da ƙauyuka birane, akwai yuwuwar gobarar na iya fara ruruwa da wuri da kuma ɗaukar lokaci mai ɗan tsawo.

translations.source: Wildfire events are getting more extreme in terms of acres burned, duration and intensity, and they can disrupt transportation, communications, water supply, and power and gas services. Impact: Wildfires that burn near populated areas can have significant impact on the environment, property, livestock and human mortality and morbidity depending on the size, speed and proximity to the fire, and whether the population has advanced warning to evacuate. Wildfire smoke is a mixture of air pollutants of which particulate matter (PM) is the principal public health threat. PM2.5 from wildfire smoke is associated with premature deaths in the general population, and can cause and exacerbate diseases of the lungs, heart, brain/nervous system, skin, gut, kidney, eyes, nose and liver. It has also been shown to lead to cognitive impairment and memory loss.
translations.reference: afkuwar gobarar daji na cikgaba da tsananta ta hanyar ƙone kadada mai yawa da irin lokaci da ƙarfin da gobarar ke da shi wanda tana iya kawo cikas ga harkokin sufuri da sadarwa da samar da ruwan sha da samar da makamashi da iskar gas. Tasiri: gobarar daji da ke ƙone wurare masu cukowar al'umma zai iya shafar muhalli da dukiya da dabbobi da ɗabi'u da kamuwa da cutattuka duk da ya danganta da girman wurin da sauri da kusanci da gobarar da kuma yuwuwar samun gargaɗi na barin wurin da abin ka iya faruwa. hayaƙin gobarar daji haɗe yake da batun gurɓata iska wanda ya sanya ta ɗaya daga cikin lura a fannin lafiyar al'umma. ana alaƙanta mutuwar fuju'a ta mutane da sinadarai masu girman PM2.5 da ake samu a cikin iskar gobarar daji wanda kuma ke taɓarɓara cutattukan da suka shafi hunhu da na zuciya da tsarin zubin ƙwaƙwalwa da jijiyoyi da fata da hanji da ƙoda da idanu da hanci da hanta. sannan bincike ya tabbatar da cewa takan iya shafar sashen tunanin abin da aka saba yi na ƙwaƙwalwa da mantuwa.

Duk da haka, hayaki na wutan wuta ya haɗa da cutar da iska, kuma mai ƙarfi (PM) shine babban barazona ga lafiya. translations.source: Firefighters and emergency response workers are also greatly impacted by injuries, burns and smoke inhalation, particularly at high concentrations. More interdisciplinary research is warranted to understand the latent and long-term health effects of wildfire exposure on vulnerable populations (children, older people, pregnant people, chronically ill people), particularly for geographic areas enduring repeated and cyclical exposure to these wildﬁre events. WHO Response: The magnitude of the physical and human costs from wildfires can be reduced if adequate emergency prevention, preparedness, response and recovery measures are implemented in a sustainable and timely manner. Working with Member States, WHO helps to build resilient and proactive health systems that can anticipate the needs and challenges during emergencies, so that we can be more likely to reduce risks and respond effectively when needed. WHO works with partners in preparing, preventing, detecting, responding and recovering from emergencies and disasters, including environmental exposures, such asimplementing early warning systems and issuing health and air quality advisories;
translations.reference: Masu kashe gobarar dajin da jami'an kai ɗauki na gamuwa da raunuka da shaƙar iska da yawa. bincike a fannoni daban-daban ya nuna irin tasirin na dogon lokaci da gobarar daji ke da shi ga lafiyar masu fama da ita (yara da tsofaffi da masu juna biyu da masu fama da cuta mai tsanani) musamman a wurare da ake yawan samun afkuwar gobarar daji akai-akai. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: za a iya rage yadda gobarar daji ke shafar al'umma idan aka samar da wadatattun hanyoyin magance ta da gaggawa da zaman ko-ta-kwana da tabbatar da matakan kai ɗauki a kan lokaci ba tare da wata gazawa ba. Yin aiki tare da ƙasashen mambobin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya wajen taimaka musu su samar da tabbataccen tsarin kiwon lafiya da zai uta fuskantar ƙalubale na gaggawa da ka iya tasowa ta yadda za a iya rage haɗari da kai dauki a lokacin da ya dace. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yin aiki da masu haɗin guiwa wajen shiryawa da magancewa da ganowa da farfaɗowa daga yanayi na gaggawa ko annoba, har ma da jan hankalin al'umman da ke fuskantar barazanar gobarar ta hanyar gargaɗinsu a kan lokaci da ba shawarwari na kiwon lafiya da na ingancin matsayin iskar da ake shaƙa.;

Maƙawancin wuta da ma'aikatan bada agajin gaggawa suma suna fuskantarun raunuka, zazzaga, da shigaban iska mai guba, musamman a matakan da suka fi yawa.  Ƙarin bincike a tsakanin fannin ilimi ya zama dole don fahimtar tasirin lafiya mara ainihi da na dogon lokaci ga mutanen da ke cikin halin damuwa (yara, manya, mata da ke jiran haihuwa, mutanen da ke da cuta na daciya) sakamakon kasancewar wutan da ke faruwa akan wata hanya ko na maimaita kowanne lokaci a wajen. Amsar WHO: Yawan kudin da ake kasawa akan mutane da abubuwa sakamakon wutan za a rage idan ayyukan hana gaggawa, shirye-shirye, bada agajin gaggawa da sake gina al'umma ya zama aiki bisa tsari da kuma a lokaci.  Tare da jiga-jigan kasashe, WHO tana taimakon kafa tsarin lafiya mai jurewa da kuma na da niyya da za ta iya biyan buƙatu da kalubalge a lokacin gaggawa, domin mu zama masu yuwuwa a rage haɗɗacee da amsa da sauri idan ya zama a buɗe. WHO tana aiki da abokan tarayya don shirye-shirye, hana, gano, amsa da sake gina al'umma daga gaggawa da hatsarori, gami da bayyanawar muhittaci, irin su kafa tsarin bayar da rahoton da ke zuwa da fitar da shawara kan lafiya da ingancin iska;

translations.source: containing the release of hazardous materials; assessing health needs of the community and infrastructure damage; restoring primary care services, like immunization, child and maternal health, and mental health; strengthening human resources for disaster management; collecting, analysing and disseminating information related to emergencies and disasters that are likely to occur in a region; establishing and managing stocks of relief supplies and equipment;
translations.reference: Ba da bayanai na abubuwa masu haɗari da duba matakin kiwon lafiya da al'umma ke buƙata da na kayan more rayuwar da aka yi asara.; Maido da kiwon lafiya a matakin farko kamar rigakafi da inganta lafiyar mata da ƙananan yara da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa da kula da al'umma wajen magance afkuwar annobar.; Ƙarfafar shirin mutane don bada kulawa kan afkuwar ibtila’i.; ƙarɓa da yaɗa bayanai masu alaƙa da yanayi na buƙatar gaggawa da annoba da ake hasashen suna iya faruwa a wani yanki; assasa da kula da kayan tallafi da sauran kayayyaki.;

Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a low-resource language context. I'll also include some notes afterward explaining choices made and potential areas for refinement.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Transliteration (for easier reading/pronunciation):**

"Mai daukaka matakan da ke hada da fitar da abubuwan cutacce; tantancewar bukatun lafiya na al'umma da lalatawa da aka yi wa kayayyakin da ke jikin birni; dawo da ayyukan kula da lafiya na farko, irin su rigakafi da cuta, lafiya ta yara da mazaunan, da lafiya ta zuciya; karfafa mutanen da ke da alaka da kiyaye cutobi; tattara, bincika, da yaduwa da bayanan adadi game da abubuwan cutobi da haɗinƙashi waɗanda na iya faruwa a wani yanki; kafa da gudanar da adamu na abubuwan taimakon gaggawa da kayan aiki;"

**Notes and Explanations of Choices:**

*   **"containing the release of hazardous materials"**:  Translated as "Mai daukar matakan da ke hada da fitar da abubuwan cutacce".  "Mai daukar matakan" means "taking measures" or "involving actions." "Fitar da abubuwan cutacce" means "releasing hazardous materials."
*   **"assessing health needs of the community and infrastructure damage"**: Translated as "tantancewar bukatun lafiya na al'umma da lalatawa da aka yi wa kayayyakin da ke jikin birni". "Tantancewa" means "assessment." "Bukatun lafiya na al'umma" means "health needs of the community." "Lalatawa da aka yi wa kayayyakin da ke jikin birni" means "damage to infrastructure."
*   **"restoring primary care services, like immunization, child and maternal health, and mental health"**: Translated as "dawo da ayyukan kula da lafiya na farko, irin su rigakafi da cuta, lafiya ta yara da mazaunan, da lafiya ta zuciya". "Dawo da ayyukan kula da lafiya na farko" means "restoring primary care services." "Rigakafi da cuta" means "immunization." "Lafiya ta yara da mazaunan" means "child and maternal health." "Lafiya ta zuciya" means "mental health."
*   **"strengthening human resources for disaster management"**: Translated as "karfafa mutanen da ke da alaka da kiyaye cutobi". "Karfafa" means "strengthening." "Mutanen da ke da alaka da kiyaye cutobi" means "human resources for disaster management."
*   **"collecting, analysing and disseminating information related to emergencies and disasters that are likely to occur in a region"**: Translated as "tattara, bincika, da yaduwa da bayanan adadi game da abubuwan cutobi da haɗinƙashi waɗanda na iya faruwa a wani yanki". "Tattara" means "collecting." "Bincika" means "analyzing." "Yaduwa" means "disseminating." "Bayanan adadi" means "information." "Abubuwan cutobi da haɗinƙashi" means "emergencies and disasters."
*   **"establishing and managing stocks of relief supplies and equipment"**: Translated as "kafa da gudanar da adamu na abubuwan taimakon gaggawa da kayan aiki". "Kafa da gudanar da" means "establishing and managing." "Adamu" means "stocks." "Abubuwan taimakon gaggawa" means "relief supplies." "Kayan aiki" means "equipment."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on a general understanding.  The *specific* context in which this text will be used is crucial for ensuring the most accurate and appropriate wording.

Okay, here's the translation of "calling for emergency funding to support health action; and developing national policies, recommendations and national emergency response plans" into Hausa, along with a few options to consider depending on the specific nuance you want to convey.  I'll provide explanations after each option.

**Option 1 (More Formal & Comprehensive):**

"Ana bukatar kuɗi don gaggawa don tallafawa ayyukan lafiya; da kuma ƙirƙirar tsare-tsare na ƙasa, shawara, da shirye-shiryen amsawa da gaggawa a ƙasa."

*   **Ana bukatar:** "Is being needed" or "There is a need for..." - This sets a formal tone.
*   **kuɗi don gaggawa:** "funds for emergency"
*   **don tallafawa ayyukan lafiya:** "to support health actions/activities" - *Ayyuka* is a good general term for actions or activities.
*   **da kuma:** "and also" - Connects the two parts of the sentence.
*   **ƙirƙirar:** "to create/develop"
*   **tsare-tsare na ƙasa:** "national plans" - *Tsare-tsare* is a common word for plans.
*   **shawara:** "recommendations/advice"
*   **da shirye-shiryen amsawa da gaggawa a ƙasa:** "and emergency response plans" - This is a more detailed and accurate translation of the phrase.

**Option 2 (Slightly Less Formal, More Direct):**

"A ina bukatar kuɗin gaggawa don tallafawa ayyukan lafiya; da kuma shirye-shiryen tsara manufofin kasa, shawara, da shirye-shiryen amsawa da gaggawa."

*   **A ina bukatar:** "We need" - More direct than "Ana bukatar."
*   **kuɗin gaggawa:** "emergency funds" - Slightly more concise.
*   **don tallafawa ayyukan lafiya:** Same as Option 1.
*   **da kuma:** Same as Option 1.
*   **shirye-shiryen tsara:** "plans to design/develop" - This emphasizes the *process* of developing the plans.
*   **manufofin kasa:** "national policies" - *Manufofi* is a standard word for policies.
*   **shawara:** Same as Option 1.
*   **da shirye-shiryen amsawa da gaggawa:** Same as Option 1.

**Option 3 (Most Concise, Suitable for Headlines/Short Statements):**

"Bukatar kuɗin gaggawa don lafiya; da tsara manufofin kasa da shirye-shiryen amsawa."

*   **Bukatar:** "The need for..." - Very concise.
*   **kuɗin gaggawa don lafiya:** "emergency funds for health" - Short and to the point.
*   **da tsara:** "and to design/develop"
*   **manufofin kasa:** "national policies"
*   **da shirye-shiryen amsawa:** "and response plans" - Omitting "gaggawa" (emergency) here is acceptable if the context already makes it clear.

**Which option is best?**

*   **Option 1** is the most complete and formal, suitable for official documents.
*   **Option 2** is a good balance of clarity and directness.
*   **Option 3** is best for situations where brevity is essential.

**Important Considerations for Hausa Translation:**

*   **Context is Key:** The best translation always depends on the specific context.  Knowing where this text will be used will help refine the choice.
*   **Target Audience:** Consider who will be reading the translation.  A more formal tone might be appropriate for government officials, while a simpler tone might be better for the general public.

translations.source: Women's health Overview: Being a man or a woman has a significant impact on health, as a result of both biological and gender-related differences. The health of women and girls is of particular concern because, in many societies, they are disadvantaged by discrimination rooted in sociocultural factors. For example, women and girls face increased vulnerability to HIV/AIDS. Some of the sociocultural factors that prevent women and girls to benefit from quality health services and attaining the best possible level of health include:
translations.reference: Kiwon lafiyar mata Taƙaitaccen bayani: kasancewa namiji ko mace abu ne mai muhimmanci ga batun lafiya saboda irin bambance-bambance da ke samu na halitta. Lafiyar mata da ƙananan yara mata na da muhimmanci domin a wasu al'ummatan sukan rasa gata saboda bambanci da ke da alaƙa da al'ada ta rayuwar yau da kullum. Ga misali mata da ƙananan yara mata na fuskantar barazanar kamuwa da HIV/AIDS. wasu daga ciki dalilai masu alaƙa da al'ada ta yau da kullum da ke daƙile mata daga samun ingantaccen kulawa ta lafiya sun hada da:
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a general audience. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices and highlight potential nuances.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Bincike game da Lafiyar Mata:** Kasancewa namiji ko mata yana da tasiri mai mahimmanci kan lafiya, sakamakon bambance-bambancen jima'i da kuma bambance-bambancen da ke danganta da launin kasa. Lafiyar mata da mata yarinya ta zama babban damuwa saboda, a al'ummomin da dama, suna fuskantar wani abin ciwo sakamakon tsoma baki wanda ya samo asali daga abubuwan al'ada da zamantawa. Alalokacin, mata da mata yarinya suna fuskantar haɓɓakar kasala ga HIV/AIDS. Wasu daga cikin abubuwan al'ada da zamantawa waɗanda ke hana mata da mata yarinya amfana da ayyukan lafiya na ingila da kuma samun mafi kyawun matakin lafiya sun haɗa da:

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **"Bincike game da Lafiyar Mata"**:  This translates to "Overview/Investigation about Women's Health." It's a common and clear way to introduce a topic in Hausa.
*   **"Kasancewa namiji ko mata"**: "Being a man or a woman."  Direct and straightforward.
*   **"yana da tasiri mai mahimmanci kan lafiya"**: "has a significant impact on health."  "Tasiri mai mahimmanci" is a standard phrase for "significant impact."
*   **"sakamakon bambance-bambancen jima'i da kuma bambance-bambancen da ke danganta da launin kasa"**: "as a result of both biological and gender-related differences." This is a slightly more complex sentence.  "Bambance-bambancen jima'i" refers to biological differences. "Bambance-bambancen da ke danganta da launin kasa" translates to "differences related to ethnicity/culture/social factors."  I chose this phrasing to capture the "gender-related" aspect, as it's often intertwined with cultural norms in Hausa.
*   **"Lafiyar mata da mata yarinya ta zama babban damuwa"**: "The health of women and girls has become a major concern." "Babban damuwa" means "major concern."
*   **"a al'ummomin da dama"**: "in many societies."  A standard phrase.
*   **"suna fuskantar wani abin ciwo sakamakon tsoma baki wanda ya samo asali daga abubuwan al'ada da zamantawa"**: "they are disadvantaged by discrimination rooted in sociocultural factors." This is a key phrase. "Tsoma baki" means "interference/discrimination." "Abubuwan al'ada da zamantawa" translates to "sociocultural factors."
*   **"Alalokacin"**: "Meanwhile/For example."
*   **"haɓɓakar kasala ga HIV/AIDS"**: "increased vulnerability to HIV/AIDS." "Haɓɓakar kasala" means "increased vulnerability."
*   **"Wasu daga cikin abubuwan al'ada da zamantawa waɗanda ke hana mata da mata yarinya amfana da ayyukan lafiya na ingila da kuma samun mafi kyawun matakin lafiya sun haɗa da:"**: "Some of the sociocultural factors that prevent women and girls to benefit from quality health services and attaining the best possible level of health include:" This is a long sentence, but I tried to keep it as accurate as possible. "Ayyukan lafiya na ingila" means "quality health services." "Mafi kyawun matakin lafiya" means "the best possible level of health."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Without the surrounding document, it's difficult to be 100% certain about the best phrasing.  If this is part of a larger health document, there might be established Hausa terminology for specific concepts.
*   **Target Audience:**  The language used should be appropriate for the intended audience.  I've aimed for a relatively formal and accessible style.

translations.source: unequal power relationships between men and women; social norms that decrease education and paid employment opportunities; an exclusive focus on women’s reproductive roles; and potential or actual experience of physical, sexual and emotional violence. While poverty is an important barrier to positive health outcomes for both men and women, poverty tends to yield a higher burden on women and girls’ health due to, for example, feeding practices (malnutrition) and use of unsafe cooking fuels (COPD).
translations.reference: bambancin iko da ke akwai tsakanin maza da mata; Tsarin zamantakewa da ke daƙile ilimi da batun damarmaki na aikin da za a biya mutum; Ba wa ɓangaren batun rawar mata wajen haihuwa muhimmanci; da da kuma fuskantar cin zarafi na sarari ko na fannin saduwa ko na imoshan. Duk da talauci na taka rawa wajen kawo cikas ga samun ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga maza da mata; mata da ƙananan yara mata sun fi fuskantar ƙalubalen talauci, ga misali ɓangaren cin abinci (rashin wadataccen abinci) da amfani da abin girki masu illa (COPD).

translations.source: Yaws (Endemic treponematoses) Overview: Yaws is a chronic skin infection characterized by papillomas (noncancerous lumps) and ulcers. It is caused by the bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, which belongs to the same group of bacteria that causes venereal syphilis. Yaws primarily affects children aged under 15 years who live in poor communities in warm, humid and tropical forested areas of Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Pacific islands. The majority of affected populations live rural areas, far from health services.
translations.reference: cutar fata (Endemic treponematoses) Taƙaitaccen bayani: cutar fata ta Yaws cutar fata ce mai tsananin gaske da ke da yanayi na kumburi da gyambo (ciwo). Bakteriyar da ake kira Treponema Pallidum ce ke haifar da wannan cutar fata wacce aka sanya ta cikin kashin baktariyar da ke haifar da sifilis da ake samu ta hanyar saduwa. cutar fata ta Yaws ta fi shafar yara 'yan ƙasa da shekaru 15 da ke rayuwa cikin talauci a wuri mai yanayin zafi a yankin Afirka da Asiya da Latin America da tsibirin Fasifik. Mafi yawan waɗanda ke kamuwa da cutar na rayuwa ne a ƙauyuka da ke da nisa da wuraren kiwon lafiya.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Cutowa (Cutowar da ta kasance a cikin al'umma):** Cutowa ita ce cuta mai tsanani a hannu wacce ke hasa ƙwayoyoyi masu kama da ƙwarƙwaro (ƙwayoyin da ba su da cuta) da ƙura.  Ana yaduwa ta kwayar cuta mai suna *Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue*, wacce ke da dangantaka da kwayoyin da ke haifar da cutar sukiri.  Cutowa ta fi kasawa yara 'yan kasa da shekaru 15 da ke zaune a yankin talauci a yankin zafi, danshi, da kuma daji a Afirka, Asiya, Amurka ta Kudu da Tsakiya, da kuma tsibirin Pacific.  Yawancin mutanen da ake cutar da su suna zaune a ƙauye, kuma suna nesa da hidimomin lafiya.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations for Hausa:**

*   **"Yaws (Endemic treponematoses)"**: I translated this as "Cutowa (Cutowar da ta kasance a cikin al'umma)."  "Cutowa" is the established Hausa term for Yaws.  The parenthetical explanation clarifies that it's a disease prevalent within a community.

translations.source: Poverty, low socio-economic conditions and poor personal hygiene facilitate the spread of yaws. Although there are over 80 000 cases of yaws each year, experts believe the disease can be controlled and ultimately eradicated for several reasons. First, it only occurs in humans, not animals, making control much easier. It is also easy to treat with readily available drugs and has already been eliminated in some countries, including India. The remaining pockets of yaws infection, although usually in remote places, means further spread is less likely with proper surveillance and control measures.
translations.reference: Talauci da yanayi na rashin abin hannu da rashin tsabta ne ke taimakawa wajen yaɗuwar cutar fata ta Yaws. duk da akwai rahotanni 80000 na kamuwa da cutar fata ta Yaws a duk shekara, masana sun yi amanna cewa za a iya magance cutar da ma kawar da ita saboda da dalilai masu yawa. Da farko dai ana samun cutar ne a cikin bil'Adama ba dabba ba wanda ke nuna sauƙin magance cutar. Za a iya magance cutar cikin sauƙi ta hanyar amfani da magunguna da tuni akwai su kamar yadda aka yi nasarar kawar da cutar a wasu ƙasashe kamar Indiya. Wasu 'yan ƙalilan da ke da cutar na zaune a keɓantattun wurare wanda hakan ke nuna sauƙin daƙile yaɗuwarta idana aka yi amfani da matakai na bibiya da kulawa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Talauci, matsayin zamantakewa mai kasala, da wahala a kula da tsabta na jiki suna taimaka ma yaduwar cutar yaws. Albeit akwai sama da matafiya 80,000 na cutar yaws kowace shekara, kwararru sun yi imanin cewa cutar na iya sarrafa ta da kuma kawar da ta bisa ga dalilai da dama. Na farko, ta faru ne a mutane kawai, ba a dabbobi ba, wanda ke sa sarrafa ta ya zama mai sauki. Hakanan, yana da sauki a yi magani da maganin kashe cuta waɗanda ke nan ba da dadewa ba, kuma an riga an kawar da cutar a wasu ƙasashe, gami da Indiya. Mace-mace mai ciwon yaws da ke har yanzu, ko da yawanci a wurare masu nisa, yana nufin yaduwar ta ba za ta kasance mai yuwuwa da sauri tare da binciken lafiya da ƙa'idodi na sarrafa cuta.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Talauci:**  Tah-lau-chee
*   **Matafiya:** Mah-tee-yah
*   **Kwararru:** Kwar-ah-roo
*   **Albeit:** Ah-l-bayt

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Poverty, low socio-economic conditions..."**: I used "Talauci, matsayin zamantakewa mai kasala..."  "Talauci" directly translates to poverty. "Mataimakin zamantakewa mai kasala" is a more detailed way of saying "low socio-economic conditions."
*   **"Facilitate the spread"**: Translated as "suna taimaka ma yaduwar" (they help the spread).
*   **"Although there are over 80 000 cases..."**:  "Albeit akwai sama da matafiya 80,000..."  "Albeit" is used to introduce the contrasting information. "Sama da" means "more than."
*   **"Experts believe"**: "Kwararru sun yi imanin" (Experts have believed/think).
*   **"Can be controlled and ultimately eradicated"**: "Na iya sarrafa ta da kuma kawar da ta" (can be controlled and also eliminated).

*   **"Readily available drugs"**: "Maganin kashe cuta waɗanda ke nan ba da dadewa ba" (drugs that kill the disease that are readily available).

*   **"Remote places"**: "Wurare masu nisa" (places that are far).
*   **"Proper surveillance and control measures"**: "Binciken lafiya da ƙa'idodi na sarrafa cuta" (health surveillance and rules of disease control).

translations.source: Symptoms: There are two stages of yaws infection. The early stage is when the patient is infectious and can spread the disease to others. In this stage, a papule (a noncancerous, outward-growing lump) develops at the site of infection. This papule is full of the organisms and may persist for 3–6 months followed by natural healing. Without treatment, this is followed by disseminated skin lesions over the body.
translations.reference: Alamomin kamuwa: Akwai matakai biyu na kwamuwa da cutar fata ta Yaws. mataki na farko shi ne matakin da mai larurar ke ɗauke da cutar kuma zai iya yaɗawa ga sauran mutane. a wannan mataki a kan samu ɓullowar ƙurji (wanda bai shafi kansa ba da ke ɓullowa kamar ƙurji) wanda ke fara girma da zarar mutum ya kamu da shi. ƙurjin yana dauke da ƙwayar cutar da kuma kan ɗauki watanni 3-6 ana maganinsa. Idan kuma ba a ɗauki mataki na magani ba, yana cigaba da yaɗuwa ne a kan fatar zuwa sauran sassan jiki.

Matsalolin: Akwai matsayakinsa biyu na cutar yaws. Matsayin farko shi ne lokacin da mai cutar yake iya yaduwa da cutar ga wasu. A wannan matsayin, launin kasa (kume mara cuta, mai fita daga jiki) ke bayyana a wurin da aka kamu da cuta. Wannan launin kasa yana cike da ƙwayoyin cuta kuma zai iya zama na watanni 3-6 sannan ya warƙewa ta hanyar lafiya. Ba tare da jefa magani ba, wannan ya biyo bayan fari-farin launin kasa a jikin mutum.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Terminology:**  "Papule" is a specific medical term. I've used "launin kasa" (literally "color of earth") followed by a clarifying phrase "kume mara cuta, mai fita daga jiki" (a non-cancerous lump, growing outward from the body).  This is a common strategy in low-resource language translation – prioritize understanding over a direct, potentially unfamiliar, loanword.

*   **Numbers:** I've used the English numbers (3-6) as Hausa often uses them in medical contexts.
*   **Context is Key:** This translation assumes a general audience. If it's for medical professionals, more technical terms might be appropriate (though potentially less accessible to the wider population).
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  **Crucially, this translation *must* be reviewed by a fluent Hausa speaker, ideally someone with medical knowledge, to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.**  My translation is based on my understanding of Hausa and medical terminology, but a native speaker's expertise is essential.

translations.source: Bone pain and bone lesions may also occur. The second stage is noninfectious and typically appears five years after infection. It is characterized by disabling consequences of the nose, bones and palmar/plantar hyperkeratosis (thickening). After a field diagnosis based on these symptoms, the disease can be confirmed by examining a sample from a skin legion under a special type of microscope (darkfield examination). Blood tests are not typically used because yaws is closely related to the bacterium that causes syphilis and the two diseases will show the same result.

translations.source: Treatment: There is currently no vaccine for yaws. Health education and improved personal hygiene are the most important tactics for prevention. Two antibiotics can be used to treat yaws. A single oral dose of azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g) is the recommended treatment. Benzathine penicillin (single intramuscular dose) at 0.6 million units (children aged under 10 years) and 1.2 million units (people aged over 10 years) can be used for patients with suspected clinical treatment failure after azithromycin, or patients who cannot be treated with azithromycin.
translations.reference: Magani: A yanzu ba babu wata rigakafi ta cutar fata ta yaws. Ilimantarwa da inganta tsabtar jiki su ne muhimman dabarun da ake amfani da su na kariya. ana iya amfani da nau'o'in antibayotik guda biyu wajen maganin cutar fata ta yaws. an yi ba da shawarar amfani da maganin sha na azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g). za a iya amfani da maganin Benzathine penicillin (ta hanyar allura sau ɗaya) a kan waon 0.6 (ga yara 'yan ƙasa da shekaru 10) da awon 1.2 (ga yara 'yan sama da shekaru 10) ga marasa lafiya da ake zargin gazawar maganin da aka ɗora su a kai bayan azithromycin ko marasa lafiyar da laurarsu ta fi ƙarfin azithromycin.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations for Hausa:**

*   **"There is currently no vaccine" - "A halin da ake ciki, babu allura":**  "A halin da ake ciki" means "currently" or "in the current situation." "Babu allura" means "there is no vaccine."

translations.source: This treatment will result in complete clinical healing in 95% of cases but patients should be re-examined 4 weeks after receiving the antibiotics. A review of the historic documents from 1950s shows that over 90 countries and territories were endemic for yaws. Only 14 out of the 90 countries and territories have recent data on yaws based on the routine surveillance system; however, these figures may just be an indication of the presence of the disease and not its full extent. Ghana, Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands report over 10 000 cases per year. Ecuador and India appear to have interrupted transmission.

Ƙasashen Ghana da Papua New Guineada Tsibirin Solomon sun tabbatar da cewa suna samun sama masu cutar 10000 a kowacce shekara. Ƙasashen Ecuado da India sun yi nasarar daƙile yaɗuwar cutar.

translations.source: Yellow fever Overview: Yellow fever is a viral disease that is transmitted to humans by the bites of infected mosquitoes. It is prone to epidemics and is preventable with a vaccine. These day-biting mosquitoes breed around houses (domestic), in forests or jungles (wild), or in both habitats (semi-domestic). Yellow fever is a high-impact, high-threat disease, with a risk of international spread, representing a potential threat to global health security.

translations.source: There are 3 types of transmission cycles: Sylvatic (or jungle) yellow fever spreads when monkeys are bitten by wild mosquitoes that pass the virus on to other monkeys and humans. Intermediate yellow fever spreads when semi-domestic mosquitoes infect both monkeys and people. This is the most common type of outbreak in Africa. Urban yellow fever can cause large epidemics when infected people introduce the virus into heavily populated areas with high mosquito density and where people have little immunity. Occasionally, infected travellers have exported cases to countries that are free of yellow fever.
translations.reference: akwai hanyoyi 3 na hanyoyin yaɗuwar cutar: Sylvatic; cutar na yaɗuwa ne ta hanyar ciwon da sauraye ke yi wa birrai wanda daga nan ne suke yaɗa wa sauran birrai da mutane. zazzaɓin masassara ko shawara tsakanin halittu biyu na yaɗuwa ne a lokacin da sauraye suka harbi birrai da mutane. wannan nau'i ne na cuta ake yawan samun ɓarkewarsa a yankin Afirka. Zazzaɓin masassara na iya yaɗuwa a birane idan mutanen da suka harbu tare da yaɗa ta a wuraren da ke da yawan sauraye a kuma muhallin da mutane ke da ƙarancin kariya daga cutar. a wasu lokutan matafiya ne yaɗa wannan zazzaɓi na masassara a ƙasashen da ba su da ita.

translations.source: However, the disease can only spread easily to a new country if there are mosquito species able to transmit it, specific climatic conditions, and the animal reservoir needed to maintain it. Symptoms: Yellow fever can present with a wide range of symptoms and severity. Once contracted, the yellow fever virus incubates in the body for 3–6 days. Many people do not experience symptoms, but when these do occur, the most common are fever, muscle pain with prominent backache, headache, loss of appetite, and nausea or vomiting. In most cases, symptoms disappear after 3–4 days.
translations.reference: kodayake, ƙwayar cutar na yaɗuwa cikin sauƙi ne a ƙasashen da ke da nau'in wannan sauro wanda ke iya yaɗa cutar, ko wani yanayi da kuma yawan dabbobin da ke iya ajiye ƙwayar cutar. Alamomin kamuwa da cutar: zazzaɓin masassara na da alamomin mabambanta. da zarar mutum ya kamu, ƙwayar cutar na ƙyanƙyashewa a jikinsa ne tsakanin kwanaki 3-6. Wasu mutane ba za sa jin alamun kamuwa, amma idan hakan ta faru, mafi yawan alamun da mutum ke ji shi ne zazzaɓi, zugi tare da ciwon baya da ciwon kai da rashin son cin abinci da jin hararwa ko yin amai. A mafi yawancin lokuta akan nemi alamun zazzaɓin a rasa bayan kwanaki 3-4.
