translations.source: A small percentage of patients enter a second, more toxic phase within 24 hours of recovering from initial symptoms. High fever returns and several body systems are affected, usually the liver and kidneys. In this phase, people are likely to develop jaundice (yellowing of the skin and eyes, hence the name yellow fever), dark urine, and abdominal pain with vomiting. Bleeding can occur from the mouth, nose, eyes, or stomach. Half of these patients die within 7–10 days.Yellow fever is difficult to diagnose, especially during the early stages.
translations.reference: wasu daga cikin marasa lafiya suna shiga mataki na biyu kuma mafi haɗari bayan awanni 24 daga daina jin alamomin farko. Zazzaɓi mai zafi na dawowa da kuma ke shafar sassan jiki da dama kamar hanta da ƙodoji. A wannan mataki, akwai yuwuwar mutane su fuskanci sauyin launi a wani sashe na jiki (sauyawar launin fata da ƙwayar idanu zuwa launin rawaya wanda hakan ya sa ake kiran cutar da 'yellow fever') da bawali mai launin baƙi da ciwon ciki da hararwa. Ana iya samun zubar jini daga baki da hanci da idanu ko ciki. Rabin waɗannan marasa lafiya sun mutu a cikin kwananki 7-10.cutar zazzaɓin yana da wuyar ganewa,musamman a lokacin farkon matakan.

translations.source: More severe cases can be confused with severe malaria, leptospirosis, viral hepatitis (especially fulminant forms), other haemorrhagic fevers, infection with other flaviviruses (such as dengue haemorrhagic fever) and poisoning. Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) testing in blood and urine can sometimes detect the virus in early stages of the disease. In later stages, testing to identify antibodies is needed (IgM). Treatment: Yellow fever infections can cause serious illness and can be fatal in severe cases. Early supportive treatment in hospitals improves survival rates.
translations.reference: Za'a iya rikitar da lamura masu tsanani tare da matsanancin zazzabin cizon sauro, leptospirosis, hepatitis na kwayar cuta (musamman nau'ikan fulminant), sauran zazzabi na haemorrhagic, kamuwa da wasu flaviviruses (kamar zazzabin haemorrhagic na dengue) da guba. Gwajin polymerase{PCR} a cikin jini da fitsari wani lokaci na gano ƙwayar cutar a farkon matakan cutar. A cikin matakai na gaba, ana buƙatar gwaji don gano ƙwayoyin cutar (IgM). Matakin magance cutar:kamuwa da zazzaɓin masassara na iya haifar da mummunar cuta kuma na iya zama mai kisa a lokuta masu tsanani. tallafin magani na farko a asibitoci yana inganta ƙimar rayuwa.

translations.source: There is currently no specific anti-viral drug for yellow fever, but specific care to treat dehydration, fever, and liver and kidney failure improves outcomes. Associated bacterial infections can be treated with antibiotics. Patients need to stay under mosquito nets during the day to limit the risk of spreading to others through mosquito bites. Vaccination is the single most important measure for preventing yellow fever. The prevention of outbreaks can only be achieved if the majority of the population is immunized.
translations.reference: A halin yanzu babu wani takamaiman maganin rigakafin ƙwayar cuta don zazzaɓi, amma takamaiman kulawa don magance rashin isashshen ruwa a jiki, zazzabi, da gazawar hanta da koda yana inganta sakamako. Ana iya magance ƙwayoyin cuta masu alaƙa da maganin rigakafi. Marasa lafiya suna buƙatar zama a gidan sauro da rana don irage haɗarin yadawa ga wasu ta hanyar cizon sauro. Alurar riga kafi ita ce hanya mafi mahimmanci don hana zazzabi. Za a iya hana barkewar cutar ne kawai idan an yiwa yawancin jama'a allurar rigakafi.

Za a iya magance cutar da kwayoyin cuta da ke haɗuwa da su ta amfani da antibiotics.  Mataimakin abubuwan buƙatar sun kasance ƙarƙashin jarin kankara a rana don kawar da haɗarin yaduwar cutar ta hanyar zafin jiki. Taimakawa shine mafi mahimmancin mataki don hana cutar da jujuwa. translations.source: The yellow fever vaccine is safe and affordable, and a single dose provides life-long immunity against the disease. People who recover from yellow fever infection are also protected for life. Read more about the yellow fever vaccine. Mosquito control can also help to prevent yellow fever and is vital in situations where vaccination coverage is low or the vaccine is not immediately available. Mosquito control includes eliminating sites where mosquitoes can breed and killing adult mosquitoes and larvae by using insecticides in areas with high mosquito density.
translations.reference: Maganin cutar zazzabin shawara yana da aminci kuma mai araha, kuma kashi ɗaya na alluran rigakafi yana ba da rigakafi na tsawon rayuwa daga cutar. Mutanen da suka warke daga kamuwa da cutar zazzaɓi kuma suna da kariya har tsawon rayuwars. ƙara karantawa game da allurar rigakafin zazzaɓin cizon sauro. Kula da sauro na iya taimakawa wajen hana zazzabin rawaya kuma yana da mahimmanci a cikin yanayin da allurar rigakafi ba ta da yawa ko kuma ba a samun rigakafin nan da nan. Kula da sauro ya haɗa da kawar da wuraren da sauro ke hayayyafa da kashe manya sauro da tsutsa ta hanyar amfani da maganin kashe kwari a wuraren da ke da yawan sauro.

translations.source: Community involvement through activities, such as cleaning household drains and covering water containers where mosquitoes can breed is an important and effective way to control mosquitoes.
translations.reference: Shigar da al'umma ta hanyar ayyuka, kamar tsaftace magudanar ruwa da kuma rufe kwantena na ruwa inda sauro ke iya hayayyafa hanya ce mai mahimmanci kuma mai inganci don magance sauro.
translations.hypothesis: Tattalin matsala da kungiyoyin al'umma ta hanyar ayyukan daban-daban, irin su tsaftace kwalaye da ake amfani da su a gida da rufe kwano da ke adana ruwa inda kwayar matsalar malaria ke haifuwa, na zama hanya mai mahimmanci da tasiri wajen kawar da matsalar malaria.

translations.source: People with medical needs are “left behind in pain” reveals new report The World Health Organization (WHO) has published a new report on access to morphine for medical use, which describes how the global distribution of morphine, as a vital pain medicine, is unequal and does not fulfil the medical need. The report, titled “Left behind in pain”, highlights the problems in access to this essential medicine and offers actions to improve safe access through balanced policy. Despite morphine being an effective and relatively low-cost medicine for relieving strong pain, listed since 1977 in the first edition of the WHO Model list of Essential Medicines, the disparity in access across countries is stark. There is a 5- to 63-fold difference in the estimated median consumption of morphine between high-income countries and lower income countries.
translations.reference: An bar mutanen da ke da buƙatar kulawar likita a baya cikin raɗaɗi, sabon rahoto ya bayyana. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta fitar da wani sabon rahoto kan samun damar yin amfani da sinadarin morphine a matsayin magani, wanda ya bayyana yadda rarraba morphine a duniya a matsayin maganin raɗaɗi mai mahimmanci, bai daidaita ba kuma baya biyan bukatun likita.B50. Rahoton, mai taken "cikin raɗaɗi", yana nuna matsalolin samun damar yin amfani da wannan magani mai mahimmanci tare da bayyana hanyoyin samar da shi cikin ta hanyar daidaitattun manufofi. Duk da cewa morphine magani ne mai inganci kuma mai sauƙin farashi don kawar da raɗaɗi mai ƙarfi, wanda aka jera tun 1977 a cikin wallafar WHO ta farko na jerin samfuran Mahimman Magunguna, rarrabuwar kai a cikin ƙasashe yana da ƙarfi. Akwai bambanci ninki 5 zuwa 63 a kiyasin matsakaicin yawan amfani da morphine tsakanin ƙasashe masu samun kuɗin shiga da ƙasashe masu ƙaramin karfi.

translations.source: Consumption pattern varies significantly across countries of similar wealth; it does not correspond to medical need, as indicated by the estimated number of days people are in pain or suffer with severe shortness of breath for people with a terminal illness. This data echoes that of the 2018 Lancet Commission which described the lack of access to pain relief medication as ‘one of the most heinous, hidden inequities in global health’ with the richest 10% of countries possessing 90% of distributed morphine-equivalent opioids. “Leaving people in pain when effective medicines are available for pain management, especially in the context of end-of-life care, should be a cause of serious concern for policy-makers,” says Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General for Medicines and Health Products. “We must urgently advocate for safe and timely access to morphine for those in medical need through balanced policy, everywhere.”
translations.reference: Yanayin amfani ya bambanta sosai a cikin ƙasashe masu irin wannan arziki; Bai dace da buƙatun kiwon lafiya ba, kamar yadda ƙiyasin adadin kwanakin da mutane ke fama da raɗaɗi ko fama da matsanancin ƙarancin numfashi ga masu fama da rashin lafiyan da ba na tashi ba. Wadannan bayanan sun yi daidai da na Hukumar Lancet ta 2018 wacce ta bayyana rashin samun damar yin amfani da magungunan rage jin zafi a matsayin daya daga cikin rashin adalci mafi muni, a harkar kiwon lafiya ta duniya tare da 10% mafiya arzikin ƙasashe da ke daukar kashi 90% na morphine da aka rarraba. daidai opioids. Barin mutane cikin raɗaɗi a lokacin da ake samun ingantattun magunguna don magance raɗaɗin ciwo, musamman a yanayin kula da lafiya na karshen rayuwa, ya kamata ya zama abin damuwa ga masu tsara manufofi, in ji Dokta Yukiko Nakatani, Mataimakin Daraktan WHO. -Gabaɗaya don Magunguna da Kayayyakin Lafiya. Dole ne mu yi kira da gaggawa a samar da morphine kan lokaci ga waɗanda ke cikin buƙatun likita ta hanyar madaidaitan manufofi, a ko'ina.

Wannan bayanin hankali ya jaddada abubuwan da aka gano a shekarar 2018 a cikin Rahoton Majalisar Lancet, wanda ya bayyana rashin samun isassun maganin zafi a matsayin 'ɗaya daga cikin barazanar, ɓoye ƙiyabayen da ke cikin lafiyar duniya,' tare da kasashe mafi kusan 10% na duniya suna da kusan 90% na maganin morphine daidaito da opioids da aka rarraba. "Barin mutane a cikin zafi lokacin da akwai magani mai tasiri don kula da zafi, musamman a cikin yanayin kula da mutanen da za su mutu, ya kamata ya zama abin damuwa ga mazaɓɓan gwamnati," in ji Dr Yukiko Nakatani, Mataimakiyar Babban Sakataren WHO ta hanyar Magani da Kayan Aikin Lafiya. translations.source: Reasons for the disparity Access to morphine for medical use is influenced by many interacting factors including enablers related to good governance, reliable/efficient procurement and supply processes, resource availability and capacity-building activities, along with barriers related to overly restrictive legislation and policies, inadequate service provision, and misinformed attitudes and perception. Given different country contexts, enablers, barriers and priorities for action vary; a stakeholder survey presented in this report, with respondents from 105 WHO Member States, confirms this variation. For example, irregular supply of morphine and other strong opioids at health facilities due to limited financing were commonly noted as a barrier in low- and middle-income countries compared to high-income countries. More than a third of respondents across all regions also noted barriers arising from legislative and regulatory factors while recognizing the importance of a legislative and regulatory framework in achieving safe access.
translations.reference: Dalilan banbance-banbance Damar samun morphine a matsayin magani yana da alaƙa da abubuwa da dama da suka haɗa da shugabanci nagari, ingantaccen sayayya da hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki, wadatar albarkatu da ayyukan haɓaka iya aiki, tare da shamakain da ke da alaƙa da ƙaƙƙarfan dokoki da manufofi, ƙarancin bayar da kulawa, da rashin fahimtar halaye da fahimta. Duba da yanayin ƙasashe daban-daban, abubuwan da ke samar da dama da tsaiko da fifiko wajen mahimmancin ɗaukar mataki sun bambanta; wani binciken masu ruwa da tsaki da aka gabatar a wannan rahoto, mai masu amsa tambayoyi daga mambobin ƙasashen WHO guda 105, ya tabbatar da wannan bambancin. Misali, ana ɗaukar rashin samar da sinadarin morphine da sauran magungunan opioid masu karfi a wuraren kiwon lafiya saboda ƙarancin kuɗaɗe a matsayin wani shamakai a ƙasashe masu ƙaramin karfi da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga idan aka kwatanta da ƙasashe masu tasowa. Fiye da kashi ɗaya bisa uku na waɗanda suka amsa tambayoyi a duk faɗin yankuna sun bayyana cewa dalilan dake kawo cikas sun shafi dokoki da ƙa'idoji, a yayin da suka fahimci muhimmancin tsarin doka da ƙa'ida wajen samar da dama cikin aminci.

translations.source: Unduly restrictive requirements could hamper patient access because they impede the flow of supply or make prescribing and dispensing difficult for health-care professionals. It is important to note that concerns about the potential harmful effects of opioids are valid, such as their potential to lead to opioid use disorder. For this reason, a certain amount of caution about the potential harms of opioid use (e.g. use in chronic non-cancer pain) is important for public health insofar as its use is well-informed and proportionate to risks. Such concerns should not undermine the benefits of opioid use when clinically indicated and when used safely by trained professionals. Opportunities for actionThe report presents a complementary set of areas for action that aim to improve safe access to morphine.
translations.reference: ƙayyadaddun buƙatu na babu gaira babu dalili na iya kawo cikas ga majiyyaci wajen samun dama saboda suna hana samarwa ko rubutawa da rarrabawa ga ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya. Yana da kyau a lura cewa damuwa game da yuwuwar illolin magungunan opioid abu ne mai tushe, kamar yuwuwar su na haifar da matsalolin dakr da alaƙa da amfani da opioids. Saboda wannan dalili, ɗaukan wani mataki na taka tsantsan game da yuwuwar cutarwar amfani da opioid (misali amfani a cikin ciwon daji na yau da kullun ba tare da ciwon daji ba) yana da mahimmanci ga lafiyar jama'a matuƙar an san amfaninsa daidai yake da haɗarinsa. Kada ire-iren waɗannan damuwa su lalata fa'idojin amfani da magungunan opioid lokacin da lafiya ta buƙaci hakan da lokacin amfani da su ta hanyar ƙwararrun ma'aikata. Damar daukar mataki: Rahoton ya gabatar da wasu jerin ɓangarorin ɗaukar matakai da nufin inganta damar samun morphine.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: Waɗannan sun haɗa da aiwatar da ƙananan shirye-shirye na yankuna da na jihohi kan haɓaka damar yin amfani da morphine wajen kiwon lafiya tare da mahimman ayyuka da kayayyaki don kulawa da jin daɗi, wanda aka tsara akan Jerin Kayayyakin WHO na Mahimman Magunguna da Muhimman Ƙunshin Lafiya na Kulawar WHO. Har ila yau, sun haɗa da inganta tsarin mulki, daidaita sayayya da hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki don magance duk wani tasgaro, inganta kayan aiki kamar samar da kuɗaɗe, samar da ƙwarewa a ma'aikatar kiwon lafiya, da wayar da kan jama'a game da fa'idodi da illar amfani da opioid. Nasarar waɗannan ayyukan za ta ta'allaƙa ne kan haɗin gwiwa da haɗin kai tsakanin dukkan masu ruwa da tsaki a matakan ƙasa, yanki da duniya baki ɗaya.

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the world’s deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs – which cause 74% of all deaths globally – due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS.
translations.reference: Ƙananan tsibirai sun amince kan babban shirin ayyuka kan cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa da cututtukan ƙwaƙwalwa. A yau, an ƙaddamar da sanarwar Bridgetown na 2023 akan Cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa (NCDs) da Lafiyar Ƙwaƙwalwa, don magance wasu cututtukan masu tsanani a duniya a cikin Ƙananan Tsibirai masu tasowa (SIDS), musamman waɗanda ke cikin haɗari. Sanarwar ita ce mahimmiyar sakamako na taron ministocin SIDS kan cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa (NCDs) da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa, wanda ke gudana daga ranar 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), da kuma Pan American Health Organisation (PAHO) suka shirya. Gwamnatin Barbados. NCDs na da matuƙar tasiri ga SIDS, wanda hakan ke haifar da kashi 74% na duk mace-mace a duniya saboda dogaro da abincin da ake shigowa da su daga waje, tasirin kasuwanci da kuma rikicewar yanayi. Wani sabon rahoton na WHO ya bayyana cewa 8 daga cikin ƙasashe 15 da ke da fiye da kashi 30 cikin dari na haɗarin mutuwa da wuri daga cututtukan zuciya, ciwon daji, ciwon sukari, ko cututtukan numfashi na yau da kullun sune SID.

**Translation:**

**Isarar Tsaka Mai Karfi Kan Cututtukan Ba Sa Nunawa da Lafiya ta Rayuwar Mutane da Ciwon Rayuwarsu a Tsaka-tsakanin Gundumararansa**

A yau, An gabatar da Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 kan Cututtukan Ba Sa Nunawa da Lafiya ta Rayuwar Mutane (NCDs) da Ciwon Rayuwarsu, don warware wasu matsalar cututtukan da ke cutar da mutane a duniya, musamman a cikin Kasashen Tsaka-tsakanin Gundumararansa (SIDS), waɗanda ke cikin haɗarin sosai. Sanarwar wacce ta fito ne a taron ministocin SIDS kan Cututtukan Ba Sa Nunawa da Lafiya ta Rayuwar Mutane (NCDs) da Ciwon Rayuwarsu, da ya gudana daga 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda ta haɗa gwiwa Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), Kungiyar Amurka ta Amurka kan Lafiya (PAHO) da Gwamnatin Barbados.

An yi yawa kasashen SIDS a kan cututtukan NCDs – waɗanda ke haifar da kashi 74% na mutuwar da ke faruwa a duniya – saboda dogon amsar su da abincin da ake shigo da shi, tasirin kasuwanci da rikici da yanayi ke haifarwa. Sabon rahoton WHO ya nuna cewa kasashe 8 akan kasashen 15 da ke da fiye da 30% haɗarin mutuwar da ba ta daidai ba ta cutar da zuciya, kansar, sukari, ko cutar numfashi mai tsanani, su ma SIDS ne.

**Hausa Transliteration (for easier reading/pronunciation):**

Isarar tsaka mai karfi kan cututtukan ba sa nunawa da lafiya ta rayuwar mutane da ciwon rayuwarsu a tsaka-tsakanin gundumararansa.

A yau, an gabatar da Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 kan cututtukan ba sa nunawa da lafiya ta rayuwar mutane (NCDs) da ciwon rayuwarsu, don warware wasu matsalar cututtukan da ke cutar da mutane a duniya, musamman a cikin kasashen tsaka-tsakanin gundumararansa (SIDS), waɗanda ke cikin haɗarin sosai. Sanarwar wacce ta fito ne a taron ministocin SIDS kan cututtukan ba sa nunawa da lafiya ta rayuwar mutane (NCDs) da ciwon rayuwarsu, da ya gudana daga 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda ta haɗa gwiwa hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO), kungiyar amurka ta amurka kan lafiya (PAHO) da gwamnatin Barbados.

An yi yawa kasashen SIDS a kan cututtukan NCDs – waɗanda ke haifar da kashi 74% na mutuwar da ke faruwa a duniya – saboda dogon amsar su da abincin da ake shigo da shi, tasirin kasuwanci da rikici da yanayi ke haifarwa. Sabon rahoton WHO ya nuna cewa kasashe 8 akan kasashen 15 da ke da fiye da 30% haɗarin mutuwar da ba ta daidai ba ta cutar da zuciya, kansar, sukari, ko cutar numfashi mai tsanani, su ma SIDS ne.

translations.source: The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Ƙasashe 10 da ke da mafiya yawan masu fama da cutar ƙiba a duniya duk SID ne a cikin Pasifik, inda sama da kashi 45% na manya ke rayuwa da cutar ƙiba. Matsalolin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa ya zama ruwan dare a cikin ƙasashen SIDS, wanda ya shafi kimanin kashi 15.2 na yawan jama'ar Caribbean da kashi 11.2 na yawan jama'ar Pasifik. Mutanen da ke fama da matsalar lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa suna fuskantar haɗarin mutuwa da wuri, rashin samun isasshen kulawa ta lafiyar jiki gami da kuma yunkurin kashe kawunansu. Abin kunya, ƙarancin ƙwararrun ma'aikata da tasirin sauyin yanayi suna ba da gudummawa wajen fuskantar ƙalubale a cikin SIDS wanda ke buƙatar kulawa da gaggawa. Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 ta zayyana ƙwararan matakai don magance matsalolin zamantakewa, muhalli, tattalin arziki da kasuwanci waɗanda ke haifar da NCDs da yanayin lafiyar hankali.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Kasashe goma mafi yawan matsalar jujuwa a duniya sun kasance ƙasashe marasa iyawa (SIDS) a yankin Pacific, inda sama da kashi 45% na manya suka fi yawan jujuwa. Matsalolin lafiya ta tunani sun yi yawa a kasashen SIDS, waɗanda ke shafar kusan kashi 15.2% na mutanen Caribbean da kuma kashi 11.2% na mutanen yankin Pacific. Mutanen da ke da matsala lafiya ta tunani suna facin babban hadari na mutuwar da za ta faru da wuri, har da mutuwa sakamakon lafiyar jiki da ba a yi magani ba da kuma kashe kansu. Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 ta bayyana matakan da suka fi kyau don warware matsalolin zamantauyawa, muhalli, tattalin arziki, da kasuwanci da ke haifar da cututtukan da ba za su iya jujjuyawa (NCDs) da matsala lafiya ta tunani.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led ‘for’ and ‘by’ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. “Bold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,” said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. “Funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.” "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar gamammiyar tsari da SID ta jagoranta, sanarwar ta nuna cewa ba za a iya magance NCDs da matsalolin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa yadda ya kamata ba, ba tare da magance rikicin yanayi ba. Ɗaukan ƙwararan matakai da suka dace a game da yanayi, lafiya da kuma walwalarmu, ya dogara ne kan gyaran tsarin tafiyar da kuɗaɗe a duniya, don samar da biliyoyin hanyoyin zuba hannun jari, da rage wa ƙasashe masu tasowa nauyin biyan basussukan da ake bin su. Firayim Ministan Barbados. Bayar da kuɗi ga ƙasashe masu rauni don daidaitawa da sauyin yanayi abu ne mai muhimmanci, tare da ƙididdige cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa. Ƙalubalen da Jihohin masu tasowa a Kananan Tsibirai ke fuskanta, suna da alaƙa da juna, da fuskoki daban-daban. Sauyin yanayi, lalacewar muhalli, rashin daidaiton zamantakewa da tattalin arziki, da kuma hanyoyin kasuwanci na kiwon lafiya suna ƙara tsananta nauyin NCDs da yanayin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa," in ji Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta-Janar na WHO.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

An ƙirƙirar wannan sanarwar ta hanyar tsari mai amshiƙawa, wacce ta jagorancin ƙasashe masu tsaka da tsakiya (SIDS), ta nuna cewa cututtukan da ba su da cuta (NCDs) da matsalar lafiya ta tunani ba za su yiwa magani yadda ya kamata ba, sai an mayar da martaba ga rikicin yanayi. "Ƙaƙƙauyar aiki don yanayina, lafiya mai kyau, da kuma karkataccen rayuwa ta dogara ne akan gyara da tsara kuɗin duniya don fitar da biliyoyin kudaden saka jari, yayin da ake ƙara ƙara ƙarancin ƙasashe masu tasowa don biyan bashi," inji Misis Mia Amor Mottley, Shugabar Ministan Barbados. "Kudin da za a kashe don juyin halitta da hana canjin yanayi a mafi ƙanƙantar da ƙasashe, yana da mahimmanci, kuma cututtukan da ba su da cuta da matsalar lafiya ta tunani za a haɗa su," a cika. "Matsalolin da ke fagen ƙasashe masu tasowa sun haɗu kuma sun kasance da yawa. Canjin yanayi, lalacewar muhalli, bambance-bambancen zamantakewa da tattalin arziki, da kuma ƙa'idojin kasuwanci na lafiya, sun ƙara ƙara nauyin cututtukan da ba su da cuta da matsalar lafiya ta tunani," a cika, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Babban Daraktan WHO.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **SIDS:** I've kept "SIDS" as is, as it's a common abbreviation even in Hausa discussions about this topic.  A full translation would be cumbersome.
*   **NCDs:** Similar to SIDS, "NCDs" is retained. A full translation would be "Cututtukan da ba su da cuta" (Diseases that are not infectious).
*   **Inclusive Process:** Translated as "tsari mai amshiƙawa" which conveys the meaning of a participatory and representative process.
*   **Redressing and Reorganizing:**  I used "gyara da tsara" which means "to fix and to organize" to capture the dual meaning.
*   **"Bold Action":** Translated as "Ƙaƙƙauyar aiki" which means "strong/bold action."
*   **"Well-being":** Translated as "karkataccen rayuwa" which means "good life/quality of life."
*   **"Commercial determinants of health":** This is a complex concept. I translated it as "ƙa'idojin kasuwanci na lafiya" which means "commercial rules of health" to convey the idea that commercial practices influence health outcomes.
*   **WHO Director-General:**  Translated as "Babban Daraktan WHO" (Director-General of WHO).
*   **Flow and Naturalness:** I've tried to ensure the Hausa reads naturally and isn't overly literal.  This sometimes requires rephrasing slightly.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Terminology:**  For specialized terms like "climate change adaptation" and "mitigation," it's crucial to establish consistent Hausa terminology. This might involve collaboration with Hausa-speaking experts in climate change and health.

translations.source: "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for ‘loss and damage’ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: Duk da ƙarancin albarkatun da suke da shi da kuma matsalar yanki, wadannan al’ummomi sun nuna matukar jajircewa wajen fuskantar matsaloli. Tare, dole ne mu samar da hanyar da ta ginu akan daidaito, juriya, da ɗorewa. Dole ne mu ƙarfafa tsarin kiwon lafiya, haɓaka matakan kariya da ganowa da wuri, da kuma ba da fifiko ga haɗin gwiwar NCD da ayyukan kula da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa a cikin kiwon lafiya na farko. Darakta-Janar ɗin ya kuma yi alƙawarin cewa WHO za ta yi aiki don tattara kuɗaɗe don bunƙasa yanayin juriya, wuraren kula da lafiya masu ɗorewa a cikin SIDS. WHO za ta kuma ci gaba da bayar da shawarwari don samar da kuɗaɗe na asara da lalacewa don daidaita canjin yanayi da rage saka hannun jari a ƙasashe masu ƙaramin karfi.

Ya kamata mu hadu kuma mu kirƙiri hanya wacce ta dogara ne akan daidaito, ƙarfi, da dorewa. Ya kamata mu ƙarfafa tsarin lafiya, ƙara ƙalubalantar hana cuta da bincika cuta a farko, da kuma ba da fifiko ga haɗa sabisai na cutar da ta kasance mai tsanani (NCDs) da lafiya ta tunani zuwa kula da lafiya na gaba. translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populations’ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHO’s ‘best buys’ – a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. “SIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs.
translations.reference: A matsayin wani ɓangare na amincewa da sanarwar, SIDS ta sanya hannu don gudanar da ayyuka daban-daban, waɗanda suka shafi fannoni kamar haɗar da al'umma gabaɗaya, haɓaka aiwatarwa, tabbatar da saka hannun jari, daidaitawa tsakanin gwamnatoci da lissafin ci gaba. Taron ya kuma nuna takamaiman alƙawurra na SIDS akan NCDs da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa, gami da inganta samun damar kula da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa a wuraren kulawa na farko, sabunta dokokin sarrafa taba don rufe sigari da vaping, da rage yawan cin gishiri da sukari. Waɗannan alƙawuran sun yi daidai da mafi kyawun tsarin WHO masu sauƙin kuɗi, abubuwan da suka dogara da shaida don magance NCDs. A baya-bayan nan, an sabunta jerin mafiya kyawun sayayya a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya a watan Mayu don haɗe ƙananan rigakafi ta cutar rheumatism, cikakkiyar kulawa da cutar numfashi mai tsanani da tsawo, cututtukan huhu, da kuma cututtukan kansar mahaifa, nono, colorectal, hanta da ciwon daji na yara, da kuma cikakken maganin cutar kansa ga masu ɗauke da cutar HIV. "SIDS a ƙasashen nahiyar Amurka na cigaba da zama masu rauni sosai ga NCDs.

**Hausa Translation:**

A matsayin wata bangare na amincewa da Sanarwa, kasashen da ke cikin Kungiyar Tsabar Tsari ta Tekun Indo-Pasifiki (SIDS) sun amince da aiwatar da wasu ayyuka da dama, a fannin da suka hada da shigaɓe dukkanin al'umma, saurin aiwatar da ayyukan, tabbatar da saka hannun jari, da haɗa kai a tsakanin gwamnati da kuma ƙididdige warƙewa. Taron ya nuna kuma wasu alƙawwaru na musamman da SIDS suka yanke akan cututtukan da ba su da cuta (NCDs) da lafiyar zuciya, gami da inganta samun lafiyar zuciya a wurare da ake ba da hidimomin lafiya na farko, sabunta dokokin kula da tabawa don rufe sigareta lantse da kuma amfani da su, da rage yawan saltsa da sukari da mutane su ke ci. Waɗannan alƙawwaru sun haɗu da abubuwan da WHO ke ƙara daraja – wato jerin ayyukan da suka fi arha da kuma daidaitawa da abubuwan da suka faru don magance NCDs. An sabunta wannan jerin abubuwan da WHO ke ƙara daraja a taron Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya a watan Mayu, don haɗa da hana cuta ta rheumatic, kula da cutar asthma da kuma cutar ta tsohuwar iska (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease) da kuma wasu ayyuka don hana cutar ƙwayoyin jini, cutar rafi, cutar ƙungiyar ciki, cutar jini da cutar yara, da kuma cikakken kula da cutar ga mutanen da ke rayuwa da HIV. “Kasashen SIDS a Amurka har yanzu suna fuskantar barazuba sosai ta amincin cututtukan da ba su da cuta.”

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **SIDS:** I've kept "SIDS" as is, as it's an acronym commonly used internationally.  Adding the full name in parentheses the first time helps with understanding.
*   **"Agreeing the Declaration":** Translated as "amincewa da Sanarwa" (agreeing with the Declaration).

translations.source: This Ministerial Conference comes at a unique time and will be key to amplifying the voice and needs of SIDS, bringing NCDs and mental health to the forefront of our priority list,” said Dr Jarbas Barbosa, PAHO Director, and WHO Regional Director for the Americas. “To build on this momentum, we must act now. PAHO is ready to support accelerated implementation of interventions in our region, including mainstreaming care for these conditions into primary health services and taking advantage of innovations such as digital health tools.” SIDS countries have a track record of driving global decision-making; their Port of Spain and SAMOA pathway agreements paved the way for the first-ever UN political declaration on NCDs in 2018. The conference and the Declaration will inform and shape forthcoming UN General Assembly High-Level Meetings on universal health coverage in September 2023 and on NCDs in 2025.
translations.reference: Wannan taron na ministoci ya zo a lokaci na musamman, kuma zai zama mabuɗi don ci gaba da tattaunawa, dangane matsalar (mutuwa ta fuju'a) SIDS, da kuma bayyana matsalar (cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa) NCDs, da matsalar (lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa ) a sahun gaba cikin jerin muhimman abubuwan tattaunwa, in ji Dr Jarbas Barbosa, Daraktan ( ƙungiyar lafiya ta Amurka)PAHO, kuma Daraktan (ƙungiyar likitoci ta duniya yankin Amurka) WHO. Domin tabbatar wannan yunƙurin, dole ne mu yi ƙoƙari yanzu. PAHO (ƙungiyar lafiya ta Amurka) a shirye take don tallafawa aiwatar da ayyukan gaggawa a yankinmu, gami da kula da waɗannan yanayi cikin ayyukan kiwon lafiya a ƙaramin mataki, da kuma cin gajiyar abubuwan bunƙasawa, kamar kayan aikin kiwon lafiya na na'ura. Ƙasashe masu fama da (mutuwar fuju'a) SIDS sun yi nasarar yanke shawara ta duniya; a nan ne birnin Spain (Port of Spain) da yankin ( SAMOA )suka shimfida yarjejeniya, wacce ta ba da damar yin sanarwar duniya a Karo na farko, dangane da cututtuka marasa yaduwa, (NCDs) a shekara ta 2018. Taron na ƙarawa juna sani, da sanarwar da ta gabata; za su haska babban taron majalisar Ɗinkin duniya da ke tafe, kan batun kiwon lafiyar duniya a watan Satumba na 2023 da kuma kan cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa (NCDs) a shekara ta 2025.

translations.source: WHO’s Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting ends with stirring call for worldwide action Delegates and representatives left the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting with a stirring call to action from its director Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall. As the multinational meeting, attended by some 300 key partners, came to an end in Geneva on Tuesday 13 June, Dr Fall urged participants to take on board the message that, “if we do not challenge ourselves, we cannot evolve and improve”. In a wide-ranging event held to review progress against the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, partners, donors, technical partners, institutions and country representatives reinforced their commitment to achieving an ambitious target: a world free from neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meeting’s primary theme centred around the vision of “One community delivering one Global NTD Programme”.
translations.reference: Tattaunawar ƙungiyar ma'aikatan lafiya na duniya, na ma'abota shirin nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin Rana wa'yanda a kayi sake; ya ƙare da kiran ɗaukar mataki a fadin duniya. Jama'a da wakilai sun bar wajen shirin da aka yi na abokan hulɗar nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana; tare da kiran mayar da hankali wajen ɗaukar mataki daga darektanta Dr Ibrahima SocÃ Fall. Yayin da taron kasa da kasa, wanda ya samu halartar wasu manyan abokan hulɗa 300, ya samu ƙarƙarewa a Geneva a ranar Talata 13 ga watan Yuni, Dr Fall ya bukaci mahalarta taron da su dauki sakon cewa, idan ba mu kalubalanci kanmu ba, ba za mu iya ingantawa ba ko Cigaba. A cikin wani babban taron da aka gudanar don nazarin ci gaban (ƙungiyar likitoci ta duniya) WHO, a tsare - tsarenta don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a 2021- 2030, da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan ( cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa )NTD na duniya daga ƙayyadaddun cututtuka da kuma hangen gaba, abokan tarayya, masu ba da gudummawa, abokan fasaha, cibiyoyi da wakilan ƙasa; sun ƙarfafa himmarsu don cimma manufa mai fa'ida: a hasashen duniya Na kubuta daga cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa a yankunan masu fama da zafin rana a shekara ta 2030. Jigon taron ya tattara ne akan Samar da al'umma guda, wajen gudanar da shirin NTD na duniya bai ɗaya.

translations.source: Taking their cues from the three key strategic shifts advocated in the road map – greater country ownership, measuring impacts not process, and a commitment to cross-cutting activities and collaboration for greater efficiency – discussions were pragmatic, clear-sighted and suffused also with the need for health equity and justice to tackle NTDs. Only such an approach, the meeting heard, can bring about the change that is needed by some of the world’s poorest communities to achieve the United Nations 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. In the first such global meeting since the launch of the road map in January 2021, delegates heard also from WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Welcoming participants at the beginning of the two-day symposium, Dr Tedros said, “This gathering illustrates what WHO is all about – partners coming together to leverage their collective strength to address global health challenges that none of us could address alone. “A multifaceted challenge like neglected tropical diseases takes a multifaceted approach, and that is what we bring, together”.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar daukar bayanai masu mahimmanci guda, Wanda ya assasa tsarin mallakar nagartacciyar kasa, wajen auna cigaba ba hanyoyinsa ba, da jajircewa na al'amura , da haɗin gwiwa domin tabbatar da nuna kwarewa, abubuwan da aka tattauna an gudanar dasu a aikace , a bayyane kuma an yaɗata tare da buƙatar daidaito da adalci a harkar kiwon lafiya, domin daƙile matsalar NTDs. Irin wannan tsarin ne kawai, in ji taron, zai iya samar da sauyin da wasu al'ummomin duniya mafi talauci ke buƙata domin cimma muradun ci gaba mai dorewa na Majalisar ɗinkin Duniya a shekarar 2030. A cikin irin wannan taron na farko na duniya tun bayan ƙaddamar da tsarin a watan Janairun 2021, wakilai kuma sun ji ta bakin daraktan WHO - Janar Dr tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Da yake maraba da mahalarta farkon taron na kwanaki biyu, Dr tedros ya ce, wannan taron ya bayya komai game da WHO, abokan hadin gwiwa da ke haduwa don yin amfani da karfin hadin gwiwarsu don magance kalubalen kiwon lafiyar duniya wanda babu daya daga cikimmu da zai iya magancewa shi kadai. Kalubale iri-iri kamar cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafi rana, da aka yi sake da su, kuma shi ne abin da muka kawo tare.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for accuracy and natural flow. I've included explanations of some choices after the translation to clarify my approach.

**Hausa Translation:**

"Kungiyoyin da ke fitowa da ra'ayoyin su na canja wurwar dabarun da aka bayyana a cikin jagorar - wacce ta ƙara daidaiton kasashensu, tantancewar tasiri ba aiki ba, da kuma amincewa da ayyukan da ke shafar dukkan fannoni da hadin kai don ƙara yuwuwar aiki - taron ya zama mai amfani, mai haske, kuma ya nuna buƙatar daidaito da adalci a fannin lafiya don kawar da cututtukan neglected tropical diseases (NTDs).  Taron ya ji cewa, kawai irin wannan hanyar ne zata iya kawo canjin da al'ummomin mafi talauci a duniya ke buƙatar samu don cimma burin ci gaban kimiya mai dorewa na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya na 2030. Matsala mai alamuran da dama kamar cututtukan negleted tropical diseases (NTDs) ta buƙaci hanyar da ta kunshi alamuran da dama, kuma hakan ne da muke kawo, tare."

translations.source: Delegates and participants spent the subsequent two days identifying the major gaps and challenges to achieving high-level goals and local, on-the-ground challenges. Those on-the-ground challenges include ensuring that people directly affected by NTDs, and those directly responsible for administering interventions against NTDs, are solicited and acknowledged, particularly in terms of communication and community engagement. The meeting noted also the importance of developing communities of practice, in order to build the capacity and confidence of the global NTD workforce. In further discussions, delegates agreed on principles and practical steps to implement action towards the stated targets and planned together for a Global Action Plan for 2025–2030. Key actions and decisions arising from the meeting included recommendations for strengthening and operationalizing national coordination platforms to ensure coordination for joint planning and for monitoring and evaluation, and to ensure more efficient supply chain management within national systems.
translations.reference: Wakilai da mahalarta taron sun shafe kwanaki biyu, suna bankaɗo manyan giɓina da ƙalubalen cimma manyan burika da kuma ƙalubale na gida. Waɗanda ke fuskantar ƙalubalen ƙasa da suka haɗa da mutanen da abin ya shafesu kaitsaye, dangane da NTDs da waɗanda ke da alhakin gudanar da ayyukan magance NTDa, an nemi su yarda, musamman ta fuskar sadarwa da haɗin gwiwar al'umma. Taron ya kuma lura da mahimmancin haɓaka al'ummomi masu kokari, don haɓaka iyawa da kwarin gwiwa da amincewar ma'aikatan NTD na duniya. A ci gaba da tattaunawa, wakilai sun amince da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don aiwatar da ayyuka zuwa ga maƙasudan da ake so a cimma, tare da tsarawa Bai ɗaya, domin ɗaukar mataki na duniya na 2025-2030. Muhimman matakai da yanke shawarwari a taron sun haɗa da shawarwari don ƙarfafawa da aiwatar da haɗin gwiwar amfani da kafafen sadarwa na zamani, don tabbatar da haɗin kai don cigaba da tsare - tsare, wajen lura da rairayewa, da kuma tabbatar da ingantaccen tsarin sarrafa kayan aiki a cikin tsarin kasa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a low-resource language context. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices and highlight potential areas for refinement.

**Hausa Translation:**

Kungiyoyin wakilai da mawaƙin zamanin sun shaida kwana biyu na gaba da ƙididdigar babban ɓangarɓe da ƙalubalane don cimma burin babban mataki da ƙalubalane na gida, a kan kasashen da ake gaba. Ƙalubalen da ke kan kasashen da ke gaba sun haɗa da tabbatar da cewa mutanen da tasirin cutan NTD ya shafar kai tsaye, da kuma waɗanda ke da alhakin gudanar da ayyukan yaki da NTD, an nemi ra'ayoyinsu da kuma amsa su, musamman a fannin sadarwa da amsa tambayoyin al'umma. Taron ya lura da mahimmancin kafa kungiyoyin aikin, don gina ƙarfin gwiwa da kuma amsa tambayoyin aiki na ƙungiyar NTD a duniya. A taron, wakilan sun amince da ka'idoji da matakan aiki don aiwatar da ayyokin da aka bayar, kuma sun shirya tare don Tsarin Aiki na Duniya don shekarar 2025-2030.  Ƙa'idoji da ƙudirin da suka fito daga taron sun haɗa da shawara don ƙarfafa da aiwatar da wuraren da ke da alhakin shirya a ƙasa don tabbatar da daidaito a cikin shirye-shiryen hadin gwiwa da kuma bincika da ƙididdigar, da kuma tabbatar da sarrafa isar da abubuwan aiki cikin tsarin kasa.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Kungiyoyin:**  Kung-gee-yoyn
*   **wakilai:**  wah-kah-lee-eye
*   **mawaƙin zamanin:** mah-wah-keen zah-mah-neen
*   **shaida:** shah-ee-dah
*   **kwana biyu:**  kwah-nah bee-yoo
*   **na gaba:** nah gah-bah
*   **ƙididdigar:** kee-dee-dee-gar

*   **don cimma:** don chee-mah
*   **burin babban mataki:**  boo-reen bah-ban mah-tah-kee

*   **Taron ya lura da mahimmancin:** Tah-ron yah loo-rah dah mah-heem-mahn-seen
*   **kafa kungiyoyin aikin:** kah-fah kung-ee-yoyn eye-keen
*   **don gina ƙarfin gwiwa da kuma amsa tambayoyin aiki na ƙungiyar NTD a duniya:** don ghee-nah kar-feen gwee-wah dah koo-mah am-sah tahm-bah-yoy-een eye-kee nah kung-ee-yar NTD ah doo-nyah
*   **Wakili sun amince da ka'idoji da matakan aiki:** Wah-kee-leen soon ah-meen-ceh dah kah-ee-doh-jee dah mah-tah-kah-een eye-kee
*   **aiwatar da ayyokin da aka bayar:** eye-wah-tar dah ah-yoo-keen dah ah-kah bah-yar
*   **Tsarin Aiki na Duniya don shekarar 2025-2030:** Tsa-reen Eye-kee nah Doo-nyah don sheh-kah-rar 2025-2030
*   **Ƙa'idoji da ƙudirin da suka fito daga taron:** Kah-ee-doh-jee dah koo-dee-reen dah soo-kah fee-toh dah-gah tah-ron
*   **shawara don ƙarfafa da aiwatar da wuraren da ke da alhakin shirya a ƙasa:** shah-wah-rah don kar-fah-fah dah eye-wah-tar dah woo-rah-ren dah keh dah al-hah-keen shee-rah ah kah-sah
*   **tabbatar da daidaito a cikin shirye-shiryen hadin gwiwa da kuma bincika da ƙididdigar:** tahb-bah-tar dah dye-dah-ee-toh ah kee-chin shee-reh-shee-ren hah-deen gwee-wah dah koo-mah been-chee-kah dah kee-dee-dee-gar
*   **tabbatar da sarrafa isar da abubuwan aiki cikin tsarin kasa:** tahb-bah-tar dah sah-rah-fah ee-sah-rar ah-boo-boo-wan eye-kee kee-chin tsa-reen kah-sah

**Explanation of Choices and Potential Refinements:**

*   **NTDs:** I've kept "NTD" as is, assuming it's a well-understood acronym within the Hausa-speaking context related to health.  If it needs to be fully spelled out, it would be "Cututtukan NTD" (NTD Diseases).
*   **"On-the-ground challenges":**  I translated this as "ƙalubalane na gida, a kan kasashen da ake gaba" (local challenges, on the ground).  This is a common way to express this concept.
*   **"Communities of practice":**  Translated as "kungiyoyin aikin" (working groups/teams).  A more precise translation might be difficult without a more established Hausa term for this concept.
*   **Word Choice:** I've tried to use relatively common and accessible Hausa vocabulary.  However, some technical terms might benefit from further review by a Hausa language expert in the health sector.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I've adjusted sentence structure slightly to flow more naturally in Hausa.  Direct, word-for-word translations can often sound awkward.
*   **Clarity:**  I prioritized clarity over strict adherence to the English sentence structure.
*   **Low-Resource Considerations:**  I've aimed for a translation that can be reasonably understood by a wider audience, even if they don't have a high level of formal education.

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Language Translation:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and target audience.
*   **Back-Translation:**  It's *highly* recommended to have a second, independent Hausa speaker back-translate the document to English to check for accuracy and identify any misunderstandings.
*   **Community Review:**  Ideally, the translation should be reviewed by members of the target community to ensure it is culturally appropriate and understandable.
*   **Glossary:** For ongoing translation projects, creating a glossary of key terms can help ensure consistency.

translations.source: The Partners’ Meeting took place also at the end of a major functional review process within WHO’s Department of Control of Neglected Tropical Diseases. Over the course of the past four months, WHO has been hearing contributions and testimony from all its partners and stakeholders, in order to ensure that it itself embodies the values of accountability, transparency and equity that it espouses and demands. Those values also include ensuring that NTDs are repositioned in the global health architecture. Meeting participants welcomed the emphasis on the key roles that the NTD community can and must play in contributing to wider challenges such as Universal Health Coverage, One Health and the increasing threat of global climate change. Delegates attending in person were also able to enjoy an exhibition dedicated to neglected tropical diseases at WHO headquarters.
translations.reference: Taron abokan hulɗar ya gudana kuma a ƙarshen babban aikin bita a cikin Sashen Kula da Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na WHO. A cikin watanni hudu da suka gabata, WHO tana jin gudumawa da shaida daga dukkan abokan hulɗarta da masu ruwa da tsaki, domin tabbatar da cewa ita kanta ta kunshi dabi’un rikon amana da gaskiya da daidaito,wanda ta yadda da kuma buƙata. Waɗannan abubuwa masu ƙima sun haɗa da tabbatar da cewa an bunƙasa NTDs a cikin tsare - tsaren cigaban kiwon lafiya na duniya. Mahalarta taron sun yi maraba da abin lura kan muhimman ayyukan da al'ummar NTD za su iya, kuma dole ne su bada gudummuwa ga manya - manyan kalubale, gamayyar harkar Lafiya ta Duniya, harkar lafiya ta Bai ɗaya, ƙaro ƙoƙarin magance barazanar sauyin yanayi a duniya. Wakilan da suka halarta kai tsaye sun sami damar jin daɗin wani baje kolin da aka keɓe don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a hedikwatar WHO.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I'll also include some notes afterward explaining some of the choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Taron Abokan Kasuwanci ya kuma yi kasancewa a karshen babban aikin duba aikin aiki a cikin Dabarar WHO ta Kaskantar da Cututtukan Kariya. A cikin watanni huɗu da suka gabata, WHO na ji daɗin jin rahotannin da abokan kasuwancin da masu ruwa da tsari ke bayarwa, don tabbatar da cewa WHO kanta tana jinin darajoji na da alhakin, bayyananniya da kuma daidaito wanda ta bayar da shawara da kuma buƙata. Waɗannan darajoji kuma sun haɗa da tabbatar da cewa NTD sun sake shiga cikin tsarin lafiya na duniya. Mambobin taron sun maraba da fifikon da aka ba da rawar gani a matsayin rawar da al'ummar NTD na iya da kuma yakamata su taka wajen kawo karshen kalubalge mafi girma kamar Karuwar Kwarewar Lafiya, One Health da barazanar canjin yanayi da ke karɓuwa. Wakilan da suka halarci taron a wuron sun sami damar jin tallan da aka shirya don cututtukan kariya a hedkwatar WHO.

**Pronunciation Guide (Approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be tricky without hearing it):**

*   **Taron:** Tah-ron
*   **Abokan Kasuwanci:** Ah-boh-kahn Kah-soo-wah-nsee
*   **yi kasancewa:** yee kah-suhn-seh-wah
*   **a karshen:** ah kar-shen
*   **babban aikin duba aiki:** Bah-bahn ah-keen doo-bah ah-kee
*   **Dabarar WHO:** Dah-bah-rar WHO
*   **Kaskantar da Cututtukan Kariya:** Kah-suhn-tahr dah Coo-too-too-kahn Kah-ree-yah
*   **A cikin watanni huɗu:** Ah chee-n wuh-tahn-nee hoo-doo
*   **WHO na ji daɗin:** WHO nah jee dah-deen
*   **rahotannin:** Rah-hoh-tahn-neen
*   **abokan kasuwancin da masu ruwa da tsari:** Ah-boh-kahn kah-soo-wah-nsee dah mah-soo roo-wah dah tzah-ree
*   **don tabbatar da cewa:** Don tuh-bah-tahr dah cheh-wah
*   **darajoji:** Dah-rah-joh-jee
*   **na da alhakin, bayyananniya da kuma daidaito:** Nah dah al-hah-keen, bay-yah-nahn-nee-yah dah koo-mah dye-dah-ee-toh
*   **wanda ta bayar da shawara da kuma buƙata:** Wahn-dah tuh by-yar dah shah-wah-rah dah koo-mah boo-keh-tah
*   **Waɗannan darajoji kuma sun haɗa da:** Wuh-dahn-nahn dah-rah-joh-jee koo-mah soon hah-dah dah
*   **tabbatar da cewa NTD:** tuh-bah-tahr dah cheh-wah NTD
*   **sake shiga cikin:** Sah-keh shee-gah chee-n
*   **tsarin lafiya na duniya:** Tzah-reen lah-fee-yah nah doon-yah
*   **Mambobin taron:** Mahm-boh-been tah-ron
*   **sun maraba da:** Soon mah-rah-bah dah
*   **fifikon da aka ba da rawar gani:** Fee-fee-koh dah ah-kah bah dah rah-war gah-nee
*   **al'ummar NTD:** Al-oo-muh-mar NTD
*   **na iya da kuma yakamata su taka:** Nah ee-yah dah koo-mah yah-koh-tah soo tuh-kah
*   **wajen kawo karshen kalubalge mafi girma:** Wuh-jen kah-wo kar-shen kah-loo-bah-lgeh mah-fee geer-mah
*   **Karuwar Kwarewar Lafiya:** Kah-roo-war Kwar-eh-war Lah-fee-yah
*   **One Health:** One Health (pronounced similarly to English)
*   **barazanar canjin yanayi da ke karɓuwa:** Bah-zah-nah-nar chahn-jeen yah-nah-yee dah keh kar-boo-wah
*   **Wakilan da suka halarci taron a wuron:** Wuh-kee-leen dah soo-kah hah-lahr-chee tah-ron ah woo-ron
*   **suna sami damar jin tallan:** Soo-nah sah-mee dah-mar jeen tuhl-lan
*   **da aka shirya don cututtukan kariya:** Dah ah-kah shee-rah don coo-too-too-kahn kah-ree-yah
*   **a hedkwatar WHO:** Ah heh-duh-kwah-tahr WHO

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **Formal Language:** I've used a relatively formal style of Hausa, appropriate for a document like this.
*   **"Partners’ Meeting":** Translated as "Taron Abokan Kasuwanci" (Meeting of Business Partners/Associates). This is a common and understandable way to express "partners" in a professional context.
*   **"Functional Review":** Translated as "aikin duba aiki" (work review process).
*   **"Neglected Tropical Diseases":**  Translated as "Cututtukan Kariya" (Diseases of Neglect/Protection). This is a standard term.
*   **"Embody the values":** Translated as "jinin darajoji" (possessing/having the values).
*   **"Repositioned":** Translated as "sake shiga cikin" (re-entering/re-integrating into).
*   **"Global Health Architecture":** Translated as "tsarin lafiya na duniya" (global health system).
*   **"Universal Health Coverage":** Translated as "Karuwar Kwarewar Lafiya" (Increased Health Experience/Access). This is a common rendering.
*   **"One Health":**  I've kept "One Health" as is, as it's increasingly used internationally, even in Hausa contexts.
*   **"Delegates attending in person":** Translated as "Wakilan da suka halarci taron a wuron" (Representatives who attended the meeting in person).
*   **"Exhibition":** Translated as "talla" (exhibition/display).

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and intended audience.
*   **Hausa Dialects:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, this translation should be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with experience in technical or medical terminology to ensure accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: A set of metal panels was commissioned to illustrate the 20 conditions that make up the NTD grouping, and these were accompanied by photographs and information illustrating the actions that have been put in place over the course of many decades to tackle them.
translations.reference: An dauki wasu Jerin shawarwari don killace yanayin 20 da ya haɗa da rukinin NTD, kuma waɗannan sun haɗa da hotuna da bayanai da ke nuna ayyukan da aka yi a cikin shekaru masu yawa don magance su.

translations.source: Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, 12–13 June 2023 Representatives of the global NTD community will gather in Geneva next week to participate in the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, which takes place in headquarters’ auditorium on 12-13 June 2023. The objectives of the meeting are to review progress on the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, as well as to engage in wide-ranging discussions around the vision for One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme. While previous global meetings of NTD partners were convened by WHO in 2007 and 2017, this third upcoming event is the first since the launch of the road map in January 2021. The WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 is a comprehensive framework that outlines targets, mechanisms for alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals and other global agendas and calls for strategic shifts in NTD approaches with the aim of ending the epidemic of neglected tropical diseases by 2030.
translations.reference: Taron Abokan nazarin Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na Duniya wadaanda aka yi sake (NTDs), 12 - 13 ga watan Yuni 2023 . Wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya za su hallara a Geneva mako mai zuwa don cuɗanya a cikin shirin (NTDs), wanda ke gudana a ɗakin taron hedikwatar, a 12-13 Yuni 2023. Makasudin taron shi ne duba ci gaba akan tsare - tsaren WHO don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana 2021- 2030 da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan NTD na duniya daga dukkanin ainihin cututtuka, da ra'ayoyi daban-daban, da kuma tattaunawa mai yawa dangane da hangen nesa wajwn gudanarwar WHO Na bai ɗaya, na s hirin ( NTD). Yayin da taron duniya da ya gabata na abokan huldar NTD, an tattauna da WHO a 2007 da 2017, wannan taron na uku da ke tafe shi ne na farko tun bayan kaddamar da sababbin tsare - tsare a cikin Janairu na 2021. Tsare -tsaren WHO don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafin rana 2021 - 2030 wani tsari ne mai mahimmanci wanda ke bayyana manifofi, hanyoyin tsara dabaru tare da Manufofin Ci gaba mai dorewa, da sauran ajandoji na duniya, an kuma yin kira dangane da cigaban NTD Na nan gaba, tare da da nufin kawo karshen annobar cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana nan da shekarar 2030.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Taronar Kungiyoyin Bada Agajin Cututtukan Tropical da Kewa a Duniya, 12–13 Yuni 2023**

Wakilan al'ummar duniya kan cututtukan tropical da kewa za su taro a Geneva makon nan domin shiga taron Kungiyoyin Bada Agajin Cututtukan Tropical da Kewa a Duniya, wanda zai gudana a fadar hedkwatar a karkashin auditorium 12-13 Yuni 2023.

Makamu na wannan taron su ne daidaita ci gaban da aka samu bisa ga hanyar sadarwa ta WHO kan cututtukan tropical da kewa 2021–2030, da kuma bunkasar fahimtar yadda ake aiwatar da ayyukan cututtukan tropical da kewa a duniya, daga dukkanin rawarin lafiya ta musamman da kuma ta dacewa da matsayin.  Hakanan, za a yi amshi tattaunawa mai karfi kan hangen nesa da ke da alaka da WHO daya da ke aiwatar da Kungiyar Cututtukan Tropical da Kewa a Duniya.

A da, taron duniya kan kungiyoyin abokan gaba kan cututtukan tropical da kewa an shirya ta WHO a shekarar 2007 da 2017, wannan taron na uku da zai zo, shi ne karo na farko tun bayan fitar da hanyar sadarwa a Janairu 2021.

Hanyar sadarwa ta WHO kan cututtukan tropical da kewa 2021–2030, ita ce kyakkyawan tsari da ke bayanin abubuwan da za a kaiwa karshe, hanyoyin da za a bi don daidaita da Malaman Ci Gaban Kula da Muhimman Abubuwan Duniya da sauran ayyukan duniya, da kuma bukatar canje-canje na hanyoyin da za a bi wajen kawar da cututtukan tropical da kewa zuwa shekarar 2030.

---

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Neglected Tropical Diseases"**: I translated this as "Cututtukan Tropical da Kewa." This is the standard Hausa terminology for these diseases.
*   **"Programme Partners’ Meeting"**: Translated as "Taron Kungiyoyin Bada Agajin..." which means "Meeting of Supporting Groups..." This is a common way to express "partners' meeting" in Hausa.
*   **"WHO road map"**: Translated as "hanyar sadarwa ta WHO" - "WHO's communication pathway/plan."  "Road map" doesn't have a direct equivalent in Hausa, so this is a functional translation.
*   **"Sustainable Development Goals"**: Translated as "Malaman Ci Gaban Kula da Muhimman Abubuwan Duniya" - "The Experts of Sustainable Development."
*   **"Cross-cutting perspectives"**: Translated as "ta dacewa da matsayin" - "that fits the position/perspective." This conveys the idea of a broader, overarching view.
*   **"One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme"**: Translated as "WHO daya da ke aiwatar da Kungiyar Cututtukan Tropical da Kewa a Duniya" - "One WHO implementing the Association of Tropical and Neglected Diseases in the World."
*   **Formal Language:** I've used a relatively formal style of Hausa, appropriate for an official document.
*   **Clarity:** I prioritized clarity and ensuring the meaning is easily understood by a Hausa-speaking audience.

translations.source: The meeting will focus on: reviewing current progress to achieving the 2030 targets; identifying the major gaps and challenges to reaching those targets; agreeing principles and practical steps for how to implement action towards the targets; galvanizing support and commitment from NTD partners to operationalize the shifts advocated in the road map and to achieve its targets; and
translations.reference: Tattaunawar za ta ta'allaka ne a kan: duba irin ci gaban da aka samu a yanzu don cimma muradun 2030; gano manyan giɓina da ƙalubalen da ake fuskanta wajen cimma waɗancan maƙasudan; yarda da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don yadda za a aiwatar da ayyuka don cimma manufa; tallafawa goyon baya da sadaukarwa daga abokan hulɗar NTD don aiwatar da canjin shawarwarin da aka bayar a tsare - tsare, don cimma burika ; da kuma

translations.source: planning together for a Global Action Plan 2025–2030. Over 300 participants in the meeting are expected to attend, either in-person or online. They will include representatives of the global NTD community, from countries and donors to implementing and technical partners, from academia to patients’ associations and all other entities and institutions involved in the fight against NTDs. An exhibition on neglected tropical diseases will take place in the mezzanine of the B building, just above the cafeteria. A set of metal panels will illustrate the 20 conditions grouped under the NTD umbrella and provide information on actions implemented to tackle their burden.
translations.reference: shiryawa a tare don gudanar da ayyukan Duniya na 2025 - 2030. Sama da mahalarta 300 a taron ana sa ran za su halarci, ko dai Ido da Ido ko kuma ta kafar sadarwa. Za su hada da wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya, daga kasashe da masu ba da gudummawa ga aiwatarwa da abokan aikin fasaha. Tun daga makarantun ilimi har zuwa ƙungiyoyin marasa lafiya da duk wasu ƙungiyoyi da cibiyoyi da ke da hannu a yaƙi da NTDs,. baje kolin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana, zai gudana a mezzanine na B building, kusa da wurin cin abinci. Jerin wasu fanel-fanel za su nuna yanayi 20 da aka haɗa a ƙarƙashin inuwar NTD tare da ba da bayanai a kan ayyukan da aka aiwatar don magance matsalolinsu.

translations.source: WHO announces winners of the 4th Health for All Film Festival 7 winning short films, 4 special mentions from the jury The World Health Organization has announced the official selection of this year’s winning films at its 4th Annual Health for All Film Festival, held at WHO Headquarters, Geneva. The event, attended in person and online by actors, producers and public figures, saw winning films announced for 7 different categories, while 4 films received special mentions from the jury.
translations.reference: WHO ta sanar da waɗanda suka yi nasara a bikin Kiwon Lafiya na 4 na Dukan Fina-Finai 7 sun lashe na gajerun fina-finai, ambaton 4 na musamman daga rukuni Na musamman ƙungiyar likitoci ta Duniya ta sanar da zaɓin zaɓaɓɓu na wannan shekarar, na gasar fina - finai , a taronta na kiwon lafiya na 4 ga dukkanin tarukan ingancin fina - finai da yake gudana a hedikwatar WHO , Geneva. taron wanda ’yan wasa da furodusoshi da manyan jama’a suka halarta Ido da Ido da kuma ta kafar sadarwa, an bayyana fina-finan da suka samu nasara a sassa daban-daban guda 7, yayin da fina-finai 4 suka sami ambato na musamman daga alƙalan gasa.

translations.source: This is the fourth year of the film festival and competition was no less fierce, with some 93 shortlisted films covering issues ranging from anxiety and depression through to the effects of climate change on health, as well as the health challenges of people with disabilities. The films were judged by a panel of distinguished professionals, artists and activists, including the renown actors, Sharon Stone and Alfonso Herrera, dance choreographer, Sherrie Silver, climate activist, Sophia Kianni and media personality, Adelle Onyango. They were joined by senior United Nations officials and WHO staff. “The Health for All Film Festival brings a human face to WHO’s scientific work,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Listening to the voices of people affected by health issues is a powerful way to raise awareness and improve our understanding of people’s experiences and this can help us advance towards health for all.”
translations.reference: Wannan ita ce shekara ta hudu ta gudanar da bikin fim, kuma gasar ba ta yi kasa a gwiwa ba, inda wasu fina-finai 93 da aka tantance waɗanda suka kunshi batutuwan da suka hada da damuwa da ƙunci a sakamakon tasirin sauyin yanayi a harkar lafiya, da kuma kalubalen kiwon lafiyar nakasassu. Wasu gungun kwararrun masana, masu fasaha da masu fafutuka ne suka tantance fina-finan, ciki har da fitattun 'yan wasan kwaikwayo, Sharon Stone da kuma Alfonso herrera, mawaƙin rawa, sherri silver, mai fafutukar Lura da sauyin, sophia kianni da cikakken ɗan media, adelle onyango. Sun hade da manyan jami'o'i da ma'aikatan kungiyar likitoci ta duniya. Taron ingancin fina-finai ya yi Jan hankali ga WHO, cewar daraktan daraktoci na WHO, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Sauraron muryoyin mutanen da al'amurran kiwon lafiya suka shafa dangane da matsalolin harkar lafiya, wata hanya ce mai karfi don wayar da kan jama'a da inganta fahimtarmu game da abubuwan da mutane ke fuskanta, kuma wannan zai iya taimaka mana mu bunƙasa kiwon lafiya zuwa gaba.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English document. I've aimed for accuracy and natural-sounding Hausa, keeping in mind the context of a film festival and health-related topics.  I've included some notes after the translation explaining some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Wannan shine shekarar ta huɗu na bikin fina-finai da gasa, kuma gasar ta kasance mai tsanani sosai, da fina-finai kimanin 93 da aka zaba suka ruƙoɓe batõ-batõ dã ya ƙunshi damuwa da cutar taho zuwa tasõrin sauyin yanayi kan lafiya, da kuma matsalolin lafiya da mutãne da nakasõ suka fãce. An ƙãrarin fina-finai ne ta hanyãrã wata ƙungiyar masõyãkõ, ƴãmãturã, da masu kasãntõ, ciki har da ƴãmãturãan mashãhuri, Sharon Stone da Alfonso Herrera, mai tsara rawa, Sherrie Silver, mai kasãntõ kan sauyin yanayi, Sophia Kianni, da kuma mai bayãni a kafofin watsa labãri, Adelle Onyango. An shãyu jãmãin su da jãmãin bãbbar kungiyar Majalisar Dãkãta da ma'aikatun WHO. "Bikin Fina-finai don Lafiya ga Dukkan Mutãne yana bawa aikin kimiyyar WHO fuska ta ɗãbiya," inãce Mai Gaba na WHO, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Sõƙãwa da murõyar mutãne da suka shafi matsalolin lafiya hanyã ce mai karfi don ƙirƙirar tabaran lafiya da ƙãrirƙi ga fahimtar mu kan abubuwan da mutãne ke fãcewa, kuma wannan zã iya taimaka mana don ci gaba zuwa lafiyar dukkan mutãne."

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Film Festival and Competition"**: I used "bikin fina-finai da gasa" which is a standard way to express this in Hausa.
*   **"Shortlisted Films"**: "fina-finai da aka zaba" - meaning films that were selected.
*   **"Anxiety and Depression"**: "damuwa da cutar taho" -  "damuwa" is anxiety, and "cutar taho" is depression.
*   **"Effects of Climate Change"**: "tasõrin sauyin yanayi" -  This is a common and understandable way to express this.
*   **"People with Disabilities"**: "mutãne da nakasõ" - A direct and clear translation.
*   **"Renown Actors"**: "ƴãmãturãan mashãhuri" - "mashãhuri" means famous/renowned.
*   **"Dance Choreographer"**: "mai tsara rawa" -  A straightforward translation.
*   **"Climate Activist"**: "mai kasãntõ kan sauyin yanayi" -  "kasãntõ" means activist.
*   **"Media Personality"**: "mai bayãni a kafofin watsa labãri" -  This describes someone who appears in the media.
*   **"Senior United Nations Officials"**: "jãmãin bãbbar kungiyar Majalisar Dãkãta" -  This refers to high-ranking officials.
*   **"WHO Staff"**: "ma'aikatun WHO" -  Direct translation.
*   **"Human Face"**: "fuska ta ɗãbiya" -  This conveys the idea of bringing a personal and relatable aspect to the work.
*   **"Raise Awareness"**: "ƙirƙirar tabaran lafiya" - This means to create health awareness.
*   **"Improve our Understanding"**: "ƙãrirƙi ga fahimtar mu" - This means to deepen our understanding.
*   **"Advance Towards Health for All"**: "ci gaba zuwa lafiyar dukkan mutãne" - A direct and clear translation.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Hausa has a rich vocabulary, but sometimes a direct translation doesn't capture the nuance. I've tried to prioritize clarity and naturalness within the context of the film festival and health themes.
*   **Terminology:**  Health-related terminology can be tricky. I've used commonly accepted Hausa terms, but it's always good to have a subject matter expert review the translation for accuracy.
*   **Dialectal Variations:** Hausa has different dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: From the official selection one “GRAND PRIX” is attributed for each of the three main competition categories: Universal Health Coverage, Health emergencies, and Better health and well-being, which align with WHO’s Triple Billion Targets. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress from the United States of America, producer and activist for health and humanitarian causes said: "I am delighted to be part of the Health for All Film Festival. This is about creating better awareness on crucial actions needed for reaching healthier living conditions around the world. The stories selected talk to us about the intrinsic value of good health and its access, and they advocate for universal health coverage.
translations.reference: Daga zaɓin alƙalan gasar , ɗayan 'yan gasar ana danganta shi ga ɗaya daga cikin ukun ɓangarorin gasar: Masu gamayyar kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya, Masu Lura da sashen tallafin gaggawa, masu Lura da Ingancin kiwon lafiya da walwala, waɗanda suka sanarwa da WHO biliyan uku wanda ake nema. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe da Emmy masu lashe lambar yabo ta 'yan gasa daga Amurka, furodusa kuma mai fafutukar kiwon lafiya da harkokin jin ƙai ya ce: "Na yi farin cikin kasancewa cikin bikin ingancin Fina-finai. Wannan ya kasance ne don samar da wayewa me kyau ,a Mahimman ƙoƙarin da ake buƙata don samun ingantaccen yanayi Na lafiya a duniya,. labarun da aka zaɓa suna magana da mu game da ainihin ƙimar lafiya da samun damarta, kuma suna ba da shawarar samar da gamayyar lafiya ta Duniya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Daga zaɓuɓɓukan da aka zaba, an ba da lambar yabo ta “GRAND PRIX” a kowanne ɗaya daga cikin manyan ƙididdigar gasa uku: Kwarewar Inganta Lafiya ta Kulla (Universal Health Coverage), Matsalolin Lafiya (Health emergencies), da Ingantaccen Lafiya da Kula (Better health and well-being), waɗanda ke da alaka da Burin Trililiyar WHO.  Sharon Stone, gwarzo mai kyautatawa a fina-finai, mai lashe lambobin yabo na Golden Globe da Emmy daga Amurka, mai gabatar da fina-finai kuma mai kasidantuwa kan al'amuran lafiya da jin dadin mutane, ta ce: "Ina farin ciki sosai da kasancewa na a bikin fina-finai na Lafiya ga Kowa.  Wannan ya kasance ne don ƙara wayar da kan jama'a akan ayyukan da suka fi kipa don cimma yanayi na rayuwa mai lafiya a duniya.  Ƙoƙarin da aka zaba sun nuna darajar lafiyar da ta ke nan, da samun damar samun ta, kuma suna goyon bayan kwarewar inganta lafiya ta kulla."

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"GRAND PRIX":** I've kept this in English as it's a specific award title and commonly understood.  Using a Hausa equivalent might lose the prestige associated with the original.
*   **"Universal Health Coverage," "Health emergencies," "Better health and well-being":** These are technical terms. I've tried to find the most accurate and understandable Hausa equivalents.  "Kwarewar Inganta Lafiya ta Kulla" is a direct translation of Universal Health Coverage. "Matsalolin Lafiya" is a common way to refer to Health Emergencies. "Ingantaccen Lafiya da Kula" is used for Better Health and Well-being.
*   **"WHO’s Triple Billion Targets":**  Translated as "Burin Trililiyar WHO" (WHO's Trillion Targets).
*   **"Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress":**  "Gwarzo mai kyautatawa a fina-finai, mai lashe lambobin yabo na Golden Globe da Emmy" - This phrasing is common in Hausa when describing award-winning actors.
*   **"Activist for health and humanitarian causes":** "Mai kasidantuwa kan al'amuran lafiya da jin dadin mutane" - This conveys the meaning of advocating for health and humanitarian issues.
*   **"Health for All Film Festival":** "Bikin fina-finai na Lafiya ga Kowa" - A straightforward translation.
*   **"Creating better awareness":** "Ƙara wayar da kan jama'a" - This is a common Hausa expression for raising awareness.
*   **"Intrinsic value":** "Darajar da ta ke nan" - This captures the essence of inherent value.
*   **"Advocate for":** "Suna goyon bayan" - Meaning "they support" or "they advocate for."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and intended audience.
*   **Terminology Consistency:**  For technical documents, it's crucial to establish and maintain consistent terminology.
*   **Review by Native Speakers:**  Ideally, a native Hausa speaker (preferably someone familiar with health/development terminology) should review the translation for accuracy and naturalness.
*   **Adaptation:** Sometimes, a direct translation isn't the best approach.  It might be necessary to adapt the phrasing to make it more culturally appropriate and understandable for the target audience.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: Universal Health Coverage is a very important right, it’s a human right for everyone around the world. "Four special prizes were also given for a Student-produced film, a film on Climate Change and Health, a film on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights and a Very Short Film. The theme of mental health featured heavily in this year’s winning entries, including a powerful and moving short film from Sweden about anxiety and depression. The film, set to a stirring soundtrack, featured a series of actors expressing different stages of anxiety and how it can manifest itself. The overall message was that you are not alone in experiencing negative thoughts and that it is okay to acknowledge such feelings.Another winning film, from Bangladesh, features a young boy who was exposed to lead from a local factory.
translations.reference: Gamayyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya hakki ne mai matuƙar mahimmanci, haƙƙin ɗan adam ne ga kowa da kowa a duniya. An kuma bayar da kyautuka na musamman guda hudu na fim din da dalibai suka shirya a kan sauyin yanayi da lafiya, da fim kan lafiyar jima'i da haifuwa da hakkoki da kuma gajeren fim. Taken lafiyar kwakwalwa ya fito sosai a cikin shigarwar nasara ta wannan shekara, gami da gajerun fim mai ƙarfi da motsi daga mutanen ƙasar Sweden game da damuwa da baƙin ciki. Fim ɗin, wanda aka tsara da sauti mai ban sha'awa, ya ƙunshi jerin 'yan wasan kwaikwayo da ke bayyana matakan damuwa daban-daban da kuma yadda zai iya bayyana kansa. Gabaɗayan saƙon shi ne cewa ba kai kaɗai bane ke fuskantar munanan tunani kuma yana da kyau a gane irin wannan tunanin. Wani fim ɗin da aka yi nasara, daga ƙasar Bangladash, ya nuna wani yaro matashi da aka bayyana da jagoran wata masana'anta.

Fina-finan, da ke da waƙa mai ban mamaki, ya nuna wasu masoyan da ke nuni da matakan damuwa da yadda ta iya bayyana.  Sakamakon da aka samu shine cewa ba ka daɗe a cikin fiyayar tunanin rashin farin ciki kuma yana da kyau a amsa irin wannan zama.  Wani fina-finan da ya lashe, daga Bangladesh, ya nuna yaro mai shekaru da aka haɗa masa da iskarin gawaye daga babbar masana'anta a yankin.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: Basic energy access lags amid renewable opportunities, new report shows Global energy access gap persists: 675 million people without electricity, 2.3 billion people reliant on harmful cooking fuels A new report by the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO), released today, finds that the world is not on track to achieve the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 for energy by 2030. This year marks the halfway point for achieving SDGs by 2030. SDG 7 is to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy.
translations.reference: Samun makamashi na asali yana da alaƙa a tsakanin damar sabuntawa, sabon rahoton ya nuna An ci gaba da samun gibin samun wutar lantarki a duniya: Mutane miliyan 675 ba su da wutar lantarki, mutane biliyan 2.3 sun dogara da abubuwan girki masu ɗumama. Wani sabon rahoton da hukumar kula da ikon ƙasa da ƙasa (IEA), da hukumar sabunta ikon ƙasa da ƙasa (IRENA), da hukumar kididdiga ta majalisar dinkin duniya (UNSD) da bankin duniya, da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO), suka fitar a yau, ya nuna cewa duniya bata kan hanyar cimma burin ci gaba mai dorewa (SDG) 7 don samun iko nan da 2030. A wannan shekara ta nuna rabin lokaci don cimma SDGs nan da 2030. SDG 7 shi ne tabbatar da samun dama Kai tsaye,, abin dogaro, da dorewa da iko na zamani.
