translations.source: Globally, Benin and Mali join 15 other countries that have been validated by WHO for having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem. These are Cambodia, China, the Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo and Vanuatu. Trachoma elimination using WHO’s SAFE strategy Both Benin and Mali implemented the WHO-recommended SAFE strategy to eliminate trachoma with the support of WHO and partners. The SAFE strategy consists of surgery to treat late trachoma complications; antibiotics to clear infection; facial cleanliness; and environmental improvement, particularly improving access to water and sanitation, to reduce transmission.
translations.reference: A duniya bakiɗaya, Benin da Mali sun bi sahun wasu ƙasashe 15 da WHO ta tabbatar da cewa sun kawar da cutar ta trachoma a matsayin matsalar lafiyar jama'a. Waɗannan ƙasashen su ne Cambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuriyar Musulunci ta Iran, Jamhuriyar Dimokuradiyyar Jama'ar Lao, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo da Vanuatu. Kawar da cutar Trachoma ta amfani da dabarun kariya na hukumar lafiya ta duniya wato WHO SAFE strategy. Dukkan ƙasashen na Benin da Mali sun aiwatar da dabarun SAFE da WHO ta ba da shawarar amfani da su don kawar da cutar ta trachoma tare da tallafin WHO da ƙungiyoyin haɗin guiwa. Dabarar SAFE ta ƙunshi tiyata don magance matsalolin trachoma a matakin ƙarshe; maganin rigakafi don warkar da infekshan; tsabtar fuska; da inganta muhalli, musamman inganta samun ruwa da tsaftar muhalli, don rage yaɗuwa.

translations.source: Through the International Trachoma Initiative, the antibiotic azithromycin is donated by Pfizer to elimination programmes implementing the SAFE strategy. Benin has integrated trachoma elimination interventions with those implemented against other neglected tropical diseases (NTDs), under the umbrella of the National Programme for Communicable Diseases. Trachoma is the third NTD to be eliminated in Benin, after dracunculiasis (in 2009) and gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (in 2021). Mali has conducted trachoma impact and surveillance surveys and rolled out interventions to achieve elimination targets, despite security challenges in the northern regions of the country and sociopolitical upheavals in recent years. Trachoma is the first NTD to be eliminated in Mali, which therefore now joins a global group of 47 countries that have eliminated at least one NTD.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar International Trachoma Initiative ta ƙasa da ƙasa, kamfanin Pfizer ya ba da gudummuwar maganin azithromycin don aiwatar da tsarin na SAFE. Ƙasar Benin ta haɗa dabarun kawar da cutar ta trachoma tare da waɗanda aka aiwatar kan wasu cututtuka na wurare masu zafi da ba a kula da su (NTDs), a ƙarƙashin inuwar Hukumar Kula da Cututtuka masu Yaɗuwa ta Ƙasa. Trachoma ita ce cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) ta uku da aka kawar da ita a Benin, bayancutar dracunculiasis (a shekarar 2009) da cutar gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (a shekarar 2021). Ƙasar Mali ta gudanar da binciken kwakwaf game da tasiru da sa ido tare da ƙaddamar da matakan shawo kan matsalar, duk da ƙalubalen tsaro a yankunan arewacin ƙasar da kuma tashe-tashen hankula a tsakanin al'umma a 'yan shekarun nan. Cutar ta Trachoma ita ce ta cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) ta farko da aka kawar a ƙasar Mali, don haka yanzu ta shiga cikin rukunin ƙasashe 47 na duniya waɗanda suka kawar da aƙalla cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) guda ɗaya.

Benin ta haɗa ayyukan kawar da ciwon ido da na da alaka da sauran cututtukan banza a duniya (NTDs), a ƙarƙashin Kungiyar Kasa don Cututtukan da za'a iya yaduwa. Cigon ido shine babban cuta na uku da za a kawar da shi a Benin, bayan cutar dracunculiasis (a shekarar 2009) da cutar gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (a shekarar 2021). Mali ta gudanar da bincike kan tasirin da ciwon ido ke haɗa da kuma binciken goyan bayan, kuma ta gabatar da ayyuka don cimma burin kawar da cutar, duk da matsalolin tsaro a yankin arewa na ƙasa da taswirar siyasa-jam'iyya a cikin shekarun da suka gabata. Cigon ido shine babban cuta na farko da za a kawar da shi a Mali, wanda ke janyewa zuwa kungiyar duniya ta kasashe 47 da suka kawar da aƙalla cuta ɗaya na banza a duniya.

translations.source: “These are impressive public health achievements,” said Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall, Director of the WHO Global NTD Programme. “Benin and Mali demonstrate how strong political will, cross-sector integration, surveillance and community engagement can work in concert to achieve disease elimination.” Significant progress has been made in the fight against trachoma over the past few years. The number of people requiring antibiotic treatment for trachoma in the WHO African Region fell by 84 million, from 189 million in 2014 to 105 million as of June 2022. Note to the editor: Trachoma remains a public health problem in 41 countries (as of June 2022) with an estimated 125 million people living in areas requiring interventions against the disease.
translations.reference: "Waɗannan nasarori ne masu ban sha'awa a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a, in ji Dr Ibrahima Soce Fall, Daraktan shirin na WHO Global NTD. "Benin da Mali sun nuna yadda jajircewa a gwamnatance, haɗin kan ɓangarori daban-daban, sa ido da kuma haɗa kan al'umma ke aiki tare don cimma nasarar kawar da cututtuka." An samu gagarumin ci gaba a yaƙi da cutar ta trachoma a cikin 'yan shekarun da suka gabata. Adadin mutanen da ke buƙatar maganin cutar ta trachoma a yankin da WHO ke kula da shi a Afirka ya ragu da miliyan 84, daga miliyan 189 a shekarar 2014 zuwa miliyan 105 a watan Yunin 2022. Tsokaci ga Edita: Trachoma har yanzu matsalar lafiyar jama'a a cikin ƙasashe 41 (a watan Yuni 2022) inda kimanin mutane miliyan 125 da ke zaune a yankunan ke buƙatar yin rigakafin cutar.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

"Wannan babbar kwarewar lafiya ce ta jama'a," in ji Dr. Ibrahima Socé Fall, Daraktan Shirin WHO na NTD a duniya. "Benin da Mali sun nuna yadda ƙaƙƙauyar ra'ayi na siyasa, haɗa-hadɗar saƙo, bincike, da amsa da al'umma za su haɗu don cimma kawar da cuta." Kwarin gani ya auku a yakin yaki da trachoma a cikin shekarun da suka gabata. Adadin mutanen da ke buƙatar jefa antibiotics don trachoma a Yankin Afirka na WHO ya ragu da miliyan 84, daga miliyan 189 a shekarar 2014 zuwa miliyan 105 kamar yadda aka kalli a watan Yuni na 2022. Bayanai ga edita: Trachoma har yanzu al'amarci lafiya ce a kasashe 41 (kamar yadda aka kalli a watan Yuni na 2022) tare da kimanin miliyan 125 mutane da ke rayuwa a yankuna da ke buƙatar hanyoyin magance cutar.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Impressive public health achievements" - "Wannan babbar kwarewar lafiya ta jama'a ce":**  I chose "kwarewar lafiya ta jama'a" for "public health achievements" as it's a common and understandable phrase in Hausa for public health initiatives. "Babbar" means "great" or "impressive."
*   **"NTD Programme" - "Shirin WHO na NTD a duniya":**  NTD (Neglected Tropical Diseases) is often kept as is, especially in formal contexts, as it's a technical term.  "a duniya" means "worldwide" or "global."
*   **"Political will" - "Ƙaƙƙauyar ra'ayi na siyasa":** This is a standard translation for "political will."
*   **"Cross-sector integration" - "Haɗa-hadɗar saƙo":**  "Haɗa-hadɗa" means "integration" or "combining." "Saƙo" refers to sectors or areas.
*   **"Surveillance" - "Bincike":**  "Bincike" is a good general term for surveillance in this context, implying monitoring and investigation.
*   **"Community engagement" - "Amsa da al'umma":** "Amsa" means "response" or "engagement."  "da al'umma" means "with the community."
*   **"Disease elimination" - "Kawar da cuta":** "Kawar da cuta" directly translates to "elimination of disease."
*   **"Significant progress" - "Kwarin gani ya auku":** This phrase conveys the meaning of "significant progress" in a natural Hausa way.
*   **"Note to the editor" - "Bayanai ga edita":** A direct and clear translation.
*   **"Interventions against the disease" - "Hanyoyin magance cutar":** "Hanyoyin" means "ways" or "methods," and "magance cutar" means "to address the disease."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: Trachoma is found mainly in the poorest and most rural areas of Africa, Central and South America, Asia, the Western Pacific and the Middle East. The WHO African Region is disproportionately affected by trachoma with 105 million people living in at-risk areas, which represents 84% of the global trachoma burden. Trachoma is the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. The disease is caused by infection with the bacterium Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person through contaminated fingers, fomites and flies that have come into contact with discharge from the eyes or nose of an infected person.
translations.reference: Ana samun cutar ta Trachoma ne musamman a yankunan karkara mafi talauci a Afirka, Tsakiya da Kudancin Amurka, Asiya, Yammacin Pacific da Gabas ta Tsakiya. Yankin Afirka da WHO ke lura da shi yana fama da cutar ta trachoma, inda mutane miliyan 105 ke zaune a yankunan da ke fuskantar haɗarin, wanda ke wakiltar kashi 84% adadin masu cutar ta trachoma a duniya. Trachoma ita ce cutar da ke kan gaba wajen haifar da makanta a duniya. Cutar na samuwa ne sakamakon kamuwa da ƙwayar cutar Chlamydia trachomatis. Cutar tana yaɗuwa tsakanin mutane ne ta hanyar ta gurɓatattun hannaye, kayan sawa da na amfani da ƙudaje waɗanda suka yi mu'amala ruwan da ke fita daga idanu ko hancin mai cutar.

translations.source: Environmental risk factors for trachoma transmission include poor hygiene, overcrowded households, inadequate access to water or use of proper sanitation facilities. In 1996, WHO launched the WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020). With other partners in the Alliance, WHO supports country implementation of the SAFE strategy and strengthening of national capacity through epidemiological assessment, monitoring, surveillance, project evaluation and resource mobilization contributing towards elimination of trachoma as a public health problem. The road map, endorsed by the World Health Assembly in 2020 through its decision 73(33), sets 2030 as the new target date for global elimination.
translations.reference: Ababen hatsari da ke tattare da muhalli da ke haddasa yaɗuwar cutar ta trachoma sun haɗa da rashin tsafta, cunkoso a gidaje, rashin isasshen ruwa ko wuraren amfani masu tsafta. A shekara 1996, WHO ta ƙaddamar da Gidauniyar Haɗaka don kawar da Trachoma ta Duniya nan da shekara ta 2020 (GET2020). Tare da sauran abokan tarayya a cikin Gidauniyar ta haɗaka, WHO ba da goyon baya wajen aiwatar da dabarun SAFE da kuma ƙarfafa yunƙurin ƙasa ta hanyar tantance cututtuka, lura da sa ido, tantance ayyuka da tattara kayan aiki da ke taimakawa wajen kawar da cutar ta trachoma a matsayin matsalar lafiyar jama'a. Tsarin gudanarwar, wanda Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da shi a shekarar 2020 ta hanyar shawara mai lamba 73 (33) da ka yanke, ta sanya 2030 a matsayin sabon lokacin da ake nufin kawar da cutar a faɗin duniya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Abubuwan haɗin gida da ke haifar da haɗarin mutane kan cutar trachoma sun haɗa da tabarbancewar dakin aiki, yawan jama'a a gida, rashin samun isassun ruwa ko amsar da aka yi amshi da ayyukan tsafta. A shekarar 1996, WHO ta ƙara domin samar da WHO Alliance don kawar da cutar trachoma a duniya zuwa shekarar 2020 (GET2020). Tare da sauran abokan tarayya a Alliance, WHO tana tallafawa aiwatar da SAFE a ƙasashe da ƙarfafa ƙarfin kasa ta hanyar aiyuka, saka ido, bincike, aiyuka da ƙididdigar albarkatunci don kawar da cutar trachoma a matsayin matsala ta lafiya ta jama'a. Jagorar, da Majalisar Kula da Lafiya ta duniya ta amince da ita a shekarar 2020 ta hanyar ƙa'idar ta 73(33), ta kafa shekarar 2030 a matsayin sabon kwanan wani don kawar da cutar trachoma a duniya.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Abubuwan haɗin gida:** Ah-boo-boo-wan hah-deen gee-dah
*   **tabarbancewar dakin aiki:** Tah-bar-bance-war dah-keen ah-ee-kee
*   **yawan jama'a a gida:** Yah-wan jah-mah-ah ah gee-dah
*   **rashin samun isassun ruwa:** Rah-sheen sah-moon ee-sah-sun roo-wah
*   **ansar da aka yi amshi da ayyukan tsafta:** An-sar dah ah-kah yee am-shee dah ah-yoo-koon tsah-fah
*   **WHO:** Wee-O
*   **Alliance:** Al-lyahn-seh
*   **SAFE:** Sah-feh
*   **Majalisar Kula da Lafiya ta duniya:** Mah-jah-lee-sar Koo-lah dah Lah-fee-yah tah doon-yah
*   **ƙa'idar:** Kah-ee-dar

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Environmental risk factors"**: Translated as "Abubuwan haɗin gida da ke haifar da haɗarin mutane" (Things related to the home that cause risk to people). This is a common and understandable way to express this concept in Hausa.
*   **"Poor hygiene"**: Translated as "tabarbancewar dakin aiki" (deterioration of the work area/environment).  This captures the essence of poor hygiene in a way that resonates with Hausa speakers.
*   **"Overcrowded households"**: Translated as "yawan jama'a a gida" (many people in the house).  A straightforward and clear translation.
*   **"Inadequate access to water"**: Translated as "rashin samun isassun ruwa" (lack of enough water).
*   **"Proper sanitation facilities"**: Translated as "ansar da aka yi amshi da ayyukan tsafta" (using facilities for cleanliness).
*   **WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma (GET2020)**:  I kept "WHO" as is (common practice).  "Alliance" is translated as "Alliance" as well.  GET2020 is also kept as is, as it's an acronym.
*   **SAFE strategy**:  "SAFE" is kept as is, as it's an acronym.
*   **Epidemiological assessment, monitoring, surveillance, project evaluation and resource mobilization**: These were translated using standard Hausa terms for these concepts, aiming for accuracy and clarity.
*   **World Health Assembly**: Translated as "Majalisar Kula da Lafiya ta duniya" (World Health Council).
*   **Road map**: Translated as "Jagorar" (The Guide/Plan).
*   **Decision 73(33)**: Kept as is, as it's a reference number.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and intended audience.
*   **Local Terminology:**  Ideally, a native Hausa speaker familiar with public health terminology should review this translation to ensure it uses the most appropriate and widely understood terms.
*   **Dialectal Variations:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form, but a speaker from a specific region might prefer slightly different wording.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: 152 million babies born preterm in the last decade Of every 10 babies born, 1 is preterm – and every 40 seconds, 1 of those babies dies Preterm birth rates have not changed in the past decade in any region of the world The impacts of conflict, climate change, COVID-19 are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere Action is needed urgently to improve the prevention of preterm birth, alongside better care for affected babies and their families
translations.reference: Jarirai miliyan 152 ne aka haifa kafin lokacin haihuwarsu ya yi. 1. A cikin kowane jarirai 10 da ake haifa, 1 bakwaini ne - kuma kowane sakan 40, 1 na waɗannan jariran yana mutuwa. Yawan jariran da ake haifa kafin lokacin haihuwarsu ya yi bai sauya ba a cikin shekaru goma da suka wuce a duk sassa na duniya. Tasirin rikice-rikice da na sauyin yanayi da ma na cutar Covid-19 duk ƙarin ƙalubale ne ga mata da jarirai a ko'ina. Akwai buƙatar ɗaukar matakan gaggawa domin dakatar da haihuwar jarirai kafin lokaci ya yi tare da samar da cikakkiyar kulawa ga jariran tare da iyalan da hakan ya auku gare su.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

A shekarar goma da suka gabata, miliyan 152 na jarirai sun haihu a gaba da lokaci. Daga kowace jarirai 10 da aka haihu, daya yana haihu a gaba da lokaci – kuma kowane dakika 40, daya daga wadannan jarirai ya mutu.  Kwamshin haihuwa na haihu a gaba da lokaci bai canza a cikin shekarar goma da suka gabata a kowace yankin duniya.  Tasirin rikici, canjin yanayi, da COVID-19 suna ƙara haɗin gaske ga mata da jarirai a ko'ina.  Ya zama dole a dauki mataki nan da nan don inganta hana haihuwa a gaba da lokaci, da kuma kula da jarirai da aka shafar da iyalansu.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **A:**  ah
*   **shekarar:** sheh-kah-rah
*   **goma:** goh-mah
*   **da:** dah
*   **suka:** soo-kah
*   **gabata:** gah-bah-tah
*   **miliyan:** mee-lee-ahn
*   **jarirai:** jah-ree-rye
*   **haihu:** hah-ee-hoo
*   **gaba da lokaci:** gah-bah dah loh-kah-chee
*   **kowa:** koh-wah
*   **yankin:** yahng-keen
*   **duniya:** doo-nyah
*   **rikici:** ree-kee-chee
*   **canjin:** chahn-jeen
*   **yanayi:** yah-nah-yee
*   **COVID-19:** koh-veed-nah-teen
*   **ƙara:** kah-rah
*   **haɗin gaske:** hah-deen gahs-keh
*   **mata:** mah-tah
*   **ya zama dole:** yah zah-mah doh-leh
*   **dauki mataki:** dow-kee mah-tah-kee
*   **nan da nan:** nahn dah nahn
*   **inganta:** eeng-ahn-tah
*   **hana:** hah-nah
*   **kula da:** koo-lah dah
*   **shafar:** shah-far
*   **iyalansu:** ee-yah-lahn-soo

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Preterm":** I used "haihu a gaba da lokaci" which literally means "birth before time." This is a common and understandable way to express "preterm" in Hausa.
*   **"Of every 10 babies born...":**  I used "Daga kowace jarirai 10 da aka haihu..." which translates to "From every 10 babies born..."  This is a natural phrasing in Hausa.
*   **"Every 40 seconds":** "Kowane dakika 40" - straightforward translation.
*   **"Rates have not changed":** "Kwamshin haihuwa...bai canza" - "The rate of preterm birth has not changed."
*   **"Impacts of...":** "Tasirin..." - "The effect/impact of..."
*   **"Action is needed urgently":** "Ya zama dole a dauki mataki nan da nan" - This is a more emphatic way of saying "Action is needed urgently" in Hausa.  It conveys a sense of necessity.
*   **"Alongside better care":** "da kuma kula da..." - "and with better care..."
*   **Tone:** I aimed for a formal and informative tone, appropriate for a document about health statistics.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  If this document is part of a larger series or campaign, ensuring consistency with previous translations is crucial.
*   **Target Audience:**  Consider the literacy level and background of the intended audience.  While I've aimed for clarity, further simplification might be needed for some audiences.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  **Crucially, this translation *must* be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker, preferably someone with experience in medical or health-related translations.**  Nuances in language and cultural understanding can be difficult to capture without a native speaker's expertise.  They can also check for idiomatic expressions that would make the translation sound more natural.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: An estimated 13.4 million babies were born pre-term in 2020, with nearly 1 million dying from preterm complications, according to a new report released by United Nations agencies and partners today. This is equivalent to around 1 in 10 babies born early (before 37 weeks of pregnancy) worldwide. Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth, produced by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) together with PMNCH -- the world’s largest alliance for women, children, and adolescents, sounds the alarm on a “silent emergency” of preterm birth, long under-recognized in its scale and severity, which is impeding progress in improving children’s health and survival. The report includes updated estimates from WHO and UNICEF, prepared with the London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, on the prevalence of preterm births. Overall, it finds that preterm birth rates have not changed in any region in the world in the past decade, with 152 million vulnerable babies born too soon from 2010 to 2020.
translations.reference: Bisa ƙiyasi, jarirai miliyan 13.4 aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata a shekarar 2020 kuma kusan su miliyan 1 daga cikinsu suka rasu a saboda hakan, a cewar wani rahoton da ma'aikatun Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya suka fitar a kwanan nan. Wannan adadi daidai yake da 1 cikin jararai 10 da aka haifa da wuri (kafin mako 37 da ɗaukar ciki) a duniya baki ɗaya. Daftarin Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth wanda Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta samar da haɗin guiwar Hukumar Kula da Ƙananan Yara ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya wato UNICEF tare da PMNCH wadda ita ce haɗaka mafi girma tsakanin mata da yara da kuma matasa a duk faɗin duniya ya abin da ke buƙatar ɗaukin gaggawa da ba san da shi ba na haihuwar jarirai kafin lokacin da ya kamata, wanda ba a fahimci yawansa da tsananinsa ba, wanda kuma yana dakushe cigaba da ma rayuwar jarirai. Rahoton ya ƙunshi bayanai da aka samo daga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da ta UNICEF wanda makarantar kula da tsafta da cutuka a yankuna masu zafi ta Landan ta tsara a kan yawaitar jariran da ake haihuwa kafin lokacin da ya kamata. A gaba ɗaya, ta gano cewa yawan jariran da ake haifa kafin lokaci bai sauya ba a kowane yanki na duniya a cikin shekaru goma da suka wuce, inda aka samu jarirai miliyan 152 da aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata tsakanin shekarar 2010 zuwa ta 2020.
translations.hypothesis:
Here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Translation:**

Kimaɗaya da adadin kimanin miliyan 13.4 an haihu daga baya a shekarar 2020, kuma kusan miliyan ɗaya suka mutu sakamakon cutan da ke faruwa a lokacin haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa, a cewar rahoton da kungiyoyin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya da abokansu suka fitar a yau. Wannan ya yi daidai da kusan bayi ɗaya a kowace dari-dari na yara da aka haihu da wuri (kadanin mako 37 na juna biyu) a duniya.  "An haihu da wuri: shekarar aiwatar da ayyukan da suka dace da haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa," wanda aka shirya ta Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da Kungiyar Kyautato Yaran Duniya (UNICEF) tare da PMNCH -- mafi girman kungiyar al'umma a duniya don mata, yara, da matasa, na kiran hankali kan "gajeriyar matsala" na haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa, wacce ta kasance a baya ana ɗaukar ta a matsayin wata matsala mara mahimmanci, kuma tana hana ci gaba da inganta lafiya da rayuwar yara. Rahoton ya haɗa da kimamomin sabbin abubuwan da WHO da UNICEF suka shirya, a shirye tare da Makarantar Kwararin Lafiya da Tropical Medicine ta London, akan yawan haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa.  Gaba daya, rahoton ya gano cewa kaso na haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa bai canza a kowace yankin duniya a cikin shekarar da ta gabata, tare da miliyan 152 na yara marasa taimako da aka haihu da wuri daga shekarar 2010 zuwa 2020.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Pre-term"**: I used "haihu daga baya" (haihu da ta fiye da izuwa) which is a common and understandable way to express "pre-term birth" in Hausa.
*   **"Preterm complications"**: Translated as "cutan da ke faruwa a lokacin haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa" - complications arising during preterm birth.
*   **"Decade of Action"**:  "Shekarar aiwatar da ayyukan da suka dace da haihuwa da ta fiye da izuwa" -  Year of action for preterm birth.
*   **"Silent Emergency"**: "Gajeriyar matsala" - A silent crisis/emergency.
*   **"Under-recognized"**: "Ana ɗaukar ta a matsayin wata matsala mara mahimmanci" - Considered as a problem without importance.
*   **"Impeding progress"**: "Tana hana ci gaba" - Hindering progress.
*   **"Vulnerable babies"**: "Yara marasa taimako" - Vulnerable/helpless children.
*   **Word Choice:** I tried to use relatively common Hausa words to ensure broad understanding.
*   **Structure:** I've attempted to maintain the sentence structure as closely as possible to the original English while ensuring it reads naturally in Hausa.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and target audience.
*   **Terminology:**  Medical terminology can be particularly challenging.  It's ideal to consult with Hausa-speaking medical professionals to ensure accuracy.
*   **Review:**  It's *essential* to have a native Hausa speaker review the translation for accuracy, fluency, and cultural appropriateness.  I am an AI and cannot guarantee perfect accuracy.

translations.source: Preterm birth is now the leading cause of child deaths, accounting for more than 1 in 5 of all deaths of children occurring before their 5th birthday. Preterm survivors can face lifelong health consequences, with an increased likelihood of disability and developmental delays. Survival gaps by region, income, race Building from a landmark report on the topic in 2012, this new Born too soon “decade” report provides a comprehensive overview of the prevalence of preterm birth and its profound impact on women, families, societies and economies. Too often, where babies are born determines if they survive.
translations.reference: Haihuwar jarirai kafin lokacin da ya kamata shi ne yanzu ya fi haddasa mace-macen yara, inda yake haddasa mutuwar yaro guda duk cikin su 5 da suke rasu kafin su shekara 5. Jariran da aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata sukan fuskanci ƙalubale na tsawon rayuwa, inda sukan iya samun wata naƙasa ko kuma rashin girma yadda ya kamata. Bambancin rayuwa dangane da yanki ko matsayin tattalin arziƙi ko kuma launin fata. La'akari da wani shahararren rahoto game da lamarin a shekara ta 2012, wannan daftarin na Born too soon ya fayyace yadda ake samuwar jarirai bakwani (waɗanda aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata) dalla-dalla tare da tasirin da hakan yake da shi a kan mata da iyalai da al'umma da kuma tattalin arziƙi. A yawancin lokuta, inda aka haifi jarirai shi yake tasiri wajen rayuwarsu ko rashinta.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Haɓakar haihuwa (preterm birth) yanzu haka ita ce babban abin da ke haifar da mutuwar yara, ta fi kowane ɗaya a cikin kusan mutum biyar na yara da ke mutuwar kafin ranar haihuwa ta su ta karshe.  Yaran da suka tsiraiki haɓakar haihuwa na iya fuskantar matsala da lafiya a rayuwarsu, da karuwar yuwuwar lalacewa da jinkaka ci gaba.  Tsaka-tsakin rayuwarsu ya bambanta bisa ga yanki, kudin shiga, da launin kai.  Daga rahoton tarihi kan wannan batu a shekarar 2012, wannan sabon rahoton "Born too soon" na shekaru goma yana ba da babban bayani kan yawan haɓakar haihuwa da kuma tasirinsa na sosai akan mata, iyalai, al'umma, da kuma tattalin arzaki.  Kusan ko'ina, inda aka haihu shine ke kafa ko yaro zai tsiraiki.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Preterm birth"**: I used "Haɓakar haihuwa" which is a commonly used term in Hausa for preterm birth.
*   **"Leading cause"**: Translated as "babban abin da ke haifar da" (the main thing that causes).
*   **"More than 1 in 5"**:  Translated as "ta fi kowane ɗaya a cikin kusan mutum biyar" (more than one in about five people). This is a common way to express fractions in Hausa.
*   **"Lifelong health consequences"**: Translated as "matsala da lafiya a rayuwarsu" (problems with their health in their lives).
*   **"Increased likelihood"**: Translated as "karuwar yuwuwar" (increased possibility).
*   **"Disability and developmental delays"**: Translated as "lalacewa da jinkaka ci gaba" (disability and delayed development).
*   **"Survival gaps by region, income, race"**: Translated as "Tsaka-tsakin rayuwarsu ya bambanta bisa ga yanki, kudin shiga, da launin kai" (Their survival rate differs based on region, income, and race).
*   **"Born too soon"**: I kept the English phrase "Born too soon" as it is, as it's often used in reports and is recognizable.  I added quotation marks to indicate it's a title.
*   **"Decade report"**: Translated as "rahoton shekaru goma" (ten-year report).
*   **"Comprehensive overview"**: Translated as "babban bayani" (a large explanation/overview).
*   **"Societies and economies"**: Translated as "al'umma, da kuma tattalin arzaki" (communities and economy).
*   **"Too often, where babies are born determines if they survive"**: Translated as "Kusan ko'ina, inda aka haihu shine ke kafa ko yaro zai tsiraiki" (Almost everywhere, where a baby is born determines if the child will survive).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: The report notes that only 1 in 10 extremely preterm babies (<28 weeks) survive in low-income countries, compared to more than 9 in 10 in high-income countries. Gaping inequalities related to race, ethnicity, income, and access to quality care determine the likelihood of preterm birth, death, and disability, even in high-income countries. Southern Asia and sub-Saharan Africa have the highest rates of preterm birth, and preterm babies in these regions face the highest mortality risk. Together, these two regions account for more than 65% of preterm births globally. The report also highlights that the impacts of conflict, climate change and environmental damage, COVID-19, and rising living costs are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere.
translations.reference: Rahoton ya yi nuni da cewa, jariri 1 ne kawai a cikin 10 ke rayuwa idan an haife shi a lokacin da ko kusa lokacin haihuwarsa bai yi ba (ƙasa da mako 28 da ɗaukar ciki) a ƙasashe masu ƙaramin ƙarfi, saɓanin a ƙasashe masu arziƙi inda adadin ya kai jararai 9 a cikin 10. Cike giɓin rashin daidaiton da ake samu ta fuskar launin fata da ƙabila da tattalin arziƙi da ma samun hanyoyin kiwon lafiya nagartattu shi zai taimaka a rage samun jarirai bakwaini da rage mace-macensu da kuma samun naƙasarsu hatta a ƙasashe masu yalwar arziƙi. Kudancin nahiyar Asiya da yankin Afirka kudu da Sahara su suka fi yawan jarirai bakwaini sannan kuma a nan ne aka fi samun mutuwarsu. Waɗannan yankuna guda biyu idan aka tara su sun kwashe kashi 65 a cikin ɗari na yawan jarirai bakwaini na duk faɗin duniya. Har'ilayau, rahoton ya bayyana cewa tasirin rikice-rikice da na sauyin yanayi da gurɓacewar muhalli da na cutar Covid-19 dakuma tsadar rayuwar barazan ce ga mata da jarirai a ko'ina.

Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Rahoton ya bayyana cewa, a cikin kasashe da ke da matsalar talauci, daya bisa dari biyu (1/10) na jaruman da suka haihu sosai kafin lokaci (<maggayi 28) suna jiran rayuwarsu, alhalin sama da biyu bisa dari goma (9/10) ke faruwa a kasashen da suka fi kowa arzaki.  Babban bambanci da ke danganta da launin kai, asali, kudin shiga, da samun kulawar lafiya mai inganci ke ƙarƙawar yiwuwar haihuwa da wuri, mutuwar, da nakasawa, har ma a kasashen da suka fi kowa arzaki. Kudu Masarautar Asiya da Kudu gabas ta Sahara Afirka suna da mafi yawan haihuwa da wuri, kuma jaruman da suka haihu da wuri a waɗannan yankuna suna fuskantar mafi girman barazanar mutuwa.  Duk wannan yankuna biyu suna da kusan sama da kashi 65% na haihuwa da wuri a duniya.  Rahoton ya kuma nuna cewa tasirin rikici, canjin yanayi, lalacewar muhalli, COVID-19, da tsawaitawar farashi suna ƙara haɗaɗɗiyar barazanar ga mata da jarana a ko'ina.

*   **suna fuskantar mafi girman barazanar mutuwa:** soo-nah foo-skahn-tahr mah-fee gear-mahn bah-zah-nah-ru moo-too-wah

translations.source: For example, air pollution is estimated to contribute to 6 million preterm births each year. Nearly 1 in 10 preterm babies are born in the 10 most fragile countries affected by humanitarian crises, according to a new analysis in the report. Maternal health risks, such as adolescent pregnancy and pre-eclampsia, are closely linked to preterm births. This underlines the need to ensure access to sexual and reproductive health services, including effective family planning, with high-quality care in pregnancy and around the time of birth. Agenda for action: more country investment and parent-led activism
translations.reference: Misali, an ƙiyasta cewa gurɓatacciyar iska kawai tana haddasa haihuwar jarirai bakaini miliyan 6 a duk shekara. A wani sabon nazari na rahoton an fahimci cewa, kusan bakaini 1 a duk su 10 da aka haifa za a iske yana a cikin ƙasashen da yawan rikice-rikice ya fi addabar su ne. Matsalolin laulayin ciki da suke samuwa sakamakon ɗaukar ciki da wuri ga budurwa ko hawan jinin da ya samu sanadiyar juna-biyu suna da dangantaka sosai da haihuwar bakwaini. Wannan ya sa akwai buƙatar a inganta kula da lafiya ta fuskar zamantakewar aure da samun haihuwa, ciki har da tazarar haihuwa da samar da cikakkiyar kulawa ga mata masu ciki da kuma lokacin haihuwarsu. Matakan da za a ɗauka:ƙasashe su ƙara zuba jari sannan iyaye su kuma su fito domin yin gwagwarmaya a kan lamarin.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices.

**Hausa Translation:**

Misali, ana kiyayyata cewa cutar isasshen ruwan sama na haifar da miliyan 6 na haihuwa da suka gabata karshe kowace shekara. Kusan bayi biyu bisa dari biyu na yara mazaunawa da suka gabata karshe suna farawa a kasashe goma mafi kasala wanda abubuwan rikici na bil'adama ke shafar, a cewar sabuwar bincike a rahoton. Hadduwai na lafiya ga uwa, irin su jinin yara da pre-eclampsia, suna da dangantaka mai karfi da haihuwa da suka gabata karshe. Wannan ya nuna buƙatar tabbatar da samun isassun ayyukan lafiya da kuma lafiya na jima'i da haihuwa, gami da tsara iyalawa mai tasiri, tare da kula da inganci a lokacin juna biyu da kusa da lokacin haihuwa. Tsarin aiki: karuwar saka hannun jari na kasashe da kuma kokawar iyaye.

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Misali" (For example):** A direct and common translation.
*   **"cutar isasshen ruwan sama" (air pollution):**  "Cutar" means "disease" or "problem," and "isasshen ruwan sama" literally translates to "excessive water from the sky," which is the common way to refer to air pollution in Hausa.
*   **"haihuwa da suka gabata karshe" (preterm births):** This is the standard Hausa term for preterm births.
*   **"kasashe goma mafi kasala" (10 most fragile countries):** "Mafi kasala" means "most fragile" or "most vulnerable."
*   **"abubuwan rikici na bil'adama" (humanitarian crises):** A direct translation, commonly used.
*   **"Hadduwai na lafiya ga uwa" (Maternal health risks):** "Hadduwai" means "risks" or "hazards." "Ga uwa" means "for the mother."
*   **"jinin yara" (adolescent pregnancy):** This is the common Hausa term.
*   **"pre-eclampsia":**  This is often kept as is, as it's a medical term.  A more descriptive translation would be very long and less commonly understood.
*   **"tabbatar da samun isassun ayyukan lafiya da kuma lafiya na jima'i da haihuwa" (ensure access to sexual and reproductive health services):** This is a fairly literal translation to maintain accuracy.
*   **"tsara iyalawa mai tasiri" (effective family planning):** "Tsara iyalawa" means "family planning." "Mai tasiri" means "effective."
*   **"kula da inganci" (high-quality care):** "Kula" means "care" or "attention." "Da inganci" means "with quality."
*   **"Tsarin aiki" (Agenda for action):** A direct translation.
*   **"karuwar saka hannun jari na kasashe" (more country investment):** "Karuwa" means "increase." "Saka hannun jari" means "investment."
*   **"kokawar iyaye" (parent-led activism):** "Kokawa" means "effort" or "struggle."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  If this text is part of a larger document or campaign, the terminology might need to be adjusted to be consistent with existing Hausa translations.
*   **Target Audience:**  Consider the literacy level and background of the intended audience.  Simpler language might be needed for a broader audience.
*   **Review by Native Speakers:**  It's *crucial* to have this translation reviewed by native Hausa speakers, especially those familiar with the subject matter (health, development). They can identify any awkward phrasing, inaccuracies, or culturally inappropriate terms.
*   **Glossary:** For ongoing projects, creating a glossary of key terms is highly recommended to ensure consistency.



I hope this translation and explanation are helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: The past decade has also seen a growth of community activism on preterm birth and stillbirth prevention, driven by networks of parents, health professionals, academia, civil society, and others. Throughout the world, groups for affected families of preterm birth have been at the forefront of advocating for access to better care and policy change and supporting other families. Leading up to the International Maternal Newborn Health Conference, in Cape Town, South Africa from 8-11 May, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA and PMNCH are calling for the following actions to improve care for women and newborns and mitigate risks from preterm births: Increased investments: Mobilizing international and domestic resources to optimize maternal and newborn health, ensuring high quality care is provided when and where it is needed. Accelerated implementation: Meeting country targets for progress through implementing established national policies for maternal and newborn care.
translations.reference: A shekaru goma da suka gabata, an kuma samu cigaba ta fuskar gwagwarmayar al'umma kan rage haihuwar bakwaini da yin ɓarin ciki, inda iyaye da ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya da manyan makarantu da ƙungiyoyi masu fafutuka da sauransu suka shiga tsundum aka dama da su. A duk faɗin duniya, ƙungiyoyin iyalai na waɗanda suka haifi bakwaini a baya su ne a kan gaba wajen yin kira da a inganta kula tare da sanya tsare-tsare sannan kuma da taimaka wa wasu iyalan da hakan ya auku gare su. Har zuwa lokacin da aka gudanar d Taron Ƙara wa Juna Ilimi a Kan Kula da Jarirai da aka yi a Cape Town ta Afirka ta Kudu tsakanin 8-11 ga watan Mayu, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da ta UNICEF da ta UNFPA da ku ta PMNCH duk sun yi ta kiraye-kiraye kan inganta lafiyar mata da ta jarirai da kuma lalubo hanyoyin daƙile haihuwar bakwaini kamar haka: Ƙara zuba jari: Samar da kuɗaɗe daga ciki da wajen ƙasa domin inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai ta hanyar tabbatar da an bayar da kulawar da ta dace a wurare mabuƙata kuma a lokacin da ya dace. Gaggauta aiwatarwa: Cimma burin ƙasa na cigaba ta hanyar aiwatar da tsare-tsaren da aka yi na inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai.

A duniya dukkanin gaba, kungiyoyin da ke da'awa ga iyalai da aka shafar da haihuwa da wuri sun kasance a gaba wajen neman samun isassun kula da canjin manufofin gwamnati da kuma tallafawa sauran iyalai. **Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Mobilizing resources":** I used "Tura kudin da ke nan" (moving available funds).

translations.source: Integration across sectors: Promoting education through the life cycle; supporting smarter economic investments, with co-financing across sectors; strengthening climate adaptation responses across the life-course; and advancing the coordination and resilience of emergency systems. Locally driven innovation: Investing in locally led innovation and research to support improvements in quality of care and equity in access. Quotes: Prof. Joy Lawn, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine Co-lead, Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023) and Born too soon (2012) "This new report shows that the cost of inaction over the last decade was 152 million babies born too soon.
translations.reference: Ƙarfafa dukkan ɓangarori: Tallafa wa ilimi a dukkan matakan rayuwa, samar da tallafi ta fuskar tattalin arziƙi a dukkan fannoni, ƙarfafa wa jama'a fuskantar sauyin yanayi sannan kuma da ƙarfafa tare-tsaren taimakon gaggawa. Samar da ƙirƙire-ƙirƙiren cikin gida: Zuba jari a ƙirƙire-ƙirƙire da bincike na cikin gida domin taimaka wa cigaba ta fuskar inganta tare da daidaita samar da kulawa gare su. Tsakure: Farfesa Joy Lawn, Makarantar Kula da Tsafta da Samar da Magunguna ga Ƙasashe masu Yanayin Zafi ta Landan. Jagorantar Daftarin Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023)da na Born too soon (2012). "Wannan sabon rahoton ya nuna cewa rashin ɗaukar matakan da suka dace ya haddasa haiuwar jarirai bakwaini har miliyan 152.

**Hausa Translation:**

Haɗin gwiya a duk fannoni: Haɓaka ilimi a duk tsawon rayuwa; tallafawa saka-sakar kuɗi na tattalin arziƙi mai ƙarfi, tare da haɗin kuɗi a duk fannoni; ƙarfafa amsar jurewar canjin yanayi a duk tsawon rayuwa; da haɓaka da haɓaka tsarin amsa da damar jinƙai a lokacin gaggawa. Ƙwarin gwiwar kananan hukumomi: saka-sakar kuɗi a cikin sabbin Ƙwarin gwiwar kananan hukumomi da bincike don tallafawa inganta ingancin kula da jinya da kuma daidaito a samun dama.  Kwamaron: Profeza Joy Lawn, Makarantar Kwarin Gwiwar Lafiya da Kula da Cututtuka ta London, Shugaba na haɗin gwiya, An haihu da wuri: shekaru goma na aiki kan haihuwa da wuri (2023) da An haihu da wuri (2012) "Wannan rahoton sabo ya nuna cewa farashin rashin aiki a cikin shekaru goma da suka gabata shine manyan yara 152 da suka haihu da wuri."

**Explanation of Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Integration across sectors" - "Haɗin gwiya a duk fannoni":**  "Haɗin gwiya" directly translates to "collaboration" or "integration." "Duk fannoni" means "across all sectors."
*   **"Promoting education through the life cycle" - "Haɓaka ilimi a duk tsawon rayuwa":** "Haɓaka" means "promoting" or "developing." "Duk tsawon rayuwa" means "throughout the life cycle."

"Saka-sakar kuɗi" means "investment." "Mai ƙarfi" means "smarter" or "stronger." "Tare da haɗin kuɗi" means "with co-financing."
*   **"Strengthening climate adaptation responses across the life-course" - "Ƙarfafa amsar jurewar canjin yanayi a duk tsawon rayuwa":** "Ƙarfafa" means "strengthening." "Amsar jurewar canjin yanayi" means "climate adaptation responses."
*   **"Advancing the coordination and resilience of emergency systems" - "da haɓaka da haɓaka tsarin amsa da damar jinƙai a lokacin gaggawa":** "Haɓaka" is used again for "advancing." "Tsarin amsa" means "emergency system." "Damar jinƙai" means "resilience." "A lokacin gaggawa" means "during emergencies."
*   **"Locally driven innovation" - "Ƙwarin gwiwar kananan hukumomi":** This is a tricky one. "Ƙwarin gwiwa" can mean "initiative" or "drive."  "Kananan hukumomi" refers to local authorities or communities.  The phrasing aims to convey the idea of locally-led initiatives.
*   **"Investing in locally led innovation and research" - "saka-sakar kuɗi a cikin sabbin Ƙwarin gwiwar kananan hukumomi da bincike":** "Bincike" means "research."

The names and titles are transliterated as closely as possible. "An haihu da wuri" is the Hausa translation of "Born too soon."
*   **"This new report shows that the cost of inaction over the last decade was 152 million babies born too soon." - "Wannan rahoton sabo ya nuna cewa farashin rashin aiki a cikin shekaru goma da suka gabata shine manyan yara 152 da suka haihu da wuri.":** "Wannan rahoton sabo" means "This new report." "Farashin rashin aiki" means "the cost of inaction." "Manyan yara" means "million babies."

**Important Notes:**

*   **Hausa Dialects:** Hausa has several dialects. This translation aims for a standard, widely understood form.

translations.source: While some regions are more affected, preterm birth threatens health progress in every country. Greater investment in the care of vulnerable newborns can save millions of families from heartbreak. More work is also needed to prevent preterm birth, which will also improve progress in reducing stillbirths and maternal deaths. Together these twin tracks of preterm prevention and care will produce healthier individuals and societies to deliver on economic and social development. Our next generation depends on us all acting now -- the investment may not be small but the returns on this investment will be major for every country"
translations.reference: Duk da yake wasu yankuna sun fi fuskantar matsalar, amma haihuwar yara bakwaini ƙalubale ne ga kiwon lafiya a kowace ƙasa. Ƙarin zuba jari a kan kula da jarirai zai taimaka wajen tsare iyalai da dama daga damuwa. Akwai kuma buƙatar yin aiki tuƙuru domin hana haihuwar jarirai bakwaini wanda hakan kuma zai taimaka wajen rage yin ɓari da mutuwar mata masu ciki. Waɗannan tagwayen hanyoyi na hana haihuwar jarirai bakwaini idan suka haɗu, za su taimaka wajen samar da lafiyayyun mutane da al'ummomi waɗanda za su kawo wa ƙasa cigaba ta fuskar tattalin arziƙi da zamantakewa. Ya'ya da jikokinmu sun dogara da abin da muka yi a yau --- jarin da za mu saka ko da ba mai yawa ba ne zai iya zama mai yawa ga kowace ƙasa.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English text, aiming for clarity and natural flow. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

"Duk da wasu yankuna na jinya sosai, haihuwa ta tashi da wuri (preterm birth) ta barazuba ga ci gaban lafiya a kowace kasa. Karuwar saka hannun jari a kula da jarirai marasa ƙarfi na iya kawar da miliyoyin iyalai daga bakin ciki. Hakanan, ya zama dole a yi ƙarin aiki don hana haihuwa ta tashi da wuri, wanda zai inganta ci gaba da kawar da mutuwar yara da kuma mutuwar mata. Tare da waɗannan hanyoyin biyu na hana haihuwa ta tashi da wuri da kuma kula da su, za a samar da mutane da al'umma lafiya don cimma ci gaban tattalin arzaki da zamantawa. Turarar mu ta gaba tana jiranmu mu yi aiki yanzu – saka hannun jari ba zai zama ƙanƙara ba, amma kwarewar wannan saka hannun jari zai zama babban amsa ga kowace kasa."

translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) “There is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.”
translations.reference: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Ɗaya daga cikin marubuta na Born Too Soon sannan kuma jagora na Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) na ƙasa. A yanzu kenan babu dalili na yin shiru. Yanzu muna da wuƙa da nama da ilimi na sauya makomar jariranmu da wannan abin zai iya shafa. Ina mai alfahari da ganin a yanzu gwamnatin ƙasata ta mayar da hankali a kan aiwatarwa hatta a yankunan karkara. Shekaru goma masu zuwa suna iya zama, kai dole ne ma su zama daban dangane da masu fuskantar haihuwar bakwaini.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow. I've included some notes afterward explaining some of the choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Daktar Nahya Salim, daga Tanzaniya: Maris Mai Saura Kasa da Zamanin Karshe, marubuci kuma shugaba a matakin kasa na Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360). "Yanzu babu wata dalili da za ta sa mu yi shiru. Mun samu a hannunmu kayan aiki da ilmi don canza sakamakon al'amuran jaranmu mafi raunana. Ina farin ciki in ga gwamntata a yanzu tana saka kuɗi da kuma amincewa da aiwatar da wannan aiki, har ma a ƙananan kauyuka. Saƙon shekarar goma mai zuwa na iya zama daidai kuma ya kamata ya bambanta ga wadanda ke fuskantar haihuwa da ta fiye da zamanin karshe, anan da kuma a ko'ina."

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Born Too Soon"**: Translated as "Maris Mai Saura Kasa da Zamanin Karshe." This is a common and understandable way to express "born prematurely" in Hausa.
*   **"co-author"**: Translated as "marubuci" (writer/author).
*   **"national lead"**: Translated as "shugaba a matakin kasa" (leader at the national level).
*   **"Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360)"**:  I've kept the English name (NEST360) in parentheses after the Hausa explanation, as it's likely the organization is known by its English acronym.
*   **"There is now no excuse for silence"**: Translated as "Yanzu babu wata dalili da za ta sa mu yi shiru." (Now there is no reason for us to be silent).
*   **"devices and the knowledge"**: Translated as "kayan aiki da ilmi" (tools and knowledge).
*   **"most vulnerable newborns"**: Translated as "jaranmu mafi raunana" (our most vulnerable babies).
*   **"investing and committed to implementation"**: Translated as "saka kuɗi da kuma amincewa da aiwatar da wannan aiki" (investing and agreeing to implement this work).
*   **"rural areas"**: Translated as "ƙananan kauyuka" (small villages/rural areas).
*   **"preterm birth"**: Translated as "haihuwa da ta fiye da zamanin karshe" (birth that is beyond the time limit/premature birth).
*   **"here and everywhere"**: Translated as "anan da kuma a ko'ina" (here and everywhere).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context. If this is for a particular audience (e.g., healthcare professionals, general public), the language might need to be adjusted further.
*   **Terminology:**  Medical terminology can be tricky. I've used common Hausa terms, but it's always a good idea to have a native Hausa speaker with medical expertise review the translation.
*   **Natural Flow:** I've tried to make the Hausa translation sound natural and idiomatic.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other documents you'd like me to translate.

translations.source: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO “Ensuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.” Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF “After every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Darektan kula da lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai da yara da matasa da harkar da ta shafi tsufa na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO). Tabbatar da an samar da ingantacciyar kulawa ga waɗannan mitsitsan jarirai da iyalansu ya zama wajibi domin inganta kula da yara da rage mace-macensu. Akwai buƙatar samun cigaba ta fuskar kula da jarirai bakwaini --- wannan na nufin cewa dole kowace mace mai ciki ta iya samun damar halartar asibiti kafin da kuma yayin da take ɗauke da juna biyu domin gano tare da fuskantar ƙalubale. Steven Lauwerier, Darektan Kiwon Lafiya (a.i.), UNICEF Babban rashi da damuwa ne ke biyo bayan dukkan mutuwar jariri bakwaini.

**Hausa Translation:**

Darakta Anshu Banerjee, Daraktan Doka akan Lafiya ta Mahaifa, Jarirai, Yara da Matsalolin Shekarance a ajiya a WHO, ya ce: "Kafa ingancin kula da wannan ƙaramar ƙaramar yara da iyalansu ya zama abubuwa da suka fi mahimmanci don inganta lafiyar yara da rayuwarsu. Steven Lauwerier, Daraktan Lafiya (a.i.), UNICEF ya ce: "Bayan kowane mutuwar yaron da ya haihu da kyar, akwai hanyar asarar da kaunar zuciya."

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Dr."**:  I used "Darakta" which is the standard Hausa equivalent for "Doctor."
*   **"Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing"**: This was a long title. I tried to keep the core meaning while making it sound natural in Hausa.  "Doka akan Lafiya ta Mahaifa, Jarirai, Yara da Matsalolin Shekarance a ajiya" is a reasonable approximation.

*   **"tiniest, most vulnerable babies"**:  "ƙaramar ƙaramar yara" (very small children) captures the sense of vulnerability and small size.
*   **"preterm births"**:  "haihuwa da ta gabata" (births that happened before time) is the standard Hausa term.
*   **"a.i."**: I kept this as is, as it's a common abbreviation.
*   **"trail of loss and heartbreak"**:  "hanyar asarar da kaunar zuciya" (a path of loss and heartbreak) attempts to convey the emotional impact.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Without more context about the document's purpose and audience, it's difficult to make absolutely perfect translation choices.

translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. It’s time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.” Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH “Born too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth – the world’s largest cause of death of children under the age of five.
translations.reference: Duk da cigaba da aka samu a duniya ta fuskoki da dama, babu wata cigaba ta a-zo-a-gani da aka samu dangane da yawan jarirai bakwaini da kuma rage mace-macensu. Yawan yana razanarawa. Lokaci ya yi na inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai bakwaini domin tabbatar da samun ingantacciyar lafiya da kyakkyawar rayuwa gare su. Helga Fogstad, Babban Darekta na PMNCH Daftarin Born too soon ya nuna wajibcin ƙara zuba jari da sa-ido yadda ya kamata a kan haihuwar jarirai bakwaini wanda shi ne babban dalilin mutuwar yara 'yan ƙasa da shekara biyar.

Kuraɗin da aka samu ya yi matuƙar wahala. translations.source: Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. “By working together in partnership – governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals – we can sound the alarm about this “silent emergency”, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. ”Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of Jalen’s Gift Foundation “Our foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and that’s when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Cigaban da ake samu dangane da kiwon lafiyar mata masu ciki da na jarirai da ma samuwar ɓarin ciki na mai haƙin rijiya ne, ga shi kuma ya ƙara samun koma-baya sakamakon cutar Covid-19 da sauyin yanayi da ƙaruwar rikice-rikice da kuma tsadar rayuwa. Idan muka haɗa kai, gwamnatocinmu da masu hannu da shuni da ma'aikatu masu zaman kansu da ƙungiyoyi masu fafutuka da iyaye da kuma ma'aikatan lafiya, za mu iya fito da wannan abin da ke buƙatar gaggawa har ya zama cikin muhimman abin da ɓangaren kiwon lafiya na ƙasa ya sa a gaba ta yadda za a gina al'umma ta hanyar tallafa wa iyalai da ƙungiyoyi da ma ɓangarori na tattalin arziƙi a ko'ina. "Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: iyaye ga Jalen Foster, kuma waɗanda suka kafa Jalen's Gift Foundation An kafa gidauniyarmu ne bayan an da muka rasa ɗanmu mai suna Jalen Foster wanda bakwaini ne da aka haifa tun cikinsa yana mako 27 sakamakon harbuwar da ya yi da ƙwayar cuta mai suna streptococous nau'I na B. Rashin ɗan namu ya kasance babban tashin hankali a gare mu kuma babu wanda a tallafa mana daga cikin al'umma, don haka muka ga zai dace a faranta wa iyalan da suka rasa ɗa.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Matsalciyar halin da ke faruwa a kan lafiya ta mata da sabobin haihuwa, da kuma hana mutuwar yara a ciki (stillbirths), na kasancewa a mataki daya, kuma an jinkai a gaba ta hanyar hadadin cutar COVID-19, canje-canje na yanayi (climate change), karuwar rikice-rikice, da tsarin farfajiyar rayuwa.  "Idan mu hada juna a matsayin abokan tarayya - gwamnati, masu ba da taimako, masu kasuwanci, kungiyoyin farar haka, iyaye, da ma'aikata na lafiya - za mu iya kiran hankali kan wannan "gajeriyar matsala" (silent emergency), da kawo burin hana haihuwa da kure mata a gaba a cikin ayyukan lafiya da ci gaban kasa, da gina babban mutum ta hanyar tallafawa iyalai, al'umma, da tattalin arzaki a ko'ina." - Gabriela da Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, Amurka: iyayen Jalen Foster, da wadattauraresu na Jalen's Gift Foundation.

"Kwamatinmu ta kulla bayan rasa danmu, Jalen Foster, wanda ya mutu a ciki a makon 27 saboda cutar da ta fara ne a lokacin juna biyu, wacce ake kira da group B streptococcus. translations.source: We didn’t want other families to feel like we did – alone. So, we started Jalen’s Gift Foundation to help other families going through a loss, to provide multiple free services, such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” ***Download the Born too soon media resources

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun kai wani jirgin sama mai dauke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa Sudan Haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) sun kai wani jirgin sama mai ɗauke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa ƙasar Sudan. wani jirgi ɗauke da kayayyakin jinya da tiyatar gaggawa da muhimman magunguna sun isa filin jirgin saman port Sudan da safiyar yau. kayan waɗanda darajar su ta kai dalar Amurka 444 000, shine na farko da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta iya kaiwa ta jirgin sama zuwa Sudan tun bayan ɓarkewar rikicin. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta rarraba kayayyakin kowon lafiya kafin ƙaruwar rikicin.
translations.hypothesis:

**Hausa Translation:**

Falakin Makokin Kariya da WHO sun fitar da kayan aikin likita na bukatar gaske zuwa Sudan.  Jamusiyar Hadaddiyar Daular Laraba (UAE) da Kungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) a yau sun fitar da tan 30 na kayan aikin likita na bukatar gaske zuwa Sudan.  Jirgin sama da ke dauke da kayan aiki don kula da raunuka, aikin tiyattawa na gaggawa, da kuma abubuwan da suka dace don likita ya isa babbar babbar tasha ta Port Sudan da safiya.  Kayan aikin, da darajar Amurka $444,000, shi ne karo na farko da WHO ta samu damar fitar da kayan aiki zuwa Sudan ta sama tun lokacin da rikicin ya barke. WHO ta rarraba kayan aiki zuwa asibitai kafin rikicin ya karu.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can vary by region):**

*   **Falakin Makokin Kariya:**  Fah-lah-kin Mah-koh-kin Kah-ree-yah
*   **da:**  dah

*   **Kayan aikin:**  Kah-yan eye-keen

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **Formal Language:** I've used a relatively formal style of Hausa, appropriate for news reporting.

*   **"Jamusiyar..." and "Kungiyar...":** These are the Hausa words for "Federation" and "Organization" respectively, used to translate "United Arab Emirates" and "World Health Organization."
*   **"Tan":**  This is the Hausa word for "ton" (metric ton).

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Regional Variations:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.

translations.source: These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAE’s humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.
translations.reference: Waɗancan sun ƙare ne ƴan kwanaki kaɗan bayan an bada adadin waɗanda suka jikkata. Aikewa da jirgin na zuwa ne a wani mataki na cigaba da bada agajin da haɗaɗaɗiyya daular larabawa(UAE) ke yi na bada tallafawa wa al’ummar Sudan da ke nuna ƙarfafa dangatakar ta da ƙasar Sudan, musamman ma ta la’akari da halin da ƙasar ke ciki a halin yanzu. Har ila yau faɗaɗa ayyukan jinƙai na haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa tare da jadadda alaƙar ta da sauran ƙasashe dangane da ƴan uwantaka da jajircewarta na taimakon wasu a lokutan rikici da halin gaggawa. Ƙaramar ministar haɗin gwiwar ƙasa da ƙasa Dakta Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy tace haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa (UAE) na cigaba da yin aiki kafaɗa da kafaɗa da hukumar lafiya ta duniya domin tabbatar da nasarar tura muhimman ayyuka da dabarun ayyukan agajin gaggawa da magunguna da abinci don taimakawa wajen magance halin da ake ciki a yanzu na rikicin Sudan. A daidai lokacin da ake kira ga dukkan rikice rikice da juna da su gaggauta tsagaita wuta tare da kawar da matsalar da ke janyo wa al'ummar Sudan wahalhalun da ba za a iya mantawa da su ba, Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa ta tsaya tsayin daka wajen bayar da taimako da taimako ga kasashe a lokutan bukata.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English document. I've aimed for accuracy and natural-sounding Hausa, keeping in mind the context of humanitarian aid and international relations.  I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

An kasance da wannan matsala bayan ƴan kwana, saboda yawan wadanda suka ji rauni. Aika fanar da isassun abubuwan da suka dace ta hanyar tashi da jirgin ya zo a matsayin wani bangare na kokawar daukar rawar kai da UAE ke yi don tallafawa al'ummar Sudan, kuma ya nuna dangantakar da ta ke da ita da Sudan, musamman a wannan lokaci da kasar ke fafatawa. Tallafin yana kasancewa wani ci gaba na hangen niyar kasuwanci ta UAE kuma yana ƙarfafa dangantakarsa da sauran ƙasashe bisa ga ɗaliban mutane da kuma amincewarsa da taimakon wasu a lokacin kuncantar da almara da yanayi na gaggawa. Dr. Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Ministan Jihar don Hadin Gwiwar Kasa da Kasa, ta ce UAE "ta ci gaba da aiki bisa ga aiki tare da Kungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya don tabbatar da aiwatar da nasarar ayyukan logistik na gaba don aika taimakon likokin likoki da abinci na gaggawa don taimaka wajen warware matsalar a Sudan. Ya kasance tare da kiran duk bangar da ke cikin rikicin da ya faru don janye yaki da kuma kawar da yanayin da ke haifar da ciwon zuciya ga al'ummar Sudan, UAE na jinin amincewarta da samar da taimako da taimako ga kasashe a lokacin bukata.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Exhausted"**: I translated this as "An kasance da wannan matsala" which means "This problem persisted/continued."  Directly translating "exhausted" can be awkward in this context.
*   **"Dispatch of the aircraft"**:  I used "Aika fanar da isassun abubuwan da suka dace ta hanyar tashi da jirgin" which means "Sending the necessary items by flying the plane." This is a more natural way to express this in Hausa.
*   **"Continuous relief efforts"**: Translated as "kokawar daukar rawar kai" which means "effort of taking the lead."
*   **"Reflects its deep relations"**: Translated as "ya nuna dangantakar da ta ke da ita" which means "shows the relationship it has."
*   **"Humanitarian vision"**: Translated as "hangen niyar kasuwanci" which means "commercial vision."
*   **"Human fraternity"**: Translated as "ɗaliban mutane" which means "students of people."
*   **"Critical logistics operations"**: Translated as "ayyukan logistik na gaba" which means "forward logistics operations."

translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict – and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.” The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa ta mayar da hankali ne musamman wajen samar wa kungiyoyin da suka fi fama da matsalar halin da ake ciki a Sudan, musamman ma marasa lafiya, da yara, da tsoffi, da mata wadanda suka fi fuskantar hadarin daga rikice-rikicen da ke ci gaba da faruwa. mafi matsananciyar gibi a cikin samar da magunguna da abinci. Ƙididdigar jin ƙai na Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa tana nufin cewa ta tabbatar da cewa ta ci gaba da isar da saƙo ga duniya ƙaƙƙarfan sadaukarwarta ga ƙarfafa zaman lafiya, tsaro da kwanciyar hankali, ba kawai a wani yanki ba, har ma a duk faɗin duniya, tare da abokan hulɗarta da al'ummomin duniya. kasar na ci gaba da taimakawa al'ummar Sudan a lokutan rikici. Kayayyakin kiwon lafiyar sun haɗa da isassun raunuka, kayan aikin tiyata na gaggawa, da magunguna masu mahimmanci don kai ga mutane 165,000 da ke cikin matsananciyar buƙatar agajin jin kai. Cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya a faɗin ƙasar sun ba da rahoton cewa, kayayyakin kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum sun ƙare kuma basa samun damar shiga shaguna saida magunguna a ƙasar. Daga cikin tallafin hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) ta tura ƙwararrun likitocin gaggawa guda biyu da ke tafiya tare da tabbatar da cewa an rarraba waɗannan kayayyaki nan take zuwa manyan cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya goma sha uku don tallafawa wa ma’aikatan kiwon lafiya da kuma bada kulawa ga masu buƙatar agaji.

translations.source: WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, “The WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses – delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: Hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) tana da tan talatin na kayan agaji na zazzaɓin cizon sauro da cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa kamar ciwon suga hawan jini da kuma yanayin da ka iya haifar da asarar rai matuƙar ba’a ɗauki mataki ba. An gama shirya waɗannan haɗe da wajen ledar jini 23,000 a kamfanin jigila na duniya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya a International Humanitarian City, sannan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tana ta neman hanyoyin da za ta kai waɗannan kaya zuwa Sudan da gaggawa, tare da haɗin guiwar Ma'aikatar Lafiya ta Sudan. Babban daraktan shirin agajin gaggawa ta hukumar lafiya ta duniya Dakta Micheal Ryan yace shirin agajin gaggawa na kamafani na jigila na duniya na hukumar lafiya ta duniya da haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa ta zama cibiyar samar da taimakon gaggawa a faɗin duniya. Taimakawa wa ƙasashe sama da ɗari da arba’in na a yankuna shida na hukumar lafiya ta duniya kamfanin na samar da hanyar rayuwa ga mambobin jihohin da ke fuskantar matsalolin kiwon lafiya da suka taso sanadiyyar ɓarkewar cututtuka bala’o’i kamar ambaliyar ruwa girgizar ƙasa da kuma tasirin rikicin akan tsarin kiwon lafiya. Tallafin da haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa ke bayarwa ya baiwa hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) kasancewa a sahun gaba a matakin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya da kuma isar da ƙwararrun likitoci ga masu buƙata a ko’ina a kuma duk lokacin da ake buƙata.

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the world’s most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.” For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, “The World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies.
translations.reference: A ƙoƙarinta na gana ƙaƙƙarfan tsarin agajin gaggawa a faɗin duniya kulawa da kuma jajircewa haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa (UAE) da kuma hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) da abokan haɗin gwiwar suna aiki don isar da kayayyakin don isa ga mutane masu rauni a duniya a lokacin da suke kan buƙata A nasa ɓangaren Daktan hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) na yankin gabashin bahar rum Dakta Ahmed Al-Mandhari yace hukumar lafiya na cigaba da haɗa kai da hukumomin kiwon lafiya na Sudan domin isar da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya daga dukkan hanyoyin da ake da su. Sakamakon rikicin asibitoci kantinan magani da cibiyoyin kula da lafiya a matakin farko sun tanadi muhimman maguguna don ceton rai. Zuwan ƙarin tan talatin na kayyakin agaji da tiyatar gaggawa da kuma muhimman magunguna zasu ba hukumar lafiya ta duniya damar tallafawa hukumomin lafiya goma sha uku da sake kafa ayyukan kula da lafiyar masu buƙatar hakan. Kamfanin mu na jigila na duniya a Dubai yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wurin tabbatar kayayyakin kiwon lafiya ba tare da katsewa ba kuma muna godiya da tallafin da haɗaɗdiyar daular larabawa ta bamu don sauƙaƙe mana na farko.

A bangarensa, Dr. Ahmed Al-Mandhari, Darakta Janar na WHO a Gabas ta Tsakiya, ya ce, "Kungiyar Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya na ci gaba da hada kai da hukumomin lafiya na Sudan don samar da abubuwan lafiya na gaba da abubuwan da za su zo ta duk hanyoyin da suka dace.  Saboda rikicin, asibitai, kantin magani da wurare na kula da lafiya na farko sun fadi abubuwan lafiya na gaba da abubuwan da ke adana rayuka.  Karin ton 30 na kayan aikin tiyattana cuta da aikin tiyattawa da kuma abubuwan lafiya na gaba za su ba WHO damar tallafawa asibitai 13 na manya da kuma farfasa ayyukan kula da lafiya ga wadanda ke bukatar. translations.source: It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.” The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Irin wannan taimakon kamar wannan shi ne yake nuna ƙoƙari a aikacenmu na yanki na samar da lafiya ba kowa. Tallafin lafiya da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bayar ta hannun haɗaɗɗiyar fdaular larabawa ya kai kusan kashi hamsin da biyar na jimilla kayayyakin jinya da aka baiwa Sudan daga ƙetare a shekarar 2022 wanda ke nuni da matsayin haɗaɗɗiyar daular larabawa a matsayin babbar cibiyar taimakon jinƙai ta ƙasa da ƙasa.

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled “What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?” reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others.
translations.reference: Haɗin kai a cikin gida shine mabuɗin don ci gaba a duniya game da kiwon lafiya na muradan ƙarni SDGs Hukumomin 13 da suka sanya hannu kan Tsarin Ayyukan Duniya don Rayuwar Lafiya da Jin Dadin Kowa (SDG3 GAP) ne ke fitar da wani sabon rahoton ci gaba tare a haɗin gwiwa a yau. Rahoton mai taken me ya faru? mene bai yi ba? menen na gaba yana nuna shekaru huɗu na ayyukan haɗin gwiwa da manyan hukumomin ƙungiyoyi suka yi tare da bayyana abinda yayi aiki da wanda bai yi aiki ba domin ƙarfafa haɗin gwiwa da tallafi domin cigaban ƙasa a ɓangaren harkokin lafiya da kuma cigaban muradan ƙarni. A wannan shekarar ce aka kai rabin cimma cigaban muradan ƙarni amma kuma duniya tana baya wurin cimma muradan ƙarnin. Tun lokacin da aka ƙaddamar da shi a cikin 2019, SDG3 GAP ya ba da damar ƙirƙirar sabbin tsarin haɗin gwiwa tsakanin hukumomin da suka sanya hannu a cikin mahimman fannoni kamar dorewar kuɗi da kula da lafiya na farko da sauransu.

Sabon rahoton ci gaba da kungiyoyin da suka rattaba hannu a Planar Aiki na Duniya don Lafiya da Kasancewa Mai Lafiya ga Kowa (SDG3 GAP) ke fitar da shi a yau. Rahoton mai taken “Menene da ya yi aiki? Menene da bai yi aiki ba? Menene gaba?” ya nuna shekaru huɗu na aiki tare da manyan hukumomin kasa da kasa, da ke bayanin abin da ya yi aiki da abin da bai yi aiki ba wajen ƙarfafa haɗin gwiwa da tallafi don haɓaka ci gaba a ƙasashe kan burin ci gaban da ke da alaka da lafiya (SDGs). translations.source: At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. “I thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Mafi ƙaranci ƙasashe 67 ne suka shiga ɗaya ko fiye da ɗaya daga cikin shirye-shiryen ingantata fasali na SDG3 GAP. Mun samu cigaba mai muhimmanci amma akwai amma har yanzu akwai doguwar tafiya domin inganta yadda ƙungiyoyi daban daban ke aiki tare domin tallafa wa ƙasashe. Dole ne mu saurari abinda ƙasashe ke gaya mana kuma muyi aiki bisa jagorancin su inji Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus darakta janar na hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO kuma shugaban ƙungiyar shugabannin SDG3 GAP. Ina godiya ga abokan hulɗa bisa hadin kaida suka yi da kuma yadda suka nuna gaskiya cikin wannan rahoto. Rahoton ya bada shawarwari guda shida masu muhimmanci don tabbaatar da cewa ƙasashe sun ci gajiyar tallafin da ya dace da kuma tabbatar da alƙawuran da aka yi a SDG3 GAP.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach;
translations.reference: Sun haɗa da: Cigaba da inganta cigaban muradan ƙarni SDG3 GAP na lafiya ta hanyar neman ra’ayoyin mambobin ƙasashe kan yadda muke haɗa kai a matakin ƙasa da kuma amsa shawarwarin da suka danganci; Kula da GAP a matsayin dandamali da haɗin gwiwa; Haɓaka haɗin gwiwa mai ƙarfi a matakin ƙasa kan kula da hukumar kiwon lafiya a matakin farko da kuma bincika sabbin batutuwa kamar tsarin kiwon lafiya mai jure yanayi Tare da yin amfani da sabbin hanyoyin a matakin ƙasa domin isar da tsari mai tasiri;
